(* ------------------------------------------------------------------------- *)
(** Displayed transformation.
    Contents:
      - Definition of displayed transformation.
      - Identity and composition of displayed transformations.                *)
(* ------------------------------------------------------------------------- *)

Require Import UniMath.Foundations.All.

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]
Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Functors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Core.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Constructions.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Bicat. Import Bicat.Notations.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Examples.Initial.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Examples.Final.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.DisplayedBicats.DispBicat. Import DispBicat.Notations.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Univalence.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Invertible_2cells.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.DisplayedBicats.DispInvertibles.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.DisplayedBicats.DispAdjunctions.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.DisplayedBicats.DispUnivalence.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.PseudoFunctors.Display.PseudoFunctorBicat.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.PseudoFunctors.PseudoFunctor.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.PseudoFunctors.Examples.Identity.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.PseudoFunctors.Examples.Composition.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Transformations.PseudoTransformation.

Notation "_ ◅ _" was already used.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]
Notation "_ ▻ _" was already used.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Transformations.Examples.Unitality.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Transformations.Examples.Associativity.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.DisplayedBicats.DispPseudofunctor.

Import PseudoFunctor.Notations.

Local Open Scope cat.

(** ** Definition of displayed transformation. *)

Section DispTransformation.

Context {B₁ : bicat} {D₁ : disp_bicat B₁}
        {B₂ : bicat} {D₂ : disp_bicat B₂}
        {F₁ F₂ : psfunctor B₁ B₂}
        (FF₁ : disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁)
        (FF₂ : disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂)
        (α : pstrans F₁ F₂).

(** *** Data *)

Definition disp_pstrans_data : UU
  := ∑ αα₁ : ∏ (x : B₁) (xx : D₁ x), FF₁ x xx -->[ α x] FF₂ x xx,
             ∏ (x y : B₁) (f : B₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧) (xx : D₁ x) (yy : D₁ y) (ff : xx -->[ f] yy),
             disp_invertible_2cell (psnaturality_of α f)
                                   (αα₁ x xx;; disp_psfunctor_mor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂ ff)
                                   (disp_psfunctor_mor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁ ff;; αα₁ y yy).

Definition make_disp_pstrans_data
           (αα₁ : ∏ (x : B₁) (xx : D₁ x), FF₁ x xx -->[ α x] FF₂ x xx)
           (αα₂ : ∏ (x y : B₁) (f : B₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧) (xx : D₁ x) (yy : D₁ y) (ff : xx -->[ f] yy),
                  disp_invertible_2cell (psnaturality_of α f)
                                        (αα₁ x xx;; disp_psfunctor_mor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂ ff)
                                        (disp_psfunctor_mor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁ ff;; αα₁ y yy))
  : disp_pstrans_data
  := (αα₁,, αα₂).

Definition disp_pscomponent_of (αα : disp_pstrans_data)
  : ∏ (x : B₁) (xx : D₁ x), FF₁ x xx -->[ α x] FF₂ x xx
  := pr1 αα.

Coercion disp_pscomponent_of : disp_pstrans_data >-> Funclass.

Definition disp_psnaturality_of (αα : disp_pstrans_data)
           {x y : B₁}
           {f : B₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧}
           {xx : D₁ x} {yy : D₁ y}
           (ff : xx -->[ f] yy)
  : disp_invertible_2cell (psnaturality_of α f)
                          (αα x xx;; disp_psfunctor_mor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂ ff)
                          (disp_psfunctor_mor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁ ff;; αα y yy)
  := pr2 αα x y f xx yy ff.


B₁: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
B₂: bicat
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
F₁, F₂: psfunctor B₁ B₂
FF₁: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁
FF₂: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂
α: pstrans F₁ F₂
ααdata: disp_pstrans_data
pstrans_data (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)
  (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂)


B₁: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
B₂: bicat
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
F₁, F₂: psfunctor B₁ B₂
FF₁: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁
FF₂: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂
α: pstrans F₁ F₂
ααdata: disp_pstrans_data
pstrans_data (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)
  (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂)

  
B₁: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
B₂: bicat
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
F₁, F₂: psfunctor B₁ B₂
FF₁: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁
FF₂: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂
α: pstrans F₁ F₂
ααdata: disp_pstrans_data
∏ X : total_bicat D₁,
total_bicat D₂ ⟦ total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁ X,
total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂ X ⟧
B₁: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
B₂: bicat
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
F₁, F₂: psfunctor B₁ B₂
FF₁: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁
FF₂: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂
α: pstrans F₁ F₂
ααdata: disp_pstrans_data
∏ (X Y : total_bicat D₁)
(f : total_bicat D₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
invertible_2cell
  (?η₁ X · # (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂) f)
  (# (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁) f · ?η₁ Y)

  
B₁: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
B₂: bicat
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
F₁, F₂: psfunctor B₁ B₂
FF₁: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁
FF₂: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂
α: pstrans F₁ F₂
ααdata: disp_pstrans_data
∏ X : total_bicat D₁,
total_bicat D₂ ⟦ total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁ X,
total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂ X ⟧
 exact (λ x, (α (pr1 x),, ααdata _ (pr2 x))).
  
B₁: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
B₂: bicat
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
F₁, F₂: psfunctor B₁ B₂
FF₁: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁
FF₂: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂
α: pstrans F₁ F₂
ααdata: disp_pstrans_data
∏ (X Y : total_bicat D₁)
(f : total_bicat D₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
invertible_2cell
  ((λ x : total_bicat D₁,
    α (pr1 x),, ααdata (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) X
   · # (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂) f)
  (# (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁) f
   · (λ x : total_bicat D₁,
      α (pr1 x),, ααdata (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) Y)
 exact (λ x y f, iso_in_E_weq _ _ (psnaturality_of α (pr1 f),,
                    disp_psnaturality_of ααdata (pr2 f))).
Defined.

(** *** Properties *)

Section DispPstransLaws.

Variable ααdata : disp_pstrans_data.

Definition disp_psnaturality_natural_law : UU
  := ∏ (x y : B₁) (f g : B₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧)
       (η : f ==> g)
       (xx : D₁ x) (yy : D₁ y)
       (ff : xx -->[ f] yy)
       (gg : xx -->[ g] yy)
       (ηη : ff ==>[ η] gg),
     (ααdata x xx ◃◃ disp_psfunctor_cell D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂ ηη) •• disp_psnaturality_of ααdata gg
     =
     transportb
       (λ p, _ ==>[p] _)
       (psnaturality_natural α x y f g η)
       (disp_psnaturality_of ααdata ff •• (disp_psfunctor_cell D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁ ηη ▹▹ ααdata y yy)).

Definition disp_pstrans_id_law : UU
  := ∏ (x : B₁) (xx : D₁ x),
     (ααdata x xx ◃◃ disp_psfunctor_id D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂ xx)
       •• disp_psnaturality_of ααdata (id_disp xx)
     =
     transportb
       (λ p, _ ==>[p] _)
       (pstrans_id α x)
       ((disp_runitor (ααdata x xx) •• disp_linvunitor (ααdata x xx))
          •• (disp_psfunctor_id D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁ xx ▹▹ ααdata x xx)).

Definition disp_pstrans_comp_law : UU
  := ∏ (x y z : B₁)
       (f : B₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : B₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧)
       (xx : D₁ x) (yy : D₁ y) (zz : D₁ z)
       (ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
     (ααdata x xx ◃◃ disp_psfunctor_comp D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂ ff gg)
       •• disp_psnaturality_of ααdata (ff;; gg) =
     transportb
       (λ p, _ ==>[p] _)
       (pstrans_comp α f g)
       (((((disp_lassociator
              (ααdata x xx)
              (disp_psfunctor_mor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂ ff)
              (disp_psfunctor_mor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂ gg)
              •• (disp_psnaturality_of ααdata ff ▹▹ disp_psfunctor_mor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂ gg))
             •• disp_rassociator (disp_psfunctor_mor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁ ff) (ααdata y yy)
             (disp_psfunctor_mor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂ gg))
            •• (disp_psfunctor_mor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁ ff ◃◃ disp_psnaturality_of ααdata gg))
           •• disp_lassociator (disp_psfunctor_mor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁ ff)
           (disp_psfunctor_mor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁ gg) (ααdata z zz))
          •• (disp_psfunctor_comp D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁ ff gg ▹▹ ααdata z zz)).

Definition is_disp_pstrans
  : UU
  := disp_psnaturality_natural_law
       × disp_pstrans_id_law
       × disp_pstrans_comp_law.

End DispPstransLaws.

(** *** Displayed transformation *)

Definition disp_pstrans : UU
  := ∑ αα : disp_pstrans_data, is_disp_pstrans αα.

Coercion disp_pstrans_to_disp_pstrans_data (αα : disp_pstrans)
  : disp_pstrans_data
  := pr1 αα.


B₁: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
B₂: bicat
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
F₁, F₂: psfunctor B₁ B₂
FF₁: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁
FF₂: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂
α: pstrans F₁ F₂
αα: disp_pstrans
is_pstrans (total_pstrans_data αα)


B₁: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
B₂: bicat
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
F₁, F₂: psfunctor B₁ B₂
FF₁: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁
FF₂: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂
α: pstrans F₁ F₂
αα: disp_pstrans
is_pstrans (total_pstrans_data αα)

  
B₁: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
B₂: bicat
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
F₁, F₂: psfunctor B₁ B₂
FF₁: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁
FF₂: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂
α: pstrans F₁ F₂
αα: disp_pstrans
X, Y: total_bicat D₁
f, g: total_bicat D₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
α0: f ==> g
(pr1 (total_pstrans_data αα) X
 ◃ ## (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂) α0)
• pr2 (total_pstrans_data αα) X Y g =
pr2 (total_pstrans_data αα) X Y f
• (## (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁) α0
   ▹ pr1 (total_pstrans_data αα) Y)
B₁: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
B₂: bicat
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
F₁, F₂: psfunctor B₁ B₂
FF₁: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁
FF₂: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂
α: pstrans F₁ F₂
αα: disp_pstrans
X: total_bicat D₁
(pr1 (total_pstrans_data αα) X
 ◃ psfunctor_id (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂) X)
• pr2 (total_pstrans_data αα) X X (id₁ X) =
(runitor (pr1 (total_pstrans_data αα) X)
 • linvunitor (pr1 (total_pstrans_data αα) X))
• (psfunctor_id (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁) X
   ▹ pr1 (total_pstrans_data αα) X)
B₁: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
B₂: bicat
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
F₁, F₂: psfunctor B₁ B₂
FF₁: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁
FF₂: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂
α: pstrans F₁ F₂
αα: disp_pstrans
X, Y, Z: total_bicat D₁
f: total_bicat D₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
g: total_bicat D₁ ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
(pr1 (total_pstrans_data αα) X
 ◃ psfunctor_comp (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂) f g)
• pr2 (total_pstrans_data αα) X Z (f · g) =
((((lassociator (pr1 (total_pstrans_data αα) X)
      (# (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂) f)
      (# (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂) g)
    • (pr2 (total_pstrans_data αα) X Y f
       ▹ # (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂) g))
   • rassociator (# (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁) f)
       (pr1 (total_pstrans_data αα) Y)
       (# (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂) g))
  • (# (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁) f
     ◃ pr2 (total_pstrans_data αα) Y Z g))
 • lassociator (# (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁) f)
     (# (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁) g)
     (pr1 (total_pstrans_data αα) Z))
• (psfunctor_comp (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁) f g
   ▹ pr1 (total_pstrans_data αα) Z)

  
B₁: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
B₂: bicat
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
F₁, F₂: psfunctor B₁ B₂
FF₁: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁
FF₂: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂
α: pstrans F₁ F₂
αα: disp_pstrans
X, Y: total_bicat D₁
f, g: total_bicat D₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
α0: f ==> g
(pr1 (total_pstrans_data αα) X
 ◃ ## (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂) α0)
• pr2 (total_pstrans_data αα) X Y g =
pr2 (total_pstrans_data αα) X Y f
• (## (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁) α0
   ▹ pr1 (total_pstrans_data αα) Y)
 use total2_paths_b; [apply (psnaturality_natural α) | apply αα].
  
B₁: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
B₂: bicat
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
F₁, F₂: psfunctor B₁ B₂
FF₁: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁
FF₂: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂
α: pstrans F₁ F₂
αα: disp_pstrans
X: total_bicat D₁
(pr1 (total_pstrans_data αα) X
 ◃ psfunctor_id (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂) X)
• pr2 (total_pstrans_data αα) X X (id₁ X) =
(runitor (pr1 (total_pstrans_data αα) X)
 • linvunitor (pr1 (total_pstrans_data αα) X))
• (psfunctor_id (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁) X
   ▹ pr1 (total_pstrans_data αα) X)
 use total2_paths_b; [apply (pstrans_id α) | apply αα].
  
B₁: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
B₂: bicat
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
F₁, F₂: psfunctor B₁ B₂
FF₁: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁
FF₂: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂
α: pstrans F₁ F₂
αα: disp_pstrans
X, Y, Z: total_bicat D₁
f: total_bicat D₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
g: total_bicat D₁ ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
(pr1 (total_pstrans_data αα) X
 ◃ psfunctor_comp (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂) f g)
• pr2 (total_pstrans_data αα) X Z (f · g) =
((((lassociator (pr1 (total_pstrans_data αα) X)
      (# (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂) f)
      (# (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂) g)
    • (pr2 (total_pstrans_data αα) X Y f
       ▹ # (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂) g))
   • rassociator (# (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁) f)
       (pr1 (total_pstrans_data αα) Y)
       (# (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂) g))
  • (# (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁) f
     ◃ pr2 (total_pstrans_data αα) Y Z g))
 • lassociator (# (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁) f)
     (# (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁) g)
     (pr1 (total_pstrans_data αα) Z))
• (psfunctor_comp (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁) f g
   ▹ pr1 (total_pstrans_data αα) Z)
 
B₁: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
B₂: bicat
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
F₁, F₂: psfunctor B₁ B₂
FF₁: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁
FF₂: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂
α: pstrans F₁ F₂
αα: disp_pstrans
X, Y, Z: total_bicat D₁
f: total_bicat D₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
g: total_bicat D₁ ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
pr1
  ((pr1 (total_pstrans_data αα) X
    ◃ psfunctor_comp (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂) f
        g) • pr2 (total_pstrans_data αα) X Z (f · g)) =
pr1
  (((((lassociator (pr1 (total_pstrans_data αα) X)
         (# (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂) f)
         (# (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂) g)
       • (pr2 (total_pstrans_data αα) X Y f
          ▹ # (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂) g))
      • rassociator
          (# (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁) f)
          (pr1 (total_pstrans_data αα) Y)
          (# (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂) g))
     • (# (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁) f
        ◃ pr2 (total_pstrans_data αα) Y Z g))
    • lassociator (# (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁) f)
        (# (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁) g)
        (pr1 (total_pstrans_data αα) Z))
   • (psfunctor_comp (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁) f
        g ▹ pr1 (total_pstrans_data αα) Z))
B₁: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
B₂: bicat
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
F₁, F₂: psfunctor B₁ B₂
FF₁: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁
FF₂: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂
α: pstrans F₁ F₂
αα: disp_pstrans
X, Y, Z: total_bicat D₁
f: total_bicat D₁ ⟦ X, Y ⟧
g: total_bicat D₁ ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
pr2
  ((pr1 (total_pstrans_data αα) X
    ◃ psfunctor_comp (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂) f
        g) • pr2 (total_pstrans_data αα) X Z (f · g)) =
transportb
  (λ x : pr1
           (pr1 (total_pstrans_data αα) X
            · (# (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂) f
               · # (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂) g)) ==>
         pr1
           ((pr211 (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)) X Z
              (f · g) · pr1 (total_pstrans_data αα) Z),
   pr2
     (pr1 (total_pstrans_data αα) X
      · (# (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂) f
         · # (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂) g)) ==>[
   x] pr2
        ((pr211 (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)) X Z
           (f · g) · pr1 (total_pstrans_data αα) Z))
  ?p
  (pr2
     (((((lassociator (pr1 (total_pstrans_data αα) X)
            (# (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂) f)
            (# (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂) g)
          • (pr2 (total_pstrans_data αα) X Y f
             ▹ # (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂) g))
         • rassociator
             (# (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁) f)
             (pr1 (total_pstrans_data αα) Y)
             (# (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂) g))
        • (# (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁) f
           ◃ pr2 (total_pstrans_data αα) Y Z g))
       • lassociator
           (# (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁) f)
           (# (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁) g)
           (pr1 (total_pstrans_data αα) Z))
      • (psfunctor_comp (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)
           f g ▹ pr1 (total_pstrans_data αα) Z)))
 2: apply αα.
Qed.


B₁: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
B₂: bicat
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
F₁, F₂: psfunctor B₁ B₂
FF₁: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁
FF₂: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂
α: pstrans F₁ F₂
αα: disp_pstrans
pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)
  (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂)

B₁: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
B₂: bicat
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
F₁, F₂: psfunctor B₁ B₂
FF₁: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁
FF₂: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂
α: pstrans F₁ F₂
αα: disp_pstrans_data
Hαα: is_pstrans (total_pstrans_data αα)
Eα:= make_pstrans (total_pstrans_data αα) Hαα: pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)
  (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂)
x, y: B₁
f, g: B₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
η: f ==> g
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
ηη: ff ==>[ η] gg
(αα x xx ◃◃ ♯♯ FF₂ ηη) •• disp_psnaturality_of αα gg =
transportb
  (λ p : α x · # F₂ f ==> # F₁ g · α y,
   αα x xx ;; ♯ FF₂ ff ==>[ p] ♯ FF₁ gg ;; αα y yy)
  (psnaturality_natural α x y f g η)
  (disp_psnaturality_of αα ff
   •• (♯♯ FF₁ ηη ▹▹ αα y yy))

    
B₁: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
B₂: bicat
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
F₁, F₂: psfunctor B₁ B₂
FF₁: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁
FF₂: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂
α: pstrans F₁ F₂
αα: disp_pstrans_data
Hαα: is_pstrans (total_pstrans_data αα)
Eα:= make_pstrans (total_pstrans_data αα) Hαα: pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)
  (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂)
x, y: B₁
f, g: B₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
η: f ==> g
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
ηη: ff ==>[ η] gg
P:= ! fiber_paths
    (psnaturality_natural Eα (x,, xx) (y,, yy)
       (f,, ff) (g,, gg) (η,, ηη)): pr2
  (psnaturality_of Eα (f,, ff)
   • (## (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁) (η,, ηη)
      ▹ Eα (y,, yy))) =
transportf
  (λ x0 : pr1
            (Eα (x,, xx)
             · # (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂)
                 (f,, ff)) ==>
          pr1
            (# (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)
               (g,, gg) · Eα (y,, yy)),
   (λ η : pr1
            (Eα (x,, xx)
             · # (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂)
                 (f,, ff)) ==>
          pr1
            (# (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)
               (g,, gg) · Eα (y,, yy)),
    pr2
      (Eα (x,, xx)
       · # (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂) (f,, ff)) ==>[
    η] pr2
         (# (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)
            (g,, gg) · Eα (y,, yy))) x0)
  (base_paths
     ((Eα (x,, xx)
       ◃ ## (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂)
           (η,, ηη)) • psnaturality_of Eα (g,, gg))
     (psnaturality_of Eα (f,, ff)
      • (## (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)
           (η,, ηη) ▹ Eα (y,, yy)))
     (psnaturality_natural Eα (x,, xx) (y,, yy)
        (f,, ff) (g,, gg) (η,, ηη)))
  (pr2
     ((Eα (x,, xx)
       ◃ ## (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂)
           (η,, ηη)) • psnaturality_of Eα (g,, gg)))
(αα x xx ◃◃ ♯♯ FF₂ ηη) •• disp_psnaturality_of αα gg =
transportb
  (λ p : α x · # F₂ f ==> # F₁ g · α y,
   αα x xx ;; ♯ FF₂ ff ==>[ p] ♯ FF₁ gg ;; αα y yy)
  (psnaturality_natural α x y f g η)
  (disp_psnaturality_of αα ff
   •• (♯♯ FF₁ ηη ▹▹ αα y yy))

    
B₁: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
B₂: bicat
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
F₁, F₂: psfunctor B₁ B₂
FF₁: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁
FF₂: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂
α: pstrans F₁ F₂
αα: disp_pstrans_data
Hαα: is_pstrans (total_pstrans_data αα)
Eα:= make_pstrans (total_pstrans_data αα) Hαα: pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)
  (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂)
x, y: B₁
f, g: B₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
η: f ==> g
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
ηη: ff ==>[ η] gg
P:= ! fiber_paths
    (psnaturality_natural Eα (x,, xx) (y,, yy)
       (f,, ff) (g,, gg) (η,, ηη)): pr2
  (psnaturality_of Eα (f,, ff)
   • (## (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁) (η,, ηη)
      ▹ Eα (y,, yy))) =
transportf
  (λ x0 : pr1
            (Eα (x,, xx)
             · # (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂)
                 (f,, ff)) ==>
          pr1
            (# (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)
               (g,, gg) · Eα (y,, yy)),
   (λ η : pr1
            (Eα (x,, xx)
             · # (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂)
                 (f,, ff)) ==>
          pr1
            (# (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)
               (g,, gg) · Eα (y,, yy)),
    pr2
      (Eα (x,, xx)
       · # (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂) (f,, ff)) ==>[
    η] pr2
         (# (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)
            (g,, gg) · Eα (y,, yy))) x0)
  (base_paths
     ((Eα (x,, xx)
       ◃ ## (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂)
           (η,, ηη)) • psnaturality_of Eα (g,, gg))
     (psnaturality_of Eα (f,, ff)
      • (## (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)
           (η,, ηη) ▹ Eα (y,, yy)))
     (psnaturality_natural Eα (x,, xx) (y,, yy)
        (f,, ff) (g,, gg) (η,, ηη)))
  (pr2
     ((Eα (x,, xx)
       ◃ ## (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂)
           (η,, ηη)) • psnaturality_of Eα (g,, gg)))
transportb
  (λ p : α x · # F₂ f ==> # F₁ g · α y,
   αα x xx ;; ♯ FF₂ ff ==>[ p] ♯ FF₁ gg ;; αα y yy)
  (psnaturality_natural α x y f g η)
  (disp_psnaturality_of αα ff
   •• (♯♯ FF₁ ηη ▹▹ αα y yy)) =
(αα x xx ◃◃ ♯♯ FF₂ ηη) •• disp_psnaturality_of αα gg

    
B₁: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
B₂: bicat
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
F₁, F₂: psfunctor B₁ B₂
FF₁: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁
FF₂: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂
α: pstrans F₁ F₂
αα: disp_pstrans_data
Hαα: is_pstrans (total_pstrans_data αα)
Eα:= make_pstrans (total_pstrans_data αα) Hαα: pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)
  (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂)
x, y: B₁
f, g: B₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
η: f ==> g
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
ηη: ff ==>[ η] gg
P:= ! fiber_paths
    (psnaturality_natural Eα (x,, xx) (y,, yy)
       (f,, ff) (g,, gg) (η,, ηη)): pr2
  (psnaturality_of Eα (f,, ff)
   • (## (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁) (η,, ηη)
      ▹ Eα (y,, yy))) =
transportf
  (λ x0 : pr1
            (Eα (x,, xx)
             · # (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂)
                 (f,, ff)) ==>
          pr1
            (# (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)
               (g,, gg) · Eα (y,, yy)),
   (λ η : pr1
            (Eα (x,, xx)
             · # (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂)
                 (f,, ff)) ==>
          pr1
            (# (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)
               (g,, gg) · Eα (y,, yy)),
    pr2
      (Eα (x,, xx)
       · # (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂) (f,, ff)) ==>[
    η] pr2
         (# (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)
            (g,, gg) · Eα (y,, yy))) x0)
  (base_paths
     ((Eα (x,, xx)
       ◃ ## (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂)
           (η,, ηη)) • psnaturality_of Eα (g,, gg))
     (psnaturality_of Eα (f,, ff)
      • (## (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)
           (η,, ηη) ▹ Eα (y,, yy)))
     (psnaturality_natural Eα (x,, xx) (y,, yy)
        (f,, ff) (g,, gg) (η,, ηη)))
  (pr2
     ((Eα (x,, xx)
       ◃ ## (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂)
           (η,, ηη)) • psnaturality_of Eα (g,, gg)))
transportb
  (λ p : α x · # F₂ f ==> # F₁ g · α y,
   αα x xx ;; ♯ FF₂ ff ==>[ p] ♯ FF₁ gg ;; αα y yy)
  (psnaturality_natural α x y f g η)
  (disp_psnaturality_of αα ff
   •• (♯♯ FF₁ ηη ▹▹ αα y yy)) = ?b
B₁: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
B₂: bicat
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
F₁, F₂: psfunctor B₁ B₂
FF₁: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁
FF₂: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂
α: pstrans F₁ F₂
αα: disp_pstrans_data
Hαα: is_pstrans (total_pstrans_data αα)
Eα:= make_pstrans (total_pstrans_data αα) Hαα: pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)
  (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂)
x, y: B₁
f, g: B₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
η: f ==> g
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
ηη: ff ==>[ η] gg
P:= ! fiber_paths
    (psnaturality_natural Eα (x,, xx) (y,, yy)
       (f,, ff) (g,, gg) (η,, ηη)): pr2
  (psnaturality_of Eα (f,, ff)
   • (## (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁) (η,, ηη)
      ▹ Eα (y,, yy))) =
transportf
  (λ x0 : pr1
            (Eα (x,, xx)
             · # (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂)
                 (f,, ff)) ==>
          pr1
            (# (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)
               (g,, gg) · Eα (y,, yy)),
   (λ η : pr1
            (Eα (x,, xx)
             · # (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂)
                 (f,, ff)) ==>
          pr1
            (# (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)
               (g,, gg) · Eα (y,, yy)),
    pr2
      (Eα (x,, xx)
       · # (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂) (f,, ff)) ==>[
    η] pr2
         (# (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)
            (g,, gg) · Eα (y,, yy))) x0)
  (base_paths
     ((Eα (x,, xx)
       ◃ ## (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂)
           (η,, ηη)) • psnaturality_of Eα (g,, gg))
     (psnaturality_of Eα (f,, ff)
      • (## (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)
           (η,, ηη) ▹ Eα (y,, yy)))
     (psnaturality_natural Eα (x,, xx) (y,, yy)
        (f,, ff) (g,, gg) (η,, ηη)))
  (pr2
     ((Eα (x,, xx)
       ◃ ## (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂)
           (η,, ηη)) • psnaturality_of Eα (g,, gg)))
?b =
(αα x xx ◃◃ ♯♯ FF₂ ηη) •• disp_psnaturality_of αα gg
 
B₁: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
B₂: bicat
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
F₁, F₂: psfunctor B₁ B₂
FF₁: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁
FF₂: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂
α: pstrans F₁ F₂
αα: disp_pstrans_data
Hαα: is_pstrans (total_pstrans_data αα)
Eα:= make_pstrans (total_pstrans_data αα) Hαα: pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)
  (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂)
x, y: B₁
f, g: B₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
η: f ==> g
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
ηη: ff ==>[ η] gg
P:= ! fiber_paths
    (psnaturality_natural Eα (x,, xx) (y,, yy)
       (f,, ff) (g,, gg) (η,, ηη)): pr2
  (psnaturality_of Eα (f,, ff)
   • (## (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁) (η,, ηη)
      ▹ Eα (y,, yy))) =
transportf
  (λ x0 : pr1
            (Eα (x,, xx)
             · # (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂)
                 (f,, ff)) ==>
          pr1
            (# (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)
               (g,, gg) · Eα (y,, yy)),
   (λ η : pr1
            (Eα (x,, xx)
             · # (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂)
                 (f,, ff)) ==>
          pr1
            (# (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)
               (g,, gg) · Eα (y,, yy)),
    pr2
      (Eα (x,, xx)
       · # (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂) (f,, ff)) ==>[
    η] pr2
         (# (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)
            (g,, gg) · Eα (y,, yy))) x0)
  (base_paths
     ((Eα (x,, xx)
       ◃ ## (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂)
           (η,, ηη)) • psnaturality_of Eα (g,, gg))
     (psnaturality_of Eα (f,, ff)
      • (## (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)
           (η,, ηη) ▹ Eα (y,, yy)))
     (psnaturality_natural Eα (x,, xx) (y,, yy)
        (f,, ff) (g,, gg) (η,, ηη)))
  (pr2
     ((Eα (x,, xx)
       ◃ ## (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂)
           (η,, ηη)) • psnaturality_of Eα (g,, gg)))
transportb
  (λ p : α x · # F₂ f ==> # F₁ g · α y,
   αα x xx ;; ♯ FF₂ ff ==>[ p] ♯ FF₁ gg ;; αα y yy)
  (psnaturality_natural α x y f g η)
  (disp_psnaturality_of αα ff
   •• (♯♯ FF₁ ηη ▹▹ αα y yy)) = ?b
 
B₁: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
B₂: bicat
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
F₁, F₂: psfunctor B₁ B₂
FF₁: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁
FF₂: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂
α: pstrans F₁ F₂
αα: disp_pstrans_data
Hαα: is_pstrans (total_pstrans_data αα)
Eα:= make_pstrans (total_pstrans_data αα) Hαα: pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)
  (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂)
x, y: B₁
f, g: B₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
η: f ==> g
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
ηη: ff ==>[ η] gg
P:= ! fiber_paths
    (psnaturality_natural Eα (x,, xx) (y,, yy)
       (f,, ff) (g,, gg) (η,, ηη)): pr2
  (psnaturality_of Eα (f,, ff)
   • (## (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁) (η,, ηη)
      ▹ Eα (y,, yy))) =
transportf
  (λ x0 : pr1
            (Eα (x,, xx)
             · # (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂)
                 (f,, ff)) ==>
          pr1
            (# (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)
               (g,, gg) · Eα (y,, yy)),
   (λ η : pr1
            (Eα (x,, xx)
             · # (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂)
                 (f,, ff)) ==>
          pr1
            (# (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)
               (g,, gg) · Eα (y,, yy)),
    pr2
      (Eα (x,, xx)
       · # (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂) (f,, ff)) ==>[
    η] pr2
         (# (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)
            (g,, gg) · Eα (y,, yy))) x0)
  (base_paths
     ((Eα (x,, xx)
       ◃ ## (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂)
           (η,, ηη)) • psnaturality_of Eα (g,, gg))
     (psnaturality_of Eα (f,, ff)
      • (## (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)
           (η,, ηη) ▹ Eα (y,, yy)))
     (psnaturality_natural Eα (x,, xx) (y,, yy)
        (f,, ff) (g,, gg) (η,, ηη)))
  (pr2
     ((Eα (x,, xx)
       ◃ ## (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂)
           (η,, ηη)) • psnaturality_of Eα (g,, gg)))
disp_psnaturality_of αα ff •• (♯♯ FF₁ ηη ▹▹ αα y yy) =
?t2
 exact P.

  (psnaturality_of Eα (f,, ff)

     ((Eα (x,, xx)

           (η,, ηη)) • psnaturality_of Eα (g,, gg))
     (psnaturality_of Eα (f,, ff)
      • (## (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)
           (η,, ηη) ▹ Eα (y,, yy)))
     (psnaturality_natural Eα (x,, xx) (y,, yy)
        (f,, ff) (g,, gg) (η,, ηη)))
  (pr2
     ((Eα (x,, xx)
       ◃ ## (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂)
           (η,, ηη)) • psnaturality_of Eα (g,, gg)))
transportb
  (λ p : α x · # F₂ f ==> # F₁ g · α y,
   αα x xx ;; ♯ FF₂ ff ==>[ p] ♯ FF₁ gg ;; αα y yy)
  (psnaturality_natural α x y f g η)
  (transportf
     (λ x0 : pr1
               (Eα (x,, xx)
                · # (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂)
                    (f,, ff)) ==>
             pr1
               (# (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)
                  (g,, gg) · Eα (y,, yy)),
      (λ η : pr1

                · # (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂)
                    (f,, ff)) ==>

       η] pr2
            (# (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁) (g,, gg)
             · Eα (y,, yy))) x0)
     (base_paths
        ((Eα (x,, xx)
          ◃ ## (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂) (η,, ηη))
         • psnaturality_of Eα (g,, gg))
        (psnaturality_of Eα (f,, ff)
         • (## (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁) (η,, ηη)

          ◃ ## (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂) (η,, ηη))
         • psnaturality_of Eα (g,, gg)))) =
(αα x xx ◃◃ ♯♯ FF₂ ηη) •• disp_psnaturality_of αα gg

  (pr2
     ((Eα (x,, xx)
       ◃ ## (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂)
           (η,, ηη)) • psnaturality_of Eα (g,, gg)))
isaset (α x · # F₂ f ==> # F₁ g · α y)

    
B₁: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
B₂: bicat
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
F₁, F₂: psfunctor B₁ B₂
FF₁: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁
FF₂: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂
α: pstrans F₁ F₂
αα: disp_pstrans_data
Hαα: is_pstrans (total_pstrans_data αα)
Eα:= make_pstrans (total_pstrans_data αα) Hαα: pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)
  (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂)
x, y: B₁
f, g: B₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
η: f ==> g
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
ηη: ff ==>[ η] gg
P:= ! fiber_paths
    (psnaturality_natural Eα (x,, xx) (y,, yy)
       (f,, ff) (g,, gg) (η,, ηη)): pr2
  (psnaturality_of Eα (f,, ff)
   • (## (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁) (η,, ηη)
      ▹ Eα (y,, yy))) =
transportf
  (λ x0 : pr1
            (Eα (x,, xx)
             · # (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂)
                 (f,, ff)) ==>
          pr1
            (# (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)
               (g,, gg) · Eα (y,, yy)),
   (λ η : pr1
            (Eα (x,, xx)
             · # (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂)
                 (f,, ff)) ==>
          pr1
            (# (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)
               (g,, gg) · Eα (y,, yy)),
    pr2
      (Eα (x,, xx)
       · # (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂) (f,, ff)) ==>[
    η] pr2
         (# (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)
            (g,, gg) · Eα (y,, yy))) x0)
  (base_paths
     ((Eα (x,, xx)
       ◃ ## (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂)
           (η,, ηη)) • psnaturality_of Eα (g,, gg))
     (psnaturality_of Eα (f,, ff)
      • (## (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)
           (η,, ηη) ▹ Eα (y,, yy)))
     (psnaturality_natural Eα (x,, xx) (y,, yy)
        (f,, ff) (g,, gg) (η,, ηη)))
  (pr2
     ((Eα (x,, xx)
       ◃ ## (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂)
           (η,, ηη)) • psnaturality_of Eα (g,, gg)))
pr2
  ((Eα (x,, xx)
    ◃ ## (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂) (η,, ηη))
   • psnaturality_of Eα (g,, gg)) =
(αα x xx ◃◃ ♯♯ FF₂ ηη) •• disp_psnaturality_of αα gg
 apply idpath.
    
B₁: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
B₂: bicat
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
F₁, F₂: psfunctor B₁ B₂
FF₁: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁
FF₂: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂
α: pstrans F₁ F₂
αα: disp_pstrans_data
Hαα: is_pstrans (total_pstrans_data αα)
Eα:= make_pstrans (total_pstrans_data αα) Hαα: pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)
  (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂)
x, y: B₁
f, g: B₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
η: f ==> g
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
ηη: ff ==>[ η] gg
P:= ! fiber_paths
    (psnaturality_natural Eα (x,, xx) (y,, yy)
       (f,, ff) (g,, gg) (η,, ηη)): pr2
  (psnaturality_of Eα (f,, ff)
   • (## (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁) (η,, ηη)
      ▹ Eα (y,, yy))) =
transportf
  (λ x0 : pr1
            (Eα (x,, xx)
             · # (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂)
                 (f,, ff)) ==>
          pr1
            (# (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)
               (g,, gg) · Eα (y,, yy)),
   (λ η : pr1
            (Eα (x,, xx)
             · # (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂)
                 (f,, ff)) ==>
          pr1
            (# (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)
               (g,, gg) · Eα (y,, yy)),
    pr2
      (Eα (x,, xx)
       · # (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂) (f,, ff)) ==>[
    η] pr2
         (# (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)
            (g,, gg) · Eα (y,, yy))) x0)
  (base_paths
     ((Eα (x,, xx)
       ◃ ## (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂)
           (η,, ηη)) • psnaturality_of Eα (g,, gg))
     (psnaturality_of Eα (f,, ff)
      • (## (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)
           (η,, ηη) ▹ Eα (y,, yy)))
     (psnaturality_natural Eα (x,, xx) (y,, yy)
        (f,, ff) (g,, gg) (η,, ηη)))
  (pr2
     ((Eα (x,, xx)
       ◃ ## (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂)
           (η,, ηη)) • psnaturality_of Eα (g,, gg)))
isaset (α x · # F₂ f ==> # F₁ g · α y)
 apply B₂.

disp_pstrans_id_law αα
 
B₁: bicat

B₂: bicat
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
F₁, F₂: psfunctor B₁ B₂
FF₁: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁
FF₂: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂
α: pstrans F₁ F₂
αα: disp_pstrans_data
Hαα: is_pstrans (total_pstrans_data αα)
Eα:= make_pstrans (total_pstrans_data αα) Hαα: pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)
  (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂)
x: B₁
xx: D₁ x
(αα x xx ◃◃ disp_psfunctor_id D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂ xx)
•• disp_psnaturality_of αα (id_disp xx) =
transportb
  (λ p : α x · id₁ (F₂ x) ==> # F₁ (id₁ x) · α x,
   αα x xx ;; id_disp (FF₂ x xx) ==>[
   p] ♯ FF₁ (id_disp xx) ;; αα x xx) (pstrans_id α x)
  ((disp_runitor (αα x xx)
    •• disp_linvunitor (αα x xx))
   •• (disp_psfunctor_id D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁ xx ▹▹ αα x xx))

    
B₁: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
B₂: bicat
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
F₁, F₂: psfunctor B₁ B₂
FF₁: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁
FF₂: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂
α: pstrans F₁ F₂
αα: disp_pstrans_data
Hαα: is_pstrans (total_pstrans_data αα)
Eα:= make_pstrans (total_pstrans_data αα) Hαα: pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)
  (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂)
x: B₁
xx: D₁ x
P:= ! fiber_paths (pstrans_id Eα (x,, xx)): pr2
  ((runitor (Eα (x,, xx))
    • linvunitor (Eα (x,, xx)))
   • (psfunctor_id (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)
        (x,, xx) ▹ Eα (x,, xx))) =
transportf
  (λ x0 : pr1
            (Eα (x,, xx)
             · id₁
                 (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂
                    (x,, xx))) ==>
          pr1
            (# (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)
               (id₁ (x,, xx)) · Eα (x,, xx)),
   (λ η : pr1
            (Eα (x,, xx)
             · id₁
                 (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂
                    (x,, xx))) ==>
          pr1
            (# (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)
               (id₁ (x,, xx)) · Eα (x,, xx)),
    pr2
      (Eα (x,, xx)
       · id₁
           (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂ (x,, xx))) ==>[
    η] pr2
         (# (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)
            (id₁ (x,, xx)) · Eα (x,, xx))) x0)
  (base_paths
     ((Eα (x,, xx)
       ◃ psfunctor_id
           (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂) (x,, xx))
      • psnaturality_of Eα (id₁ (x,, xx)))
     ((runitor (Eα (x,, xx))
       • linvunitor (Eα (x,, xx)))
      • (psfunctor_id
           (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁) (x,, xx)
         ▹ Eα (x,, xx))) (pstrans_id Eα (x,, xx)))
  (pr2
     ((Eα (x,, xx)
       ◃ psfunctor_id
           (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂) (x,, xx))
      • psnaturality_of Eα (id₁ (x,, xx))))
(αα x xx ◃◃ disp_psfunctor_id D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂ xx)
•• disp_psnaturality_of αα (id_disp xx) =
transportb
  (λ p : α x · id₁ (F₂ x) ==> # F₁ (id₁ x) · α x,
   αα x xx ;; id_disp (FF₂ x xx) ==>[
   p] ♯ FF₁ (id_disp xx) ;; αα x xx) (pstrans_id α x)
  ((disp_runitor (αα x xx)
    •• disp_linvunitor (αα x xx))
   •• (disp_psfunctor_id D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁ xx ▹▹ αα x xx))

xx: D₁ x

  ((runitor (Eα (x,, xx))
    • linvunitor (Eα (x,, xx)))

  (λ x0 : pr1

                 (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂
                    (x,, xx))) ==>

               (id₁ (x,, xx)) · Eα (x,, xx)),

                    (x,, xx))) ==>

               (id₁ (x,, xx)) · Eα (x,, xx)),
    pr2
      (Eα (x,, xx)
       · id₁
           (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂ (x,, xx))) ==>[
    η] pr2
         (# (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)
            (id₁ (x,, xx)) · Eα (x,, xx))) x0)
  (base_paths
     ((Eα (x,, xx)
       ◃ psfunctor_id
           (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂) (x,, xx))
      • psnaturality_of Eα (id₁ (x,, xx)))
     ((runitor (Eα (x,, xx))
       • linvunitor (Eα (x,, xx)))
      • (psfunctor_id
           (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁) (x,, xx)
         ▹ Eα (x,, xx))) (pstrans_id Eα (x,, xx)))
  (pr2
     ((Eα (x,, xx)
       ◃ psfunctor_id
           (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂) (x,, xx))
      • psnaturality_of Eα (id₁ (x,, xx))))
transportb
  (λ p : α x · id₁ (F₂ x) ==> # F₁ (id₁ x) · α x,
   αα x xx ;; id_disp (FF₂ x xx) ==>[
   p] ♯ FF₁ (id_disp xx) ;; αα x xx) (pstrans_id α x)
  ((disp_runitor (αα x xx)
    •• disp_linvunitor (αα x xx))
   •• (disp_psfunctor_id D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁ xx ▹▹ αα x xx)) =

•• disp_psnaturality_of αα (id_disp xx)

xx: D₁ x

  ((runitor (Eα (x,, xx))
    • linvunitor (Eα (x,, xx)))

        (x,, xx) ▹ Eα (x,, xx))) =

                    (x,, xx))) ==>

                    (x,, xx))) ==>

    pr2

       · id₁
           (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂ (x,, xx))) ==>[
    η] pr2
         (# (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)
            (id₁ (x,, xx)) · Eα (x,, xx))) x0)
  (base_paths
     ((Eα (x,, xx)
       ◃ psfunctor_id
           (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂) (x,, xx))
      • psnaturality_of Eα (id₁ (x,, xx)))
     ((runitor (Eα (x,, xx))
       • linvunitor (Eα (x,, xx)))
      • (psfunctor_id
           (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁) (x,, xx)

     ((Eα (x,, xx)
       ◃ psfunctor_id
           (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂) (x,, xx))
      • psnaturality_of Eα (id₁ (x,, xx))))
transportb
  (λ p : α x · id₁ (F₂ x) ==> # F₁ (id₁ x) · α x,
   αα x xx ;; id_disp (FF₂ x xx) ==>[
   p] ♯ FF₁ (id_disp xx) ;; αα x xx) (pstrans_id α x)
  ((disp_runitor (αα x xx)
    •• disp_linvunitor (αα x xx))
   •• (disp_psfunctor_id D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁ xx ▹▹ αα x xx)) =
?b

xx: D₁ x
P:= ! fiber_paths (pstrans_id Eα (x,, xx)): pr2
  ((runitor (Eα (x,, xx))
    • linvunitor (Eα (x,, xx)))
   • (psfunctor_id (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)
        (x,, xx) ▹ Eα (x,, xx))) =

                    (x,, xx))) ==>

                    (x,, xx))) ==>

    pr2
      (Eα (x,, xx)
       · id₁
           (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂ (x,, xx))) ==>[
    η] pr2
         (# (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)
            (id₁ (x,, xx)) · Eα (x,, xx))) x0)
  (base_paths
     ((Eα (x,, xx)
       ◃ psfunctor_id
           (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂) (x,, xx))
      • psnaturality_of Eα (id₁ (x,, xx)))
     ((runitor (Eα (x,, xx))
       • linvunitor (Eα (x,, xx)))
      • (psfunctor_id
           (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁) (x,, xx)
         ▹ Eα (x,, xx))) (pstrans_id Eα (x,, xx)))
  (pr2
     ((Eα (x,, xx)
       ◃ psfunctor_id
           (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂) (x,, xx))
      • psnaturality_of Eα (id₁ (x,, xx))))
?b =
(αα x xx ◃◃ disp_psfunctor_id D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂ xx)
•• disp_psnaturality_of αα (id_disp xx)

FF₂: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂
α: pstrans F₁ F₂
αα: disp_pstrans_data
Hαα: is_pstrans (total_pstrans_data αα)
Eα:= make_pstrans (total_pstrans_data αα) Hαα: pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)
  (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂)
x: B₁
xx: D₁ x
P:= ! fiber_paths (pstrans_id Eα (x,, xx)): pr2
  ((runitor (Eα (x,, xx))
    • linvunitor (Eα (x,, xx)))
   • (psfunctor_id (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)
        (x,, xx) ▹ Eα (x,, xx))) =
transportf
  (λ x0 : pr1
            (Eα (x,, xx)
             · id₁
                 (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂
                    (x,, xx))) ==>
          pr1
            (# (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)
               (id₁ (x,, xx)) · Eα (x,, xx)),
   (λ η : pr1
            (Eα (x,, xx)
             · id₁
                 (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂
                    (x,, xx))) ==>
          pr1
            (# (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)
               (id₁ (x,, xx)) · Eα (x,, xx)),
    pr2
      (Eα (x,, xx)
       · id₁
           (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂ (x,, xx))) ==>[
    η] pr2
         (# (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)
            (id₁ (x,, xx)) · Eα (x,, xx))) x0)
  (base_paths
     ((Eα (x,, xx)
       ◃ psfunctor_id
           (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂) (x,, xx))
      • psnaturality_of Eα (id₁ (x,, xx)))
     ((runitor (Eα (x,, xx))
       • linvunitor (Eα (x,, xx)))
      • (psfunctor_id
           (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁) (x,, xx)
         ▹ Eα (x,, xx))) (pstrans_id Eα (x,, xx)))
  (pr2
     ((Eα (x,, xx)
       ◃ psfunctor_id
           (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂) (x,, xx))
      • psnaturality_of Eα (id₁ (x,, xx))))
(disp_runitor (αα x xx) •• disp_linvunitor (αα x xx))
•• (disp_psfunctor_id D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁ xx ▹▹ αα x xx) =
?t2
 exact P.

  (base_paths
     ((Eα (x,, xx)
       ◃ psfunctor_id

      • psnaturality_of Eα (id₁ (x,, xx)))

       • linvunitor (Eα (x,, xx)))
      • (psfunctor_id
           (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁) (x,, xx)
         ▹ Eα (x,, xx))) (pstrans_id Eα (x,, xx)))
  (pr2
     ((Eα (x,, xx)
       ◃ psfunctor_id
           (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂) (x,, xx))
      • psnaturality_of Eα (id₁ (x,, xx))))
transportb
  (λ p : α x · id₁ (F₂ x) ==> # F₁ (id₁ x) · α x,

  (transportf
     (λ x0 : pr1
               (Eα (x,, xx)
                · id₁
                    (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂
                       (x,, xx))) ==>
             pr1
               (# (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)

      (λ η : pr1

                · id₁
                    (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂
                       (x,, xx))) ==>
             pr1

                  (id₁ (x,, xx)) · Eα (x,, xx)),
       pr2
         (Eα (x,, xx)
          · id₁
              (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂ (x,, xx))) ==>[
       η] pr2
            (# (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)
               (id₁ (x,, xx)) · Eα (x,, xx))) x0)
     (base_paths
        ((Eα (x,, xx)
          ◃ psfunctor_id
              (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂) (x,, xx))
         • psnaturality_of Eα (id₁ (x,, xx)))
        ((runitor (Eα (x,, xx))
          • linvunitor (Eα (x,, xx)))
         • (psfunctor_id

     (pr2

              (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂) (x,, xx))
         • psnaturality_of Eα (id₁ (x,, xx))))) =
(αα x xx ◃◃ disp_psfunctor_id D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂ xx)
•• disp_psnaturality_of αα (id_disp xx)

           (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁) (x,, xx)
         ▹ Eα (x,, xx))) (pstrans_id Eα (x,, xx)))
  (pr2
     ((Eα (x,, xx)
       ◃ psfunctor_id
           (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂) (x,, xx))

pr2
  ((Eα (x,, xx)
    ◃ psfunctor_id (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂)
        (x,, xx)) • psnaturality_of Eα (id₁ (x,, xx))) =

αα: disp_pstrans_data

  (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂)
x: B₁
xx: D₁ x
P:= ! fiber_paths (pstrans_id Eα (x,, xx)): pr2
  ((runitor (Eα (x,, xx))
    • linvunitor (Eα (x,, xx)))
   • (psfunctor_id (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)
        (x,, xx) ▹ Eα (x,, xx))) =
transportf
  (λ x0 : pr1
            (Eα (x,, xx)
             · id₁
                 (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂
                    (x,, xx))) ==>
          pr1
            (# (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)
               (id₁ (x,, xx)) · Eα (x,, xx)),
   (λ η : pr1
            (Eα (x,, xx)
             · id₁
                 (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂
                    (x,, xx))) ==>

               (id₁ (x,, xx)) · Eα (x,, xx)),
    pr2
      (Eα (x,, xx)
       · id₁
           (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂ (x,, xx))) ==>[
    η] pr2
         (# (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)
            (id₁ (x,, xx)) · Eα (x,, xx))) x0)
  (base_paths
     ((Eα (x,, xx)
       ◃ psfunctor_id
           (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂) (x,, xx))
      • psnaturality_of Eα (id₁ (x,, xx)))
     ((runitor (Eα (x,, xx))
       • linvunitor (Eα (x,, xx)))
      • (psfunctor_id
           (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁) (x,, xx)
         ▹ Eα (x,, xx))) (pstrans_id Eα (x,, xx)))
  (pr2
     ((Eα (x,, xx)
       ◃ psfunctor_id
           (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂) (x,, xx))
      • psnaturality_of Eα (id₁ (x,, xx))))
isaset (α x · id₁ (F₂ x) ==> # F₁ (id₁ x) · α x)

f: B₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: B₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧

yy: D₁ y
zz: D₁ z
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
(αα x xx ◃◃ disp_psfunctor_comp D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂ ff gg)
•• disp_psnaturality_of αα (ff ;; gg) =
transportb
  (λ p : α x · (# F₂ f · # F₂ g) ==>
         # F₁ (f · g) · α z,
   αα x xx ;; (♯ FF₂ ff ;; ♯ FF₂ gg)%mor_disp ==>[
   p] ♯ FF₁ (ff ;; gg) ;; αα z zz)
  (pstrans_comp α f g)
  (((((disp_lassociator (αα x xx) (♯ FF₂ ff)
         (♯ FF₂ gg)
       •• (disp_psnaturality_of αα ff ▹▹ ♯ FF₂ gg))

           (♯ FF₂ gg))
     •• (♯ FF₁ ff ◃◃ disp_psnaturality_of αα gg))
    •• disp_lassociator (♯ FF₁ ff) (♯ FF₁ gg)
         (αα z zz))
   •• (disp_psfunctor_comp D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁ ff gg
       ▹▹ αα z zz))

yy: D₁ y

   • psnaturality_of Eα ((f,, ff) · (g,, gg))) =
(αα x xx ◃◃ disp_psfunctor_comp D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂ ff gg)
•• disp_psnaturality_of αα (ff ;; gg)

B₂: bicat

  (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂)

g: B₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧

yy: D₁ y
zz: D₁ z

gg: yy -->[ g] zz

  (((((lassociator (Eα (x,, xx))
         (# (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂)
            (f,, ff))

            (g,, gg))

          ▹ # (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂)

isaset
  (α x · (# F₂ f · # F₂ g) ==> # F₁ (f · g) · α z)

x, y, z: B₁
f: B₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: B₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
zz: D₁ z
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
P:= ! fiber_paths (pstrans_comp Eα (f,, ff) (g,, gg)): pr2
  (((((lassociator (Eα (x,, xx))
         (# (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂)
            (f,, ff))
         (# (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂)
            (g,, gg))
       • (psnaturality_of Eα (f,, ff)
          ▹ # (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂)
              (g,, gg)))

          (# (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)
             (f,, ff)) (Eα (y,, yy))
          (# (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂)
             (g,, gg)))

        (Eα (z,, zz)))

        (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁) (f,, ff)
        (g,, gg) ▹ Eα (z,, zz))) =
transportf
  (λ x0 : pr1
            (Eα (x,, xx)
             · (# (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂)
                  (f,, ff)
                · # (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂)
                    (g,, gg))) ==>
          pr1
            (# (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)
               ((f,, ff) · (g,, gg)) · Eα (z,, zz)),
   (λ η : pr1
            (Eα (x,, xx)
             · (# (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂)
                  (f,, ff)
                · # (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂)
                    (g,, gg))) ==>
          pr1
            (# (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)
               ((f,, ff) · (g,, gg)) · Eα (z,, zz)),
    pr2
      (Eα (x,, xx)
       · (# (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂)
            (f,, ff)
          · # (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂)
              (g,, gg))) ==>[
    η] pr2
         (# (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)
            ((f,, ff) · (g,, gg)) · Eα (z,, zz)))
     x0)
  (base_paths
     ((Eα (x,, xx)
       ◃ psfunctor_comp
           (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂) (f,, ff)
           (g,, gg))
      • psnaturality_of Eα ((f,, ff) · (g,, gg)))
     (((((lassociator (Eα (x,, xx))

               (f,, ff))
            (# (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂)

             ▹ # (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂)
                 (g,, gg)))

             (# (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)
                (f,, ff)) (Eα (y,, yy))
             (# (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂)
                (g,, gg)))

             (f,, ff)
           ◃ psnaturality_of Eα (g,, gg)))

              (f,, ff))

              (g,, gg)) (Eα (z,, zz)))

           (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁) (f,, ff)
           (g,, gg) ▹ Eα (z,, zz)))
     (pstrans_comp Eα (f,, ff) (g,, gg)))
  (pr2
     ((Eα (x,, xx)
       ◃ psfunctor_comp
           (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂) (f,, ff)
           (g,, gg))
      • psnaturality_of Eα ((f,, ff) · (g,, gg))))
isaset
  (α x · (# F₂ f · # F₂ g) ==> # F₁ (f · g) · α z)
 apply B₂.
Qed.

End DispTransformation.

(** ** Identity *)


Section DispTrans_identity.

Context {B₁ B₂ : bicat}
        {D₁ : disp_bicat B₁}
        {D₂ : disp_bicat B₂}
        {F : psfunctor B₁ B₂}
        (FF : disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F).


B₁, B₂: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
FF: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F
disp_pstrans_data FF FF (id_pstrans F)


B₁, B₂: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
FF: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F
disp_pstrans_data FF FF (id_pstrans F)

  
B₁, B₂: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
FF: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F
∏ (x : B₁) (xx : D₁ x),
FF x xx -->[ id₁ ((pr111 F) x)] FF x xx
B₁, B₂: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
FF: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F
∏ (x y : B₁) (f : B₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧) (xx : D₁ x) (yy : D₁ y)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy),
disp_invertible_2cell
  ((lunitor ((pr211 F) x y f)
    • rinvunitor ((pr211 F) x y f)),,
   is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
     (is_invertible_2cell_lunitor ((pr211 F) x y f))
     (is_invertible_2cell_rinvunitor ((pr211 F) x y f)))
  (?Goal x xx ;; ♯ FF ff) (♯ FF ff ;; ?Goal y yy)

  
B₁, B₂: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
FF: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F
∏ (x : B₁) (xx : D₁ x),
FF x xx -->[ id₁ ((pr111 F) x)] FF x xx
 exact (λ x xx, id_disp (FF x xx)).
  
B₁, B₂: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
FF: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F
∏ (x y : B₁) (f : B₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧) (xx : D₁ x) (yy : D₁ y)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy),
disp_invertible_2cell
  ((lunitor ((pr211 F) x y f)
    • rinvunitor ((pr211 F) x y f)),,
   is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
     (is_invertible_2cell_lunitor ((pr211 F) x y f))
     (is_invertible_2cell_rinvunitor ((pr211 F) x y f)))
  ((λ (x0 : B₁) (xx0 : D₁ x0), id_disp (FF x0 xx0)) x
     xx ;; ♯ FF ff)
  (♯ FF ff ;; (λ (x0 : B₁) (xx0 : D₁ x0),
               id_disp (FF x0 xx0)) y yy)
 
B₁, B₂: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
FF: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F
x, y: B₁
f: B₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
disp_invertible_2cell
  ((lunitor ((pr211 F) x y f)
    • rinvunitor ((pr211 F) x y f)),,
   is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
     (is_invertible_2cell_lunitor ((pr211 F) x y f))
     (is_invertible_2cell_rinvunitor ((pr211 F) x y f)))
  ((λ (x : B₁) (xx : D₁ x), id_disp (FF x xx)) x xx ;; 
   ♯ FF ff)
  (♯ FF ff ;; (λ (x : B₁) (xx : D₁ x),
               id_disp (FF x xx)) y yy)

    apply (vcomp_disp_invertible (disp_invertible_2cell_lunitor _)
                                 (disp_invertible_2cell_rinvunitor _)).
Defined.


B₁, B₂: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
FF: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F
is_disp_pstrans FF FF (id_pstrans F)
  disp_id_pstrans_data


B₁, B₂: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
FF: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F

  disp_id_pstrans_data

  
B₁, B₂: bicat

D₂: disp_bicat B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
FF: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F
is_pstrans
  (total_pstrans_data FF FF (id_pstrans F)
     disp_id_pstrans_data)

  
B₁, B₂: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
FF: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F
PP:= id_pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF): pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)
  (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)
is_pstrans
  (total_pstrans_data FF FF (id_pstrans F)
     disp_id_pstrans_data)

  
B₁, B₂: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
FF: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F
PP:= id_pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF): pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)
  (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)
PP2:= pstrans_to_is_pstrans PP: is_pstrans (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)
is_pstrans
  (total_pstrans_data FF FF (id_pstrans F)
     disp_id_pstrans_data)

  
B₁, B₂: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
FF: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F
PP:= id_pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF): pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)
  (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)
PP2:= pstrans_to_is_pstrans PP: is_pstrans (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)
pr11 PP =
total_pstrans_data FF FF (id_pstrans F)
  disp_id_pstrans_data
B₁, B₂: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
FF: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F

  (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)
PP2:= pstrans_to_is_pstrans PP: is_pstrans (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)
X: pr11 PP =
total_pstrans_data FF FF (id_pstrans F)
  disp_id_pstrans_data
is_pstrans
  (total_pstrans_data FF FF (id_pstrans F)
     disp_id_pstrans_data)

D₂: disp_bicat B₂

  (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)

pr11 PP =
total_pstrans_data FF FF (id_pstrans F)
  disp_id_pstrans_data

     (pr211 (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF))) ?p

x, y: total_bicat D₁
f: total_bicat D₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
isPredicate is_invertible_2cell
B₁, B₂: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
FF: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F
PP:= id_pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF): pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)
  (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)
PP2:= pstrans_to_is_pstrans PP: is_pstrans (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)
x, y: total_bicat D₁
f: total_bicat D₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr1
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (pr211 (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF))
        (pr211 (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)))
     (idpath
        (pr1
           (total_pstrans_data FF FF (id_pstrans F)
              disp_id_pstrans_data))) (pr211 PP) x y f) =
pr1
  (pr2
     (total_pstrans_data FF FF (id_pstrans F)
        disp_id_pstrans_data) x y f)

      
B₁, B₂: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
FF: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F
PP:= id_pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF): pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)
  (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)
PP2:= pstrans_to_is_pstrans PP: is_pstrans (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)
x, y: total_bicat D₁
f: total_bicat D₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
isPredicate is_invertible_2cell
 
B₁, B₂: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
FF: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F
PP:= id_pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF): pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)
  (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)
PP2:= pstrans_to_is_pstrans PP: is_pstrans (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)
x, y: total_bicat D₁
f: total_bicat D₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
x0: pr1
  (total_pstrans_data FF FF (id_pstrans F)
     disp_id_pstrans_data) x
· (pr211 (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)) x y f ==>
(pr211 (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)) x y f
· pr1
    (total_pstrans_data FF FF (id_pstrans F)
       disp_id_pstrans_data) y
isaprop (is_invertible_2cell x0)
 apply isaprop_is_invertible_2cell. 
B₁, B₂: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
FF: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F
PP:= id_pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF): pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)
  (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)
PP2:= pstrans_to_is_pstrans PP: is_pstrans (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)
x, y: total_bicat D₁
f: total_bicat D₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr1
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (pr211 (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF))
        (pr211 (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)))
     (idpath
        (pr1
           (total_pstrans_data FF FF (id_pstrans F)
              disp_id_pstrans_data))) (pr211 PP) x y f) =
pr1
  (pr2
     (total_pstrans_data FF FF (id_pstrans F)
        disp_id_pstrans_data) x y f)

      apply idpath.
  
B₁, B₂: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
FF: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F
PP:= id_pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF): pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)
  (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)
PP2:= pstrans_to_is_pstrans PP: is_pstrans (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)
X: pr11 PP =
total_pstrans_data FF FF (id_pstrans F)
  disp_id_pstrans_data
is_pstrans
  (total_pstrans_data FF FF (id_pstrans F)
     disp_id_pstrans_data)
 exact (transportf _ X PP2).
Qed.

Definition disp_id_pstrans : disp_pstrans FF FF (id_pstrans F)
  := disp_id_pstrans_data,, disp_id_pstrans_laws.

End DispTrans_identity.

(** ** Composition *)

Section DispTrans_comp.

Context {B₁ B₂ : bicat}
        {F₁ : psfunctor B₁ B₂}
        {F₂ : psfunctor B₁ B₂}
        {F₃ : psfunctor B₁ B₂}
        {η₁ : pstrans F₁ F₂}
        {η₂ : pstrans F₂ F₃}
        {D₁ : disp_bicat B₁}
        {D₂ : disp_bicat B₂}
        {FF₁ : disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁}
        {FF₂ : disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂}
        {FF₃ : disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₃}
        (ηη₁ : disp_pstrans FF₁ FF₂ η₁)
        (ηη₂ : disp_pstrans FF₂ FF₃ η₂).


Notation "_ •• _" was already used.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]


Notation "_ ◃◃ _" was already used.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]


Notation "_ ▹▹ _" was already used.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]



B₁, B₂: bicat
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor B₁ B₂
η₁: pstrans F₁ F₂
η₂: pstrans F₂ F₃
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
FF₁: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁
FF₂: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂
FF₃: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₃
ηη₁: disp_pstrans FF₁ FF₂ η₁
ηη₂: disp_pstrans FF₂ FF₃ η₂
disp_pstrans_data FF₁ FF₃ (comp_pstrans η₁ η₂)


B₁, B₂: bicat
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor B₁ B₂
η₁: pstrans F₁ F₂
η₂: pstrans F₂ F₃
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
FF₁: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁
FF₂: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂
FF₃: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₃
ηη₁: disp_pstrans FF₁ FF₂ η₁
ηη₂: disp_pstrans FF₂ FF₃ η₂
disp_pstrans_data FF₁ FF₃ (comp_pstrans η₁ η₂)

  
B₁, B₂: bicat
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor B₁ B₂
η₁: pstrans F₁ F₂
η₂: pstrans F₂ F₃
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
FF₁: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁
FF₂: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂
FF₃: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₃
ηη₁: disp_pstrans FF₁ FF₂ η₁
ηη₂: disp_pstrans FF₂ FF₃ η₂
∏ (x : B₁) (xx : D₁ x),
FF₁ x xx -->[ (pr111 η₁) x · (pr111 η₂) x] FF₃ x xx
B₁, B₂: bicat
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor B₁ B₂
η₁: pstrans F₁ F₂
η₂: pstrans F₂ F₃
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
FF₁: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁
FF₂: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂
FF₃: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₃
ηη₁: disp_pstrans FF₁ FF₂ η₁
ηη₂: disp_pstrans FF₂ FF₃ η₂
∏ (x y : B₁) (f : B₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧) (xx : D₁ x) (yy : D₁ y)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy),
disp_invertible_2cell
  (((((rassociator ((pr111 η₁) x) ((pr111 η₂) x)
         ((pr211 F₃) x y f)
       • ((pr111 η₁) x ◃ (pr211 η₂) x y f))
      • lassociator ((pr111 η₁) x) ((pr211 F₂) x y f)
          ((pr111 η₂) y))
     • ((pr211 η₁) x y f ▹ (pr111 η₂) y))
    • rassociator ((pr211 F₁) x y f) ((pr111 η₁) y)
        ((pr111 η₂) y)),,
   is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
     (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
        (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
           (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
              (is_invertible_2cell_rassociator
                 ((pr111 η₁) x) ((pr111 η₂) x)
                 ((pr211 F₃) x y f))
              (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker
                 ((pr111 η₁) x)
                 (pr2 ((pr211 η₂) x y f))))
           (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator
              ((pr111 η₁) x) ((pr211 F₂) x y f)
              ((pr111 η₂) y)))
        (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker ((pr111 η₂) y)
           (pr2 ((pr211 η₁) x y f))))
     (is_invertible_2cell_rassociator
        ((pr211 F₁) x y f) ((pr111 η₁) y)
        ((pr111 η₂) y))) (?Goal x xx ;; ♯ FF₃ ff)
  (♯ FF₁ ff ;; ?Goal y yy)

  
B₁, B₂: bicat
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor B₁ B₂
η₁: pstrans F₁ F₂
η₂: pstrans F₂ F₃
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
FF₁: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁
FF₂: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂
FF₃: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₃
ηη₁: disp_pstrans FF₁ FF₂ η₁
ηη₂: disp_pstrans FF₂ FF₃ η₂
∏ (x : B₁) (xx : D₁ x),
FF₁ x xx -->[ (pr111 η₁) x · (pr111 η₂) x] FF₃ x xx
 exact (λ x xx, comp_disp (ηη₁ x xx) (ηη₂ x xx)).
  
B₁, B₂: bicat
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor B₁ B₂
η₁: pstrans F₁ F₂
η₂: pstrans F₂ F₃
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
FF₁: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁
FF₂: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂
FF₃: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₃
ηη₁: disp_pstrans FF₁ FF₂ η₁
ηη₂: disp_pstrans FF₂ FF₃ η₂
∏ (x y : B₁) (f : B₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧) (xx : D₁ x) (yy : D₁ y)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy),
disp_invertible_2cell
  (((((rassociator ((pr111 η₁) x) ((pr111 η₂) x)
         ((pr211 F₃) x y f)
       • ((pr111 η₁) x ◃ (pr211 η₂) x y f))
      • lassociator ((pr111 η₁) x) ((pr211 F₂) x y f)
          ((pr111 η₂) y))
     • ((pr211 η₁) x y f ▹ (pr111 η₂) y))
    • rassociator ((pr211 F₁) x y f) ((pr111 η₁) y)
        ((pr111 η₂) y)),,
   is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
     (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
        (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
           (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
              (is_invertible_2cell_rassociator
                 ((pr111 η₁) x) ((pr111 η₂) x)
                 ((pr211 F₃) x y f))
              (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker
                 ((pr111 η₁) x)
                 (pr2 ((pr211 η₂) x y f))))
           (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator
              ((pr111 η₁) x) ((pr211 F₂) x y f)
              ((pr111 η₂) y)))
        (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker ((pr111 η₂) y)
           (pr2 ((pr211 η₁) x y f))))
     (is_invertible_2cell_rassociator
        ((pr211 F₁) x y f) ((pr111 η₁) y)
        ((pr111 η₂) y)))
  ((λ (x0 : B₁) (xx0 : D₁ x0),
    (ηη₁ x0 xx0 ;; ηη₂ x0 xx0)%mor_disp) x xx ;; ♯ FF₃
                                                 ff)
  (♯ FF₁ ff ;; (λ (x0 : B₁) (xx0 : D₁ x0),
                (ηη₁ x0 xx0 ;; ηη₂ x0 xx0)%mor_disp) y
                 yy)
 exact (λ x y f xx yy ff,
           (disp_invertible_2cell_rassociator _ _ _)
             •• (_ ◃◃ disp_psnaturality_of _ _ _ ηη₂ ff)
             •• disp_invertible_2cell_lassociator _ _ _
             •• (disp_psnaturality_of _ _ _ ηη₁ ff ▹▹ _)
             •• disp_invertible_2cell_rassociator _ _ _).
Defined.


B₁, B₂: bicat
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor B₁ B₂
η₁: pstrans F₁ F₂
η₂: pstrans F₂ F₃
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
FF₁: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁
FF₂: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂

B₁, B₂: bicat
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor B₁ B₂
η₁: pstrans F₁ F₂
η₂: pstrans F₂ F₃

  (total_pstrans FF₂ FF₃ η₂ ηη₂): pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)
  (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₃ FF₃)

x, y: total_bicat D₁
f: total_bicat D₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr1
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (pr211 (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁))
        (pr211 (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₃ FF₃)))
     (idpath
        (pr1
           (total_pstrans_data FF₁ FF₃
              (comp_pstrans η₁ η₂)
              disp_comp_pstrans_data))) (pr211 PP) x y
     f) =
pr1
  (pr2
     (total_pstrans_data FF₁ FF₃ (comp_pstrans η₁ η₂)
        disp_comp_pstrans_data) x y f)

      
B₁, B₂: bicat
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor B₁ B₂
η₁: pstrans F₁ F₂
η₂: pstrans F₂ F₃
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
FF₁: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁
FF₂: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂
FF₃: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₃
ηη₁: disp_pstrans FF₁ FF₂ η₁
ηη₂: disp_pstrans FF₂ FF₃ η₂
PP:= comp_pstrans (total_pstrans FF₁ FF₂ η₁ ηη₁)
  (total_pstrans FF₂ FF₃ η₂ ηη₂): pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)
  (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₃ FF₃)
PP2:= pstrans_to_is_pstrans PP: is_pstrans (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)
x, y: total_bicat D₁
f: total_bicat D₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
isPredicate is_invertible_2cell
 
B₁, B₂: bicat
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor B₁ B₂
η₁: pstrans F₁ F₂
η₂: pstrans F₂ F₃
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
FF₁: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁
FF₂: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂
FF₃: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₃
ηη₁: disp_pstrans FF₁ FF₂ η₁
ηη₂: disp_pstrans FF₂ FF₃ η₂
PP:= comp_pstrans (total_pstrans FF₁ FF₂ η₁ ηη₁)
  (total_pstrans FF₂ FF₃ η₂ ηη₂): pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)
  (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₃ FF₃)
PP2:= pstrans_to_is_pstrans PP: is_pstrans (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)
x, y: total_bicat D₁
f: total_bicat D₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
x0: pr1
  (total_pstrans_data FF₁ FF₃
     (comp_pstrans η₁ η₂) disp_comp_pstrans_data)
  x
· (pr211 (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₃ FF₃)) x y f ==>
(pr211 (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)) x y f
· pr1
    (total_pstrans_data FF₁ FF₃
       (comp_pstrans η₁ η₂)
       disp_comp_pstrans_data) y
isaprop (is_invertible_2cell x0)
 apply isaprop_is_invertible_2cell. 
B₁, B₂: bicat
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor B₁ B₂
η₁: pstrans F₁ F₂
η₂: pstrans F₂ F₃
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
FF₁: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁
FF₂: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂
FF₃: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₃
ηη₁: disp_pstrans FF₁ FF₂ η₁
ηη₂: disp_pstrans FF₂ FF₃ η₂
PP:= comp_pstrans (total_pstrans FF₁ FF₂ η₁ ηη₁)
  (total_pstrans FF₂ FF₃ η₂ ηη₂): pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)
  (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₃ FF₃)
PP2:= pstrans_to_is_pstrans PP: is_pstrans (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)
x, y: total_bicat D₁
f: total_bicat D₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr1
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (pr211 (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁))
        (pr211 (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₃ FF₃)))
     (idpath
        (pr1
           (total_pstrans_data FF₁ FF₃
              (comp_pstrans η₁ η₂)
              disp_comp_pstrans_data))) (pr211 PP) x y
     f) =
pr1
  (pr2
     (total_pstrans_data FF₁ FF₃ (comp_pstrans η₁ η₂)
        disp_comp_pstrans_data) x y f)

      apply idpath.
  
B₁, B₂: bicat
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor B₁ B₂
η₁: pstrans F₁ F₂
η₂: pstrans F₂ F₃
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
FF₁: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁
FF₂: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂
FF₃: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₃
ηη₁: disp_pstrans FF₁ FF₂ η₁
ηη₂: disp_pstrans FF₂ FF₃ η₂
PP:= comp_pstrans (total_pstrans FF₁ FF₂ η₁ ηη₁)
  (total_pstrans FF₂ FF₃ η₂ ηη₂): pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)
  (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₃ FF₃)
PP2:= pstrans_to_is_pstrans PP: is_pstrans (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)
X: pr11 PP =
total_pstrans_data FF₁ FF₃ (comp_pstrans η₁ η₂)
  disp_comp_pstrans_data
is_pstrans
  (total_pstrans_data FF₁ FF₃ (comp_pstrans η₁ η₂)
     disp_comp_pstrans_data)
 exact (transportf _ X PP2).
Qed.

Definition disp_comp_pstrans : disp_pstrans _ _ (comp_pstrans η₁ η₂)
  := disp_comp_pstrans_data,, disp_comp_pstrans_laws.

End DispTrans_comp.


B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
α: invertible_2cell f g
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
αα: disp_invertible_2cell α ff gg
disp_invertible_2cell (inv_of_invertible_2cell α) gg
  ff


B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
α: invertible_2cell f g
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
αα: disp_invertible_2cell α ff gg
disp_invertible_2cell (inv_of_invertible_2cell α) gg
  ff

  
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
α: invertible_2cell f g
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
αα: disp_invertible_2cell α ff gg
gg ==>[ inv_of_invertible_2cell α] ff
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
α: invertible_2cell f g
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
αα: disp_invertible_2cell α ff gg
(λ x0 : gg ==>[ inv_of_invertible_2cell α] ff,
 is_disp_invertible_2cell (inv_of_invertible_2cell α)
   x0) ?pr1

  
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
α: invertible_2cell f g
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
αα: disp_invertible_2cell α ff gg
gg ==>[ inv_of_invertible_2cell α] ff
 exact (disp_inv_cell αα).
  
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
α: invertible_2cell f g
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
αα: disp_invertible_2cell α ff gg
(λ x0 : gg ==>[ inv_of_invertible_2cell α] ff,
 is_disp_invertible_2cell (inv_of_invertible_2cell α)
   x0) (disp_inv_cell αα)
 
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
α: invertible_2cell f g
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
αα: disp_invertible_2cell α ff gg
ff ==>[ (inv_of_invertible_2cell α) ^-1] gg
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
α: invertible_2cell f g
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
αα: disp_invertible_2cell α ff gg
(λ y0 : ff ==>[ (inv_of_invertible_2cell α) ^-1] gg,
 disp_inv_cell αα •• y0 =
 transportb (λ α : g ==> g, gg ==>[ α] gg)
   (vcomp_rinv (inv_of_invertible_2cell α))
   (disp_id2 gg)
 × y0 •• disp_inv_cell αα =
   transportb (λ α : f ==> f, ff ==>[ α] ff)
     (vcomp_linv (inv_of_invertible_2cell α))
     (disp_id2 ff)) ?pr1

    
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
α: invertible_2cell f g
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
αα: disp_invertible_2cell α ff gg
ff ==>[ (inv_of_invertible_2cell α) ^-1] gg
 apply αα.
    
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
α: invertible_2cell f g
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
αα: disp_invertible_2cell α ff gg
(λ y0 : ff ==>[ (inv_of_invertible_2cell α) ^-1] gg,
 disp_inv_cell αα •• y0 =
 transportb (λ α : g ==> g, gg ==>[ α] gg)
   (vcomp_rinv (inv_of_invertible_2cell α))
   (disp_id2 gg)
 × y0 •• disp_inv_cell αα =
   transportb (λ α : f ==> f, ff ==>[ α] ff)
     (vcomp_linv (inv_of_invertible_2cell α))
     (disp_id2 ff)) (let X := pr1 αα in X)
 
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
α: invertible_2cell f g
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
αα: disp_invertible_2cell α ff gg
disp_inv_cell αα •• pr1 αα =
transportb (λ α : g ==> g, gg ==>[ α] gg)
  (vcomp_linv α) (disp_id2 gg)
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
α: invertible_2cell f g
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
αα: disp_invertible_2cell α ff gg
pr1 αα •• disp_inv_cell αα =
transportb (λ α : f ==> f, ff ==>[ α] ff)
  (vcomp_rinv α) (disp_id2 ff)

      
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
α: invertible_2cell f g
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
αα: disp_invertible_2cell α ff gg
disp_inv_cell αα •• pr1 αα =
transportb (λ α : g ==> g, gg ==>[ α] gg)
  (vcomp_linv α) (disp_id2 gg)
 apply disp_vcomp_linv.
      
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
α: invertible_2cell f g
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
αα: disp_invertible_2cell α ff gg
pr1 αα •• disp_inv_cell αα =
transportb (λ α : f ==> f, ff ==>[ α] ff)
  (vcomp_rinv α) (disp_id2 ff)
 apply disp_vcomp_rinv.
Defined.

Section DispTrans_lwhisker.

Context {B₁ B₂ B₃ : bicat}
        {F₁ F₂ : psfunctor B₁ B₂}
        {G : psfunctor B₂ B₃}
        {η : pstrans F₁ F₂}
        {D₁ : disp_bicat B₁}
        {D₂ : disp_bicat B₂}
        {D₃ : disp_bicat B₃}
        {FF₁ : disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁}
        {FF₂ : disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂}
        (GG : disp_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G)
        (ηη : disp_pstrans FF₁ FF₂ η).


Notation "_ •• _" was already used.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]



B₁, B₂, B₃: bicat
F₁, F₂: psfunctor B₁ B₂
G: psfunctor B₂ B₃
η: pstrans F₁ F₂
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
D₃: disp_bicat B₃
FF₁: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁
FF₂: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂
GG: disp_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G
ηη: disp_pstrans FF₁ FF₂ η
disp_pstrans_data
  (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ G D₁ D₂ D₃ FF₁ GG)
  (disp_pseudo_comp F₂ G D₁ D₂ D₃ FF₂ GG) (G ◅ η)


B₁, B₂, B₃: bicat
F₁, F₂: psfunctor B₁ B₂
G: psfunctor B₂ B₃
η: pstrans F₁ F₂
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
D₃: disp_bicat B₃
FF₁: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁
FF₂: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂
GG: disp_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G
ηη: disp_pstrans FF₁ FF₂ η
disp_pstrans_data
  (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ G D₁ D₂ D₃ FF₁ GG)
  (disp_pseudo_comp F₂ G D₁ D₂ D₃ FF₂ GG) (G ◅ η)

  
B₁, B₂, B₃: bicat
F₁, F₂: psfunctor B₁ B₂
G: psfunctor B₂ B₃
η: pstrans F₁ F₂
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
D₃: disp_bicat B₃
FF₁: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁
FF₂: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂
GG: disp_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G
ηη: disp_pstrans FF₁ FF₂ η
∏ (x : B₁) (xx : D₁ x),
GG (F₁ x) (FF₁ x xx) -->[
# G (η x)] GG (F₂ x) (FF₂ x xx)
B₁, B₂, B₃: bicat
F₁, F₂: psfunctor B₁ B₂
G: psfunctor B₂ B₃
η: pstrans F₁ F₂
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
D₃: disp_bicat B₃
FF₁: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁
FF₂: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂
GG: disp_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G
ηη: disp_pstrans FF₁ FF₂ η
∏ (x y : B₁) (f : B₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧) (xx : D₁ x) (yy : D₁ y)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy),
disp_invertible_2cell
  (make_invertible_2cell
     (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
        (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
           ((pr222 G) (F₁ x) (F₂ x) (F₂ y) (η x)
              (# F₂ f))
           (psfunctor_is_iso G (psnaturality_of η f)))
        (is_invertible_2cell_inv
           ((pr222 G) (F₁ x) (F₁ y) (F₂ y) (# F₁ f)
              (η y)))))
  (?Goal x xx ;; ♯ GG (♯ FF₂ ff))
  (♯ GG (♯ FF₁ ff) ;; ?Goal y yy)

  
B₁, B₂, B₃: bicat
F₁, F₂: psfunctor B₁ B₂
G: psfunctor B₂ B₃
η: pstrans F₁ F₂
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
D₃: disp_bicat B₃
FF₁: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁
FF₂: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂
GG: disp_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G
ηη: disp_pstrans FF₁ FF₂ η
∏ (x : B₁) (xx : D₁ x),
GG (F₁ x) (FF₁ x xx) -->[
# G (η x)] GG (F₂ x) (FF₂ x xx)
 exact (λ x xx, pr121 GG _ _ _ _ _ (pr11 ηη x xx)).
  
B₁, B₂, B₃: bicat
F₁, F₂: psfunctor B₁ B₂
G: psfunctor B₂ B₃
η: pstrans F₁ F₂
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
D₃: disp_bicat B₃
FF₁: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁
FF₂: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂
GG: disp_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G
ηη: disp_pstrans FF₁ FF₂ η
∏ (x y : B₁) (f : B₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧) (xx : D₁ x) (yy : D₁ y)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy),
disp_invertible_2cell
  (make_invertible_2cell
     (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
        (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
           ((pr222 G) (F₁ x) (F₂ x) (F₂ y) (η x)
              (# F₂ f))
           (psfunctor_is_iso G (psnaturality_of η f)))
        (is_invertible_2cell_inv
           ((pr222 G) (F₁ x) (F₁ y) (F₂ y) (# F₁ f)
              (η y)))))
  ((λ (x0 : B₁) (xx0 : D₁ x0),
    (pr121 GG) (F₁ x0) (F₂ x0) (η x0) (FF₁ x0 xx0)
      (FF₂ x0 xx0) ((pr11 ηη) x0 xx0)) x xx ;; ♯ GG
                                                 (♯ FF₂
                                                 ff))
  (♯ GG (♯ FF₁ ff) ;; (λ (x0 : B₁) (xx0 : D₁ x0),
                       (pr121 GG) (F₁ x0) (F₂ x0)
                         (η x0) (FF₁ x0 xx0)
                         (FF₂ x0 xx0)
                         ((pr11 ηη) x0 xx0)) y yy)
 exact (λ x y f xx yy ff,
           (disp_psfunctor_comp _ _ _ GG _ _)
             •• disp_psfunctor_invertible_2cell GG (disp_psnaturality_of _ _ _ ηη ff)
             •• (disp_inv_invertible (disp_psfunctor_comp _ _ _ GG _ _))).
Defined.


B₁, B₂, B₃: bicat
F₁, F₂: psfunctor B₁ B₂
G: psfunctor B₂ B₃
η: pstrans F₁ F₂
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
D₃: disp_bicat B₃
FF₁: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁
FF₂: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂
GG: disp_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G
ηη: disp_pstrans FF₁ FF₂ η
is_disp_pstrans
  (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ G D₁ D₂ D₃ FF₁ GG)
  (disp_pseudo_comp F₂ G D₁ D₂ D₃ FF₂ GG) (G ◅ η)
  disp_left_whisker_data


B₁, B₂, B₃: bicat
F₁, F₂: psfunctor B₁ B₂
G: psfunctor B₂ B₃
η: pstrans F₁ F₂
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
D₃: disp_bicat B₃
FF₁: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁
FF₂: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂
GG: disp_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G
ηη: disp_pstrans FF₁ FF₂ η
is_disp_pstrans
  (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ G D₁ D₂ D₃ FF₁ GG)
  (disp_pseudo_comp F₂ G D₁ D₂ D₃ FF₂ GG) (G ◅ η)
  disp_left_whisker_data

  
B₁, B₂, B₃: bicat
F₁, F₂: psfunctor B₁ B₂
G: psfunctor B₂ B₃
η: pstrans F₁ F₂
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
D₃: disp_bicat B₃
FF₁: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁
FF₂: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂
GG: disp_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G
ηη: disp_pstrans FF₁ FF₂ η
is_pstrans
  (total_pstrans_data
     (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ G D₁ D₂ D₃ FF₁ GG)
     (disp_pseudo_comp F₂ G D₁ D₂ D₃ FF₂ GG) (G ◅ η)
     disp_left_whisker_data)

  
B₁, B₂, B₃: bicat
F₁, F₂: psfunctor B₁ B₂
G: psfunctor B₂ B₃
η: pstrans F₁ F₂
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
D₃: disp_bicat B₃
FF₁: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁
FF₂: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂
GG: disp_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G
ηη: disp_pstrans FF₁ FF₂ η
PP:= total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G GG
◅ total_pstrans FF₁ FF₂ η ηη: pstrans
  (comp_psfunctor (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G GG)
     (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁))
  (comp_psfunctor (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G GG)
     (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂))
is_pstrans
  (total_pstrans_data
     (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ G D₁ D₂ D₃ FF₁ GG)
     (disp_pseudo_comp F₂ G D₁ D₂ D₃ FF₂ GG) (G ◅ η)
     disp_left_whisker_data)

  
B₁, B₂, B₃: bicat
F₁, F₂: psfunctor B₁ B₂
G: psfunctor B₂ B₃
η: pstrans F₁ F₂
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
D₃: disp_bicat B₃
FF₁: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁
FF₂: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂
GG: disp_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G
ηη: disp_pstrans FF₁ FF₂ η
PP:= total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G GG
◅ total_pstrans FF₁ FF₂ η ηη: pstrans
  (comp_psfunctor (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G GG)
     (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁))
  (comp_psfunctor (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G GG)
     (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂))
PP2:= pstrans_to_is_pstrans PP: is_pstrans (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)
is_pstrans
  (total_pstrans_data
     (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ G D₁ D₂ D₃ FF₁ GG)
     (disp_pseudo_comp F₂ G D₁ D₂ D₃ FF₂ GG) (G ◅ η)
     disp_left_whisker_data)

B₁, B₂, B₃: bicat
F₁, F₂: psfunctor B₁ B₂
G: psfunctor B₂ B₃
η: pstrans F₁ F₂
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
D₃: disp_bicat B₃
FF₁: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁
FF₂: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂
GG: disp_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G
ηη: disp_pstrans FF₁ FF₂ η
PP:= total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G GG
◅ total_pstrans FF₁ FF₂ η ηη: pstrans
  (comp_psfunctor (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G GG)
     (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁))
  (comp_psfunctor (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G GG)
     (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂))
PP2:= pstrans_to_is_pstrans PP: is_pstrans (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)
pr1 (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP) =
pr1
  (total_pstrans_data
     (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ G D₁ D₂ D₃ FF₁ GG)
     (disp_pseudo_comp F₂ G D₁ D₂ D₃ FF₂ GG) (G ◅ η)
     disp_left_whisker_data)
B₁, B₂, B₃: bicat
F₁, F₂: psfunctor B₁ B₂
G: psfunctor B₂ B₃
η: pstrans F₁ F₂
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
D₃: disp_bicat B₃
FF₁: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁
FF₂: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂
GG: disp_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G
ηη: disp_pstrans FF₁ FF₂ η
PP:= total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G GG
◅ total_pstrans FF₁ FF₂ η ηη: pstrans
  (comp_psfunctor (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G GG)
     (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁))
  (comp_psfunctor (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G GG)
     (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂))
PP2:= pstrans_to_is_pstrans PP: is_pstrans (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr2
        (let X :=
           pr1
             (comp_psfunctor
                (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G GG)
                (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)) in
         let X0 := pr1 X in X0))
     (pr2
        (let X :=
           pr1
             (comp_psfunctor
                (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G GG)
                (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂)) in
         let X0 := pr1 X in X0))) ?p
  (pr2 (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)) =
pr2
  (total_pstrans_data
     (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ G D₁ D₂ D₃ FF₁ GG)
     (disp_pseudo_comp F₂ G D₁ D₂ D₃ FF₂ GG) (G ◅ η)
     disp_left_whisker_data)

B₁, B₂, B₃: bicat
F₁, F₂: psfunctor B₁ B₂
G: psfunctor B₂ B₃
η: pstrans F₁ F₂
D₁: disp_bicat B₁

FF₂: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂

     (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁))

  (mor_disp
     (pr2
        (let X :=
           pr1
             (comp_psfunctor
                (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G GG)
                (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)) in
         let X0 := pr1 X in X0))
     (pr2
        (let X :=
           pr1
             (comp_psfunctor
                (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G GG)
                (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂)) in
         let X0 := pr1 X in X0)))
  (idpath
     (pr1
        (total_pstrans_data
           (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ G D₁ D₂ D₃ FF₁ GG)
           (disp_pseudo_comp F₂ G D₁ D₂ D₃ FF₂ GG)
           (G ◅ η) disp_left_whisker_data)))
  (pr2 (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)) =
pr2
  (total_pstrans_data
     (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ G D₁ D₂ D₃ FF₁ GG)
     (disp_pseudo_comp F₂ G D₁ D₂ D₃ FF₂ GG) (G ◅ η)
     disp_left_whisker_data)

     (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ G D₁ D₂ D₃ FF₁ GG)
