        (total_pstrans_data
           (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ G D₁ D₂ D₃ FF₁ GG)
           (disp_pseudo_comp F₂ G D₁ D₂ D₃ FF₂ GG)
           (G ◅ η) disp_left_whisker_data)))
  (pr2 (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)) x y f =
pr2
  (total_pstrans_data
     (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ G D₁ D₂ D₃ FF₁ GG)
     (disp_pseudo_comp F₂ G D₁ D₂ D₃ FF₂ GG) (G ◅ η)
     disp_left_whisker_data) x y f

      
B₁, B₂, B₃: bicat
F₁, F₂: psfunctor B₁ B₂
G: psfunctor B₂ B₃
η: pstrans F₁ F₂
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
D₃: disp_bicat B₃
FF₁: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁
FF₂: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂
GG: disp_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G
ηη: disp_pstrans FF₁ FF₂ η
PP:= total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G GG
◅ total_pstrans FF₁ FF₂ η ηη: pstrans
  (comp_psfunctor (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G GG)
     (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁))
  (comp_psfunctor (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G GG)
     (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂))
PP2:= pstrans_to_is_pstrans PP: is_pstrans (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)
x, y: total_bicat D₁
f: total_bicat D₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
isPredicate is_invertible_2cell
B₁, B₂, B₃: bicat
F₁, F₂: psfunctor B₁ B₂
G: psfunctor B₂ B₃
η: pstrans F₁ F₂
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
D₃: disp_bicat B₃
FF₁: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁
FF₂: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂
GG: disp_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G
ηη: disp_pstrans FF₁ FF₂ η
PP:= total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G GG
◅ total_pstrans FF₁ FF₂ η ηη: pstrans
  (comp_psfunctor (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G GG)
     (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁))
  (comp_psfunctor (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G GG)
     (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂))
PP2:= pstrans_to_is_pstrans PP: is_pstrans (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)
x, y: total_bicat D₁
f: total_bicat D₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr1
  (transportf
     (mor_disp
        (pr2
           (let X :=
              pr1
                (comp_psfunctor
                   (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G GG)
                   (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)) in
            let X0 := pr1 X in X0))
        (pr2
           (let X :=
              pr1
                (comp_psfunctor
                   (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G GG)
                   (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂)) in
            let X0 := pr1 X in X0)))
     (idpath
        (pr1
           (total_pstrans_data
              (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ G D₁ D₂ D₃ FF₁ GG)
              (disp_pseudo_comp F₂ G D₁ D₂ D₃ FF₂ GG)
              (G ◅ η) disp_left_whisker_data)))
     (pr2 (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)) x y f) =
pr1
  (pr2
     (total_pstrans_data
        (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ G D₁ D₂ D₃ FF₁ GG)
        (disp_pseudo_comp F₂ G D₁ D₂ D₃ FF₂ GG)
        (G ◅ η) disp_left_whisker_data) x y f)

      
B₁, B₂, B₃: bicat
F₁, F₂: psfunctor B₁ B₂
G: psfunctor B₂ B₃
η: pstrans F₁ F₂
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
D₃: disp_bicat B₃
FF₁: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁
FF₂: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂
GG: disp_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G
ηη: disp_pstrans FF₁ FF₂ η
PP:= total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G GG
◅ total_pstrans FF₁ FF₂ η ηη: pstrans
  (comp_psfunctor (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G GG)
     (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁))
  (comp_psfunctor (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G GG)
     (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂))
PP2:= pstrans_to_is_pstrans PP: is_pstrans (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)
x, y: total_bicat D₁
f: total_bicat D₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
isPredicate is_invertible_2cell
 
B₁, B₂, B₃: bicat
F₁, F₂: psfunctor B₁ B₂
G: psfunctor B₂ B₃
η: pstrans F₁ F₂
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
D₃: disp_bicat B₃
FF₁: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁
FF₂: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂
GG: disp_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G
ηη: disp_pstrans FF₁ FF₂ η
PP:= total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G GG
◅ total_pstrans FF₁ FF₂ η ηη: pstrans
  (comp_psfunctor (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G GG)
     (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁))
  (comp_psfunctor (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G GG)
     (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂))
PP2:= pstrans_to_is_pstrans PP: is_pstrans (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)
x, y: total_bicat D₁
f: total_bicat D₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
x0: pr1
  (total_pstrans_data
     (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ G D₁ D₂ D₃ FF₁ GG)
     (disp_pseudo_comp F₂ G D₁ D₂ D₃ FF₂ GG)
     (G ◅ η) disp_left_whisker_data) x
· pr2
    (let X :=
       pr1
         (comp_psfunctor
            (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G GG)
            (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂)) in
     let X0 := pr1 X in X0) x y f ==>
pr2
  (let X :=
     pr1
       (comp_psfunctor
          (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G GG)
          (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)) in
   let X0 := pr1 X in X0) x y f
· pr1
    (total_pstrans_data
       (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ G D₁ D₂ D₃ FF₁ GG)
       (disp_pseudo_comp F₂ G D₁ D₂ D₃ FF₂ GG)
       (G ◅ η) disp_left_whisker_data) y
isaprop (is_invertible_2cell x0)
 apply isaprop_is_invertible_2cell. 
B₁, B₂, B₃: bicat
F₁, F₂: psfunctor B₁ B₂
G: psfunctor B₂ B₃
η: pstrans F₁ F₂
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
D₃: disp_bicat B₃
FF₁: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁
FF₂: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂
GG: disp_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G
ηη: disp_pstrans FF₁ FF₂ η
PP:= total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G GG
◅ total_pstrans FF₁ FF₂ η ηη: pstrans
  (comp_psfunctor (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G GG)
     (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁))
  (comp_psfunctor (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G GG)
     (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂))
PP2:= pstrans_to_is_pstrans PP: is_pstrans (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)
x, y: total_bicat D₁
f: total_bicat D₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr1
  (transportf
     (mor_disp
        (pr2
           (let X :=
              pr1
                (comp_psfunctor
                   (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G GG)
                   (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)) in
            let X0 := pr1 X in X0))
        (pr2
           (let X :=
              pr1
                (comp_psfunctor
                   (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G GG)
                   (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂)) in
            let X0 := pr1 X in X0)))
     (idpath
        (pr1
           (total_pstrans_data
              (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ G D₁ D₂ D₃ FF₁ GG)
              (disp_pseudo_comp F₂ G D₁ D₂ D₃ FF₂ GG)
              (G ◅ η) disp_left_whisker_data)))
     (pr2 (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)) x y f) =
pr1
  (pr2
     (total_pstrans_data
        (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ G D₁ D₂ D₃ FF₁ GG)
        (disp_pseudo_comp F₂ G D₁ D₂ D₃ FF₂ GG)
        (G ◅ η) disp_left_whisker_data) x y f)

      apply idpath.
  
B₁, B₂, B₃: bicat
F₁, F₂: psfunctor B₁ B₂
G: psfunctor B₂ B₃
η: pstrans F₁ F₂
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
D₃: disp_bicat B₃
FF₁: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁
FF₂: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂
GG: disp_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G
ηη: disp_pstrans FF₁ FF₂ η
PP:= total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G GG
◅ total_pstrans FF₁ FF₂ η ηη: pstrans
  (comp_psfunctor (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G GG)
     (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁))
  (comp_psfunctor (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G GG)
     (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₂ FF₂))
PP2:= pstrans_to_is_pstrans PP: is_pstrans (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)
X: pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP =
total_pstrans_data
  (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ G D₁ D₂ D₃ FF₁ GG)
  (disp_pseudo_comp F₂ G D₁ D₂ D₃ FF₂ GG) (G ◅ η)
  disp_left_whisker_data
is_pstrans
  (total_pstrans_data
     (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ G D₁ D₂ D₃ FF₁ GG)
     (disp_pseudo_comp F₂ G D₁ D₂ D₃ FF₂ GG) (G ◅ η)
     disp_left_whisker_data)
 exact (transportf is_pstrans X PP2). (* Slow, dunno why *)
Qed.

Definition disp_left_whisker
  : disp_pstrans
      (disp_pseudo_comp _ _ _ _ _ FF₁ GG)
      (disp_pseudo_comp _ _ _ _ _ FF₂ GG)
      (G ◅ η)
  := disp_left_whisker_data,, disp_left_whisker_laws.

End DispTrans_lwhisker.

Section DispTrans_rwhisker.

Context {B₁ B₂ B₃ : bicat}
        {F : psfunctor B₁ B₂}
        {G₁ G₂ : psfunctor B₂ B₃}
        {η : pstrans G₁ G₂}
        {D₁ : disp_bicat B₁}
        {D₂ : disp_bicat B₂}
        {D₃ : disp_bicat B₃}
        (FF : disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F)
        {GG₁ : disp_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G₁}
        {GG₂ : disp_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G₂}
        (ηη : disp_pstrans GG₁ GG₂ η).


B₁, B₂, B₃: bicat
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
G₁, G₂: psfunctor B₂ B₃
η: pstrans G₁ G₂
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
D₃: disp_bicat B₃
FF: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F
GG₁: disp_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G₁
GG₂: disp_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G₂
ηη: disp_pstrans GG₁ GG₂ η
disp_pstrans_data
  (disp_pseudo_comp F G₁ D₁ D₂ D₃ FF GG₁)
  (disp_pseudo_comp F G₂ D₁ D₂ D₃ FF GG₂) (η ▻ F)


B₁, B₂, B₃: bicat
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
G₁, G₂: psfunctor B₂ B₃
η: pstrans G₁ G₂
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
D₃: disp_bicat B₃
FF: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F
GG₁: disp_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G₁
GG₂: disp_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G₂
ηη: disp_pstrans GG₁ GG₂ η
disp_pstrans_data
  (disp_pseudo_comp F G₁ D₁ D₂ D₃ FF GG₁)
  (disp_pseudo_comp F G₂ D₁ D₂ D₃ FF GG₂) (η ▻ F)

  
B₁, B₂, B₃: bicat
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
G₁, G₂: psfunctor B₂ B₃
η: pstrans G₁ G₂
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
D₃: disp_bicat B₃
FF: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F
GG₁: disp_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G₁
GG₂: disp_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G₂
ηη: disp_pstrans GG₁ GG₂ η
∏ (x : B₁) (xx : D₁ x),
GG₁ (F x) (FF x xx) -->[ η (F x)] GG₂ (F x) (FF x xx)
B₁, B₂, B₃: bicat
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
G₁, G₂: psfunctor B₂ B₃
η: pstrans G₁ G₂
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
D₃: disp_bicat B₃
FF: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F
GG₁: disp_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G₁
GG₂: disp_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G₂
ηη: disp_pstrans GG₁ GG₂ η
∏ (x y : B₁) (f : B₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧) (xx : D₁ x) (yy : D₁ y)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy),
disp_invertible_2cell (psnaturality_of η (# F f))
  (?Goal x xx ;; ♯ GG₂ (♯ FF ff))
  (♯ GG₁ (♯ FF ff) ;; ?Goal y yy)

  
B₁, B₂, B₃: bicat
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
G₁, G₂: psfunctor B₂ B₃
η: pstrans G₁ G₂
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
D₃: disp_bicat B₃
FF: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F
GG₁: disp_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G₁
GG₂: disp_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G₂
ηη: disp_pstrans GG₁ GG₂ η
∏ (x : B₁) (xx : D₁ x),
GG₁ (F x) (FF x xx) -->[ η (F x)] GG₂ (F x) (FF x xx)
 exact (λ x xx, (pr11 ηη _ (FF _ xx))).
  
B₁, B₂, B₃: bicat
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
G₁, G₂: psfunctor B₂ B₃
η: pstrans G₁ G₂
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
D₃: disp_bicat B₃
FF: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F
GG₁: disp_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G₁
GG₂: disp_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G₂
ηη: disp_pstrans GG₁ GG₂ η
∏ (x y : B₁) (f : B₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧) (xx : D₁ x) (yy : D₁ y)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy),
disp_invertible_2cell (psnaturality_of η (# F f))
  ((λ (x0 : B₁) (xx0 : D₁ x0),
    (pr11 ηη) (F x0) (FF x0 xx0)) x xx ;; ♯ GG₂
                                            (♯ FF ff))
  (♯ GG₁ (♯ FF ff) ;; (λ (x0 : B₁) (xx0 : D₁ x0),
                       (pr11 ηη) (F x0) (FF x0 xx0)) y
                        yy)
 exact (λ x y f xx yy ff, disp_psnaturality_of _ _ _ ηη (pr121 FF _ _ _ _ _ ff)).
Defined.


B₁, B₂, B₃: bicat
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
G₁, G₂: psfunctor B₂ B₃
η: pstrans G₁ G₂
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
D₃: disp_bicat B₃
FF: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F
GG₁: disp_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G₁
GG₂: disp_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G₂
ηη: disp_pstrans GG₁ GG₂ η
is_disp_pstrans
  (disp_pseudo_comp F G₁ D₁ D₂ D₃ FF GG₁)
  (disp_pseudo_comp F G₂ D₁ D₂ D₃ FF GG₂) (η ▻ F)
  disp_right_whisker_data


B₁, B₂, B₃: bicat
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
G₁, G₂: psfunctor B₂ B₃
η: pstrans G₁ G₂
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
D₃: disp_bicat B₃
FF: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F
GG₁: disp_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G₁
GG₂: disp_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G₂
ηη: disp_pstrans GG₁ GG₂ η
is_disp_pstrans
  (disp_pseudo_comp F G₁ D₁ D₂ D₃ FF GG₁)
  (disp_pseudo_comp F G₂ D₁ D₂ D₃ FF GG₂) (η ▻ F)
  disp_right_whisker_data

  
B₁, B₂, B₃: bicat
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
G₁, G₂: psfunctor B₂ B₃
η: pstrans G₁ G₂
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
D₃: disp_bicat B₃
FF: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F
GG₁: disp_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G₁
GG₂: disp_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G₂
ηη: disp_pstrans GG₁ GG₂ η
is_pstrans
  (total_pstrans_data
     (disp_pseudo_comp F G₁ D₁ D₂ D₃ FF GG₁)
     (disp_pseudo_comp F G₂ D₁ D₂ D₃ FF GG₂) (η ▻ F)
     disp_right_whisker_data)

  
B₁, B₂, B₃: bicat
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
G₁, G₂: psfunctor B₂ B₃
η: pstrans G₁ G₂
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
D₃: disp_bicat B₃
FF: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F
GG₁: disp_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G₁
GG₂: disp_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G₂
ηη: disp_pstrans GG₁ GG₂ η
PP:= total_pstrans GG₁ GG₂ η ηη
▻ total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF: pstrans
  (comp_psfunctor (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G₁ GG₁)
     (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF))
  (comp_psfunctor (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G₂ GG₂)
     (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF))
is_pstrans
  (total_pstrans_data
     (disp_pseudo_comp F G₁ D₁ D₂ D₃ FF GG₁)
     (disp_pseudo_comp F G₂ D₁ D₂ D₃ FF GG₂) (η ▻ F)
     disp_right_whisker_data)

  
B₁, B₂, B₃: bicat
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
G₁, G₂: psfunctor B₂ B₃
η: pstrans G₁ G₂
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
D₃: disp_bicat B₃
FF: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F
GG₁: disp_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G₁
GG₂: disp_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G₂
ηη: disp_pstrans GG₁ GG₂ η
PP:= total_pstrans GG₁ GG₂ η ηη
▻ total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF: pstrans
  (comp_psfunctor (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G₁ GG₁)
     (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF))
  (comp_psfunctor (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G₂ GG₂)
     (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF))
PP2:= pstrans_to_is_pstrans PP: is_pstrans (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)
is_pstrans
  (total_pstrans_data
     (disp_pseudo_comp F G₁ D₁ D₂ D₃ FF GG₁)
     (disp_pseudo_comp F G₂ D₁ D₂ D₃ FF GG₂) (η ▻ F)
     disp_right_whisker_data)

  
B₁, B₂, B₃: bicat
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
G₁, G₂: psfunctor B₂ B₃
η: pstrans G₁ G₂
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
D₃: disp_bicat B₃
FF: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F
GG₁: disp_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G₁
GG₂: disp_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G₂
ηη: disp_pstrans GG₁ GG₂ η
PP:= total_pstrans GG₁ GG₂ η ηη
▻ total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF: pstrans
  (comp_psfunctor (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G₁ GG₁)
     (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF))
  (comp_psfunctor (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G₂ GG₂)
     (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF))
PP2:= pstrans_to_is_pstrans PP: is_pstrans (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)
pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP =
total_pstrans_data
  (disp_pseudo_comp F G₁ D₁ D₂ D₃ FF GG₁)
  (disp_pseudo_comp F G₂ D₁ D₂ D₃ FF GG₂) (η ▻ F)
  disp_right_whisker_data
B₁, B₂, B₃: bicat
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
G₁, G₂: psfunctor B₂ B₃
η: pstrans G₁ G₂
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
D₃: disp_bicat B₃
FF: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F
GG₁: disp_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G₁
GG₂: disp_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G₂
ηη: disp_pstrans GG₁ GG₂ η
PP:= total_pstrans GG₁ GG₂ η ηη
▻ total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF: pstrans
  (comp_psfunctor (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G₁ GG₁)
     (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF))
  (comp_psfunctor (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G₂ GG₂)
     (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF))
PP2:= pstrans_to_is_pstrans PP: is_pstrans (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)
X: pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP =
total_pstrans_data
  (disp_pseudo_comp F G₁ D₁ D₂ D₃ FF GG₁)
  (disp_pseudo_comp F G₂ D₁ D₂ D₃ FF GG₂) (η ▻ F)
  disp_right_whisker_data
is_pstrans
  (total_pstrans_data
     (disp_pseudo_comp F G₁ D₁ D₂ D₃ FF GG₁)
     (disp_pseudo_comp F G₂ D₁ D₂ D₃ FF GG₂) (η ▻ F)
     disp_right_whisker_data)

  
B₁, B₂, B₃: bicat
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
G₁, G₂: psfunctor B₂ B₃
η: pstrans G₁ G₂
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
D₃: disp_bicat B₃
FF: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F
GG₁: disp_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G₁
GG₂: disp_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G₂
ηη: disp_pstrans GG₁ GG₂ η
PP:= total_pstrans GG₁ GG₂ η ηη
▻ total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF: pstrans
  (comp_psfunctor (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G₁ GG₁)
     (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF))
  (comp_psfunctor (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G₂ GG₂)
     (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF))

pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP =
total_pstrans_data
  (disp_pseudo_comp F G₁ D₁ D₂ D₃ FF GG₁)
  (disp_pseudo_comp F G₂ D₁ D₂ D₃ FF GG₂) (η ▻ F)
  disp_right_whisker_data
 
B₁, B₂, B₃: bicat
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
G₁, G₂: psfunctor B₂ B₃
η: pstrans G₁ G₂
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
D₃: disp_bicat B₃
FF: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F
GG₁: disp_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G₁
GG₂: disp_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G₂
ηη: disp_pstrans GG₁ GG₂ η
PP:= total_pstrans GG₁ GG₂ η ηη
▻ total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF: pstrans
  (comp_psfunctor (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G₁ GG₁)
     (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF))
  (comp_psfunctor (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G₂ GG₂)
     (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF))
PP2:= pstrans_to_is_pstrans PP: is_pstrans (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)
pr1 (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP) =
pr1
  (total_pstrans_data
     (disp_pseudo_comp F G₁ D₁ D₂ D₃ FF GG₁)
     (disp_pseudo_comp F G₂ D₁ D₂ D₃ FF GG₂) (η ▻ F)
     disp_right_whisker_data)
B₁, B₂, B₃: bicat
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
G₁, G₂: psfunctor B₂ B₃
η: pstrans G₁ G₂
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
D₃: disp_bicat B₃
FF: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F
GG₁: disp_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G₁
GG₂: disp_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G₂
ηη: disp_pstrans GG₁ GG₂ η
PP:= total_pstrans GG₁ GG₂ η ηη
▻ total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF: pstrans
  (comp_psfunctor (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G₁ GG₁)
     (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF))
  (comp_psfunctor (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G₂ GG₂)
     (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF))
PP2:= pstrans_to_is_pstrans PP: is_pstrans (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr2
        (let X :=
           pr1
             (comp_psfunctor
                (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G₁ GG₁)
                (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)) in
         let X0 := pr1 X in X0))
     (pr2
        (let X :=
           pr1
             (comp_psfunctor
                (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G₂ GG₂)
                (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)) in
         let X0 := pr1 X in X0))) ?p
  (pr2 (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)) =
pr2
  (total_pstrans_data
     (disp_pseudo_comp F G₁ D₁ D₂ D₃ FF GG₁)
     (disp_pseudo_comp F G₂ D₁ D₂ D₃ FF GG₂) (η ▻ F)
     disp_right_whisker_data)

  (mor_disp
     (pr2

           pr1
             (comp_psfunctor

pr2

     (disp_pseudo_comp F G₁ D₁ D₂ D₃ FF GG₁)
     (disp_pseudo_comp F G₂ D₁ D₂ D₃ FF GG₂) (η ▻ F)
     disp_right_whisker_data)

x: total_bicat D₁
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr2
        (let X :=
           pr1
             (comp_psfunctor
                (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G₁ GG₁)

  (pr2 (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)) x =

     (disp_pseudo_comp F G₁ D₁ D₂ D₃ FF GG₁)
     (disp_pseudo_comp F G₂ D₁ D₂ D₃ FF GG₂) (η ▻ F)
     disp_right_whisker_data) x

  (comp_psfunctor (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G₁ GG₁)

x, y: total_bicat D₁
f: total_bicat D₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr2
        (let X :=
           pr1
             (comp_psfunctor
                (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G₁ GG₁)
                (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)) in
         let X0 := pr1 X in X0))
     (pr2

           (η ▻ F) disp_right_whisker_data)))
  (pr2 (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)) x y f =
pr2
  (total_pstrans_data
     (disp_pseudo_comp F G₁ D₁ D₂ D₃ FF GG₁)
     (disp_pseudo_comp F G₂ D₁ D₂ D₃ FF GG₂) (η ▻ F)
     disp_right_whisker_data) x y f

f: total_bicat D₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
isPredicate is_invertible_2cell

F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
G₁, G₂: psfunctor B₂ B₃
η: pstrans G₁ G₂
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
D₃: disp_bicat B₃

GG₁: disp_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G₁
GG₂: disp_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G₂
ηη: disp_pstrans GG₁ GG₂ η
PP:= total_pstrans GG₁ GG₂ η ηη
▻ total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF: pstrans
  (comp_psfunctor (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G₁ GG₁)
     (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF))
  (comp_psfunctor (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G₂ GG₂)
     (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF))
PP2:= pstrans_to_is_pstrans PP: is_pstrans (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)
x, y: total_bicat D₁
f: total_bicat D₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr1
  (transportf
     (mor_disp
        (pr2
           (let X :=
              pr1
                (comp_psfunctor
                   (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G₁ GG₁)
                   (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)) in
            let X0 := pr1 X in X0))
        (pr2
           (let X :=
              pr1
                (comp_psfunctor
                   (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G₂ GG₂)
                   (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)) in
            let X0 := pr1 X in X0)))
     (idpath
        (pr1
           (total_pstrans_data
              (disp_pseudo_comp F G₁ D₁ D₂ D₃ FF GG₁)
              (disp_pseudo_comp F G₂ D₁ D₂ D₃ FF GG₂)
              (η ▻ F) disp_right_whisker_data)))
     (pr2 (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)) x y f) =
pr1
  (pr2
     (total_pstrans_data
        (disp_pseudo_comp F G₁ D₁ D₂ D₃ FF GG₁)
        (disp_pseudo_comp F G₂ D₁ D₂ D₃ FF GG₂)
        (η ▻ F) disp_right_whisker_data) x y f)

      
B₁, B₂, B₃: bicat
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
G₁, G₂: psfunctor B₂ B₃
η: pstrans G₁ G₂
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
D₃: disp_bicat B₃
FF: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F
GG₁: disp_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G₁
GG₂: disp_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G₂
ηη: disp_pstrans GG₁ GG₂ η
PP:= total_pstrans GG₁ GG₂ η ηη
▻ total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF: pstrans
  (comp_psfunctor (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G₁ GG₁)
     (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF))
  (comp_psfunctor (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G₂ GG₂)
     (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF))
PP2:= pstrans_to_is_pstrans PP: is_pstrans (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)
x, y: total_bicat D₁
f: total_bicat D₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
isPredicate is_invertible_2cell
 
B₁, B₂, B₃: bicat
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
G₁, G₂: psfunctor B₂ B₃
η: pstrans G₁ G₂
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
D₃: disp_bicat B₃
FF: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F
GG₁: disp_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G₁
GG₂: disp_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G₂
ηη: disp_pstrans GG₁ GG₂ η
PP:= total_pstrans GG₁ GG₂ η ηη
▻ total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF: pstrans
  (comp_psfunctor (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G₁ GG₁)
     (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF))
  (comp_psfunctor (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G₂ GG₂)
     (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF))
PP2:= pstrans_to_is_pstrans PP: is_pstrans (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)
x, y: total_bicat D₁
f: total_bicat D₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
x0: pr1
  (total_pstrans_data
     (disp_pseudo_comp F G₁ D₁ D₂ D₃ FF GG₁)
     (disp_pseudo_comp F G₂ D₁ D₂ D₃ FF GG₂)
     (η ▻ F) disp_right_whisker_data) x
· pr2
    (let X :=
       pr1
         (comp_psfunctor
            (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G₂ GG₂)
            (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)) in
     let X0 := pr1 X in X0) x y f ==>
pr2
  (let X :=
     pr1
       (comp_psfunctor
          (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G₁ GG₁)
          (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)) in
   let X0 := pr1 X in X0) x y f
· pr1
    (total_pstrans_data
       (disp_pseudo_comp F G₁ D₁ D₂ D₃ FF GG₁)
       (disp_pseudo_comp F G₂ D₁ D₂ D₃ FF GG₂)
       (η ▻ F) disp_right_whisker_data) y
isaprop (is_invertible_2cell x0)
 apply isaprop_is_invertible_2cell. 
B₁, B₂, B₃: bicat
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
G₁, G₂: psfunctor B₂ B₃
η: pstrans G₁ G₂
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
D₃: disp_bicat B₃
FF: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F
GG₁: disp_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G₁
GG₂: disp_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G₂
ηη: disp_pstrans GG₁ GG₂ η
PP:= total_pstrans GG₁ GG₂ η ηη
▻ total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF: pstrans
  (comp_psfunctor (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G₁ GG₁)
     (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF))
  (comp_psfunctor (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G₂ GG₂)
     (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF))
PP2:= pstrans_to_is_pstrans PP: is_pstrans (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)
x, y: total_bicat D₁
f: total_bicat D₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr1
  (transportf
     (mor_disp
        (pr2
           (let X :=
              pr1
                (comp_psfunctor
                   (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G₁ GG₁)
                   (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)) in
            let X0 := pr1 X in X0))
        (pr2
           (let X :=
              pr1
                (comp_psfunctor
                   (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G₂ GG₂)
                   (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)) in
            let X0 := pr1 X in X0)))
     (idpath
        (pr1
           (total_pstrans_data
              (disp_pseudo_comp F G₁ D₁ D₂ D₃ FF GG₁)
              (disp_pseudo_comp F G₂ D₁ D₂ D₃ FF GG₂)
              (η ▻ F) disp_right_whisker_data)))
     (pr2 (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)) x y f) =
pr1
  (pr2
     (total_pstrans_data
        (disp_pseudo_comp F G₁ D₁ D₂ D₃ FF GG₁)
        (disp_pseudo_comp F G₂ D₁ D₂ D₃ FF GG₂)
        (η ▻ F) disp_right_whisker_data) x y f)

      
B₁, B₂, B₃: bicat
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
G₁, G₂: psfunctor B₂ B₃
η: pstrans G₁ G₂
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
D₃: disp_bicat B₃
FF: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F
GG₁: disp_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G₁
GG₂: disp_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G₂
ηη: disp_pstrans GG₁ GG₂ η
PP:= total_pstrans GG₁ GG₂ η ηη
▻ total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF: pstrans
  (comp_psfunctor (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G₁ GG₁)
     (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF))
  (comp_psfunctor (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G₂ GG₂)
     (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF))
PP2:= pstrans_to_is_pstrans PP: is_pstrans (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)
x, y: total_bicat D₁
f: total_bicat D₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr1
  ((pr211 η) ((pr111 F) (pr1 x)) ((pr111 F) (pr1 y))
     ((pr211 F) (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 f))),,
pr1
  ((pr21 ηη) ((pr111 F) (pr1 x)) ((pr111 F) (pr1 y))
     ((pr211 F) (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 f))
     ((pr11 FF) (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     ((pr11 FF) (pr1 y) (pr2 y))
     ((pr121 FF) (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 f) (pr2 x)
        (pr2 y) (pr2 f))) =
pr1
  ((pr211 η) ((pr111 F) (pr1 x)) ((pr111 F) (pr1 y))
     ((pr211 F) (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 f))),,
pr1
  ((pr21 ηη) ((pr111 F) (pr1 x)) ((pr111 F) (pr1 y))
     ((pr211 F) (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 f))
     ((pr11 FF) (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
     ((pr11 FF) (pr1 y) (pr2 y))
     ((pr121 FF) (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 f) (pr2 x)
        (pr2 y) (pr2 f)))

      apply idpath.
  
B₁, B₂, B₃: bicat
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
G₁, G₂: psfunctor B₂ B₃
η: pstrans G₁ G₂
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
D₃: disp_bicat B₃
FF: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F
GG₁: disp_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G₁
GG₂: disp_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G₂
ηη: disp_pstrans GG₁ GG₂ η
PP:= total_pstrans GG₁ GG₂ η ηη
▻ total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF: pstrans
  (comp_psfunctor (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G₁ GG₁)
     (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF))
  (comp_psfunctor (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ G₂ GG₂)
     (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF))
PP2:= pstrans_to_is_pstrans PP: is_pstrans (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)
X: pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP =
total_pstrans_data
  (disp_pseudo_comp F G₁ D₁ D₂ D₃ FF GG₁)
  (disp_pseudo_comp F G₂ D₁ D₂ D₃ FF GG₂) (η ▻ F)
  disp_right_whisker_data
is_pstrans
  (total_pstrans_data
     (disp_pseudo_comp F G₁ D₁ D₂ D₃ FF GG₁)
     (disp_pseudo_comp F G₂ D₁ D₂ D₃ FF GG₂) (η ▻ F)
     disp_right_whisker_data)
 exact (transportf is_pstrans X PP2). (* Also slow, dunno why *)
Qed.

Definition disp_right_whisker
  : disp_pstrans
      (disp_pseudo_comp _ _ _ _ _ FF GG₁)
      (disp_pseudo_comp _ _ _ _ _ FF GG₂)
      (η ▻ F)
  := disp_right_whisker_data,, disp_right_whisker_laws.

End DispTrans_rwhisker.

Section DispTransUnitality.
Context {B₁ B₂ : bicat}
        {F : psfunctor B₁ B₂}
        {D₁ : disp_bicat B₁}
        {D₂ : disp_bicat B₂}
        (FF : disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F).


B₁, B₂: bicat
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
FF: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F
disp_pstrans_data
  (disp_pseudo_comp F (id_psfunctor B₂) D₁ D₂ D₂ FF
     (disp_pseudo_id D₂)) FF (lunitor_pstrans F)


B₁, B₂: bicat
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
FF: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F
disp_pstrans_data
  (disp_pseudo_comp F (id_psfunctor B₂) D₁ D₂ D₂ FF
     (disp_pseudo_id D₂)) FF (lunitor_pstrans F)

  
B₁, B₂: bicat
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
FF: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F
∏ (x : B₁) (xx : D₁ x),
disp_pseudo_comp F (id_psfunctor B₂) D₁ D₂ D₂ FF
  (disp_pseudo_id D₂) x xx -->[
lunitor_pstrans F x] FF x xx
B₁, B₂: bicat
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
FF: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F
∏ (x y : B₁) (f : B₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧) (xx : D₁ x) (yy : D₁ y)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy),
disp_invertible_2cell
  (psnaturality_of (lunitor_pstrans F) f)
  (?αα₁ x xx ;; ♯ FF ff)
  (♯ (disp_pseudo_comp F (id_psfunctor B₂) D₁ D₂ D₂ FF
        (disp_pseudo_id D₂)) ff ;; ?αα₁ y yy)

  
B₁, B₂: bicat
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
FF: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F
∏ (x : B₁) (xx : D₁ x),
disp_pseudo_comp F (id_psfunctor B₂) D₁ D₂ D₂ FF
  (disp_pseudo_id D₂) x xx -->[
lunitor_pstrans F x] FF x xx
 exact (λ x xx, id_disp (FF x xx)).
  
B₁, B₂: bicat
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
FF: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F
∏ (x y : B₁) (f : B₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧) (xx : D₁ x) (yy : D₁ y)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy),
disp_invertible_2cell
  (psnaturality_of (lunitor_pstrans F) f)
  ((λ (x0 : B₁) (xx0 : D₁ x0), id_disp (FF x0 xx0)) x
     xx ;; ♯ FF ff)
  (♯ (disp_pseudo_comp F (id_psfunctor B₂) D₁ D₂ D₂ FF
        (disp_pseudo_id D₂)) ff ;; (λ (x0 : B₁)
                                    (xx0 : D₁ x0),
                                    id_disp
                                      (FF x0 xx0)) y
                                     yy)
 
B₁, B₂: bicat
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
FF: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F
∏ (x y : B₁) (f : B₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧) (xx : D₁ x) (yy : D₁ y)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy),
disp_invertible_2cell
  (make_invertible_2cell
     (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
        (is_invertible_2cell_lunitor (# F f))
        (is_invertible_2cell_rinvunitor (# F f))))
  (id_disp (FF x xx) ;; ♯ FF ff)
  (♯ FF ff ;; id_disp (FF y yy))

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
FF: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F
x, y: B₁
f: B₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
disp_invertible_2cell
  (make_invertible_2cell
     (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
        (is_invertible_2cell_lunitor (# F f))
        (is_invertible_2cell_rinvunitor (# F f))))
  (id_disp (FF x xx) ;; ♯ FF ff)
  (♯ FF ff ;; id_disp (FF y yy))

    apply (vcomp_disp_invertible (disp_invertible_2cell_lunitor _)
                                 (disp_invertible_2cell_rinvunitor _)).
Defined.


B₁, B₂: bicat
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
FF: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F
is_disp_pstrans
  (disp_pseudo_comp F (id_psfunctor B₂) D₁ D₂ D₂ FF
     (disp_pseudo_id D₂)) FF (lunitor_pstrans F)
  disp_lunitor_pstrans_data


B₁, B₂: bicat
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
FF: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F
is_disp_pstrans
  (disp_pseudo_comp F (id_psfunctor B₂) D₁ D₂ D₂ FF
     (disp_pseudo_id D₂)) FF (lunitor_pstrans F)
  disp_lunitor_pstrans_data

  
B₁, B₂: bicat
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
FF: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F
is_pstrans
  (total_pstrans_data
     (disp_pseudo_comp F (id_psfunctor B₂) D₁ D₂ D₂ FF
        (disp_pseudo_id D₂)) FF (lunitor_pstrans F)
     disp_lunitor_pstrans_data)

  
B₁, B₂: bicat
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
FF: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F
PP:= lunitor_pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF): pstrans
  (comp_psfunctor (id_psfunctor (total_bicat D₂))
     (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF))
  (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)
is_pstrans
  (total_pstrans_data
     (disp_pseudo_comp F (id_psfunctor B₂) D₁ D₂ D₂ FF
        (disp_pseudo_id D₂)) FF (lunitor_pstrans F)
     disp_lunitor_pstrans_data)

  
B₁, B₂: bicat
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
FF: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F
PP:= lunitor_pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF): pstrans
  (comp_psfunctor (id_psfunctor (total_bicat D₂))
     (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF))
  (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)
PP2:= pstrans_to_is_pstrans PP: is_pstrans (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)
is_pstrans
  (total_pstrans_data
     (disp_pseudo_comp F (id_psfunctor B₂) D₁ D₂ D₂ FF
        (disp_pseudo_id D₂)) FF (lunitor_pstrans F)
     disp_lunitor_pstrans_data)

  
B₁, B₂: bicat
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
FF: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F
PP:= lunitor_pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF): pstrans
  (comp_psfunctor (id_psfunctor (total_bicat D₂))
     (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF))
  (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)
PP2:= pstrans_to_is_pstrans PP: is_pstrans (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)
pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP =
total_pstrans_data
  (disp_pseudo_comp F (id_psfunctor B₂) D₁ D₂ D₂ FF
     (disp_pseudo_id D₂)) FF (lunitor_pstrans F)
  disp_lunitor_pstrans_data
B₁, B₂: bicat
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
FF: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F
PP:= lunitor_pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF): pstrans
  (comp_psfunctor (id_psfunctor (total_bicat D₂))
     (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF))
  (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)
PP2:= pstrans_to_is_pstrans PP: is_pstrans (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)
X: pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP =
total_pstrans_data
  (disp_pseudo_comp F (id_psfunctor B₂) D₁ D₂ D₂
     FF (disp_pseudo_id D₂)) FF
  (lunitor_pstrans F) disp_lunitor_pstrans_data
is_pstrans
  (total_pstrans_data
     (disp_pseudo_comp F (id_psfunctor B₂) D₁ D₂ D₂ FF
        (disp_pseudo_id D₂)) FF (lunitor_pstrans F)
     disp_lunitor_pstrans_data)

  
B₁, B₂: bicat
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
FF: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F
PP:= lunitor_pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF): pstrans
  (comp_psfunctor (id_psfunctor (total_bicat D₂))
     (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF))
  (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)
PP2:= pstrans_to_is_pstrans PP: is_pstrans (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)
pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP =
total_pstrans_data
  (disp_pseudo_comp F (id_psfunctor B₂) D₁ D₂ D₂ FF
     (disp_pseudo_id D₂)) FF (lunitor_pstrans F)
  disp_lunitor_pstrans_data
 
B₁, B₂: bicat
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
FF: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F
PP:= lunitor_pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF): pstrans
  (comp_psfunctor (id_psfunctor (total_bicat D₂))
     (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF))
  (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)
PP2:= pstrans_to_is_pstrans PP: is_pstrans (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)
pr1 (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP) =
pr1
  (total_pstrans_data
     (disp_pseudo_comp F (id_psfunctor B₂) D₁ D₂ D₂ FF
        (disp_pseudo_id D₂)) FF (lunitor_pstrans F)
     disp_lunitor_pstrans_data)
B₁, B₂: bicat
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
FF: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F
PP:= lunitor_pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF): pstrans
  (comp_psfunctor (id_psfunctor (total_bicat D₂))
     (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF))
  (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)
PP2:= pstrans_to_is_pstrans PP: is_pstrans (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr2
        (let X :=
           pr1
             (comp_psfunctor
                (id_psfunctor (total_bicat D₂))
                (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)) in
         let X0 := pr1 X in X0))
     (pr2
        (let X := pr1 (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF) in
         let X0 := pr1 X in X0))) ?p
  (pr2 (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)) =
pr2
  (total_pstrans_data
     (disp_pseudo_comp F (id_psfunctor B₂) D₁ D₂ D₂ FF
        (disp_pseudo_id D₂)) FF (lunitor_pstrans F)
     disp_lunitor_pstrans_data)

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
FF: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F
PP:= lunitor_pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF): pstrans
  (comp_psfunctor (id_psfunctor (total_bicat D₂))
     (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF))
  (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)

pr1 (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP) =
pr1
  (total_pstrans_data
     (disp_pseudo_comp F (id_psfunctor B₂) D₁ D₂ D₂ FF
        (disp_pseudo_id D₂)) FF (lunitor_pstrans F)
     disp_lunitor_pstrans_data)
 apply idpath.

  (mor_disp

                (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)) in

           (lunitor_pstrans F)
           disp_lunitor_pstrans_data)))

pr2
  (total_pstrans_data
     (disp_pseudo_comp F (id_psfunctor B₂) D₁ D₂ D₂ FF
        (disp_pseudo_id D₂)) FF (lunitor_pstrans F)
     disp_lunitor_pstrans_data)

  (comp_psfunctor (id_psfunctor (total_bicat D₂))
     (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF))
  (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)

x, y: total_bicat D₁
f: total_bicat D₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr2
        (let X :=
           pr1
             (comp_psfunctor
                (id_psfunctor (total_bicat D₂))
                (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)) in
         let X0 := pr1 X in X0))
     (pr2
        (let X := pr1 (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF) in

              D₂ FF (disp_pseudo_id D₂)) FF
           (lunitor_pstrans F)

  (total_pstrans_data
     (disp_pseudo_comp F (id_psfunctor B₂) D₁ D₂ D₂ FF
        (disp_pseudo_id D₂)) FF (lunitor_pstrans F)

B₁, B₂: bicat
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
FF: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F
PP:= lunitor_pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF): pstrans
  (comp_psfunctor (id_psfunctor (total_bicat D₂))
     (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF))
  (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)
PP2:= pstrans_to_is_pstrans PP: is_pstrans (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)
x, y: total_bicat D₁
f: total_bicat D₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
isPredicate is_invertible_2cell
B₁, B₂: bicat
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
FF: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F
PP:= lunitor_pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF): pstrans
  (comp_psfunctor (id_psfunctor (total_bicat D₂))
     (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF))
  (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)
PP2:= pstrans_to_is_pstrans PP: is_pstrans (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)
x, y: total_bicat D₁
f: total_bicat D₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr1
  (transportf
     (mor_disp
        (pr2
           (let X :=
              pr1
                (comp_psfunctor
                   (id_psfunctor (total_bicat D₂))
                   (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)) in
            let X0 := pr1 X in X0))
        (pr2
           (let X := pr1 (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)
              in
            let X0 := pr1 X in X0)))
     (idpath
        (pr1
           (total_pstrans_data
              (disp_pseudo_comp F (id_psfunctor B₂) D₁
                 D₂ D₂ FF (disp_pseudo_id D₂)) FF
              (lunitor_pstrans F)
              disp_lunitor_pstrans_data)))
     (pr2 (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)) x y f) =
pr1
  (pr2
     (total_pstrans_data
        (disp_pseudo_comp F (id_psfunctor B₂) D₁ D₂ D₂
           FF (disp_pseudo_id D₂)) FF
        (lunitor_pstrans F) disp_lunitor_pstrans_data)
     x y f)

      
B₁, B₂: bicat
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
FF: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F
PP:= lunitor_pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF): pstrans
  (comp_psfunctor (id_psfunctor (total_bicat D₂))
     (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF))
  (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)
PP2:= pstrans_to_is_pstrans PP: is_pstrans (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)
x, y: total_bicat D₁
f: total_bicat D₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
isPredicate is_invertible_2cell
 
B₁, B₂: bicat
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
FF: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F
PP:= lunitor_pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF): pstrans
  (comp_psfunctor (id_psfunctor (total_bicat D₂))
     (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF))
  (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)
PP2:= pstrans_to_is_pstrans PP: is_pstrans (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)
x, y: total_bicat D₁
f: total_bicat D₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
x0: pr1
  (total_pstrans_data
     (disp_pseudo_comp F (id_psfunctor B₂) D₁ D₂
        D₂ FF (disp_pseudo_id D₂)) FF
     (lunitor_pstrans F)
     disp_lunitor_pstrans_data) x
· pr2
    (let X := pr1 (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF) in
     let X0 := pr1 X in X0) x y f ==>
pr2
  (let X :=
     pr1
       (comp_psfunctor
          (id_psfunctor (total_bicat D₂))
          (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)) in
   let X0 := pr1 X in X0) x y f
· pr1
    (total_pstrans_data
       (disp_pseudo_comp F (id_psfunctor B₂) D₁
          D₂ D₂ FF (disp_pseudo_id D₂)) FF
       (lunitor_pstrans F)
       disp_lunitor_pstrans_data) y
isaprop (is_invertible_2cell x0)
 apply isaprop_is_invertible_2cell. 
B₁, B₂: bicat
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
FF: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F
PP:= lunitor_pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF): pstrans
  (comp_psfunctor (id_psfunctor (total_bicat D₂))
     (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF))
  (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)
PP2:= pstrans_to_is_pstrans PP: is_pstrans (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)
x, y: total_bicat D₁
f: total_bicat D₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr1
  (transportf
     (mor_disp
        (pr2
           (let X :=
              pr1
                (comp_psfunctor
                   (id_psfunctor (total_bicat D₂))
                   (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)) in
            let X0 := pr1 X in X0))
        (pr2
           (let X := pr1 (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)
              in
            let X0 := pr1 X in X0)))
     (idpath
        (pr1
           (total_pstrans_data
              (disp_pseudo_comp F (id_psfunctor B₂) D₁
                 D₂ D₂ FF (disp_pseudo_id D₂)) FF
              (lunitor_pstrans F)
              disp_lunitor_pstrans_data)))
     (pr2 (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)) x y f) =
pr1
  (pr2
     (total_pstrans_data
        (disp_pseudo_comp F (id_psfunctor B₂) D₁ D₂ D₂
           FF (disp_pseudo_id D₂)) FF
        (lunitor_pstrans F) disp_lunitor_pstrans_data)
     x y f)

      apply idpath.
  
B₁, B₂: bicat
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
FF: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F
PP:= lunitor_pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF): pstrans
  (comp_psfunctor (id_psfunctor (total_bicat D₂))
     (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF))
  (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)
PP2:= pstrans_to_is_pstrans PP: is_pstrans (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)
X: pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP =
total_pstrans_data
  (disp_pseudo_comp F (id_psfunctor B₂) D₁ D₂ D₂
     FF (disp_pseudo_id D₂)) FF
  (lunitor_pstrans F) disp_lunitor_pstrans_data
is_pstrans
  (total_pstrans_data
     (disp_pseudo_comp F (id_psfunctor B₂) D₁ D₂ D₂ FF
        (disp_pseudo_id D₂)) FF (lunitor_pstrans F)
     disp_lunitor_pstrans_data)
 exact (transportf is_pstrans X PP2).
Qed.

Definition disp_lunitor_pstrans
  : disp_pstrans
      (disp_pseudo_comp _ _ _ _ _ FF (disp_pseudo_id D₂))
      FF
      (lunitor_pstrans F)
  := disp_lunitor_pstrans_data,, disp_lunitor_pstrans_laws.


B₁, B₂: bicat
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
FF: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F
disp_pstrans_data FF
  (disp_pseudo_comp F (id_psfunctor B₂) D₁ D₂ D₂ FF
     (disp_pseudo_id D₂)) (linvunitor_pstrans F)


B₁, B₂: bicat
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
FF: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F
disp_pstrans_data FF
  (disp_pseudo_comp F (id_psfunctor B₂) D₁ D₂ D₂ FF
     (disp_pseudo_id D₂)) (linvunitor_pstrans F)

  
B₁, B₂: bicat
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
FF: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F
∏ (x : B₁) (xx : D₁ x),
FF x xx -->[
linvunitor_pstrans F x] disp_pseudo_comp F
                          (id_psfunctor B₂) D₁ D₂ D₂
                          FF (disp_pseudo_id D₂) x xx
B₁, B₂: bicat
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
FF: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F
∏ (x y : B₁) (f : B₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧) (xx : D₁ x) (yy : D₁ y)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy),
disp_invertible_2cell
  (psnaturality_of (linvunitor_pstrans F) f)
  (?αα₁ x xx ;; ♯ (disp_pseudo_comp F
                     (id_psfunctor B₂) D₁ D₂ D₂ FF
                     (disp_pseudo_id D₂)) ff)
  (♯ FF ff ;; ?αα₁ y yy)

  
B₁, B₂: bicat
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
FF: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F
∏ (x : B₁) (xx : D₁ x),
FF x xx -->[
linvunitor_pstrans F x] disp_pseudo_comp F
                          (id_psfunctor B₂) D₁ D₂ D₂
                          FF (disp_pseudo_id D₂) x xx
 exact (λ x xx, id_disp (FF x xx)).
  
B₁, B₂: bicat
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
FF: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F
∏ (x y : B₁) (f : B₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧) (xx : D₁ x) (yy : D₁ y)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy),
disp_invertible_2cell
  (psnaturality_of (linvunitor_pstrans F) f)
  ((λ (x0 : B₁) (xx0 : D₁ x0), id_disp (FF x0 xx0)) x
     xx ;; ♯ (disp_pseudo_comp F (id_psfunctor B₂) D₁
                D₂ D₂ FF (disp_pseudo_id D₂)) ff)
  (♯ FF ff ;; (λ (x0 : B₁) (xx0 : D₁ x0),
               id_disp (FF x0 xx0)) y yy)
 
B₁, B₂: bicat
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
FF: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F
∏ (x y : B₁) (f : B₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧) (xx : D₁ x) (yy : D₁ y)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy),
disp_invertible_2cell
  (make_invertible_2cell
     (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
        (is_invertible_2cell_lunitor (# F f))
        (is_invertible_2cell_rinvunitor (# F f))))
  (id_disp (FF x xx) ;; ♯ FF ff)
  (♯ FF ff ;; id_disp (FF y yy))

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
FF: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F
x, y: B₁
f: B₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
disp_invertible_2cell
  (make_invertible_2cell
     (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
        (is_invertible_2cell_lunitor (# F f))
        (is_invertible_2cell_rinvunitor (# F f))))
  (id_disp (FF x xx) ;; ♯ FF ff)
  (♯ FF ff ;; id_disp (FF y yy))

    apply (vcomp_disp_invertible (disp_invertible_2cell_lunitor _)
                                 (disp_invertible_2cell_rinvunitor _)).
Defined.


B₁, B₂: bicat
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
FF: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F
is_disp_pstrans FF
  (disp_pseudo_comp F (id_psfunctor B₂) D₁ D₂ D₂ FF
     (disp_pseudo_id D₂)) (linvunitor_pstrans F)
  disp_pstrans_linvunitor_data


B₁, B₂: bicat

D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
FF: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F

  (disp_pseudo_comp F (id_psfunctor B₂) D₁ D₂ D₂ FF
     (disp_pseudo_id D₂)) (linvunitor_pstrans F)
  disp_pstrans_linvunitor_data

F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
FF: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F
is_pstrans
  (total_pstrans_data FF
     (disp_pseudo_comp F (id_psfunctor B₂) D₁ D₂ D₂ FF
        (disp_pseudo_id D₂)) (linvunitor_pstrans F)
     disp_pstrans_linvunitor_data)

  (comp_psfunctor (id_psfunctor (total_bicat D₂))

is_pstrans

        (disp_pseudo_id D₂)) (linvunitor_pstrans F)
     disp_pstrans_linvunitor_data)

pr1 (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP) =
pr1
  (total_pstrans_data FF

     (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF))
PP2:= pstrans_to_is_pstrans PP: is_pstrans (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr2
        (let X := pr1 (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF) in
         let X0 := pr1 X in X0))
     (pr2
        (let X :=
           pr1
             (comp_psfunctor
                (id_psfunctor (total_bicat D₂))
                (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)) in
         let X0 := pr1 X in X0))) ?p
  (pr2 (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)) =
pr2
  (total_pstrans_data FF
     (disp_pseudo_comp F (id_psfunctor B₂) D₁ D₂ D₂ FF
        (disp_pseudo_id D₂)) (linvunitor_pstrans F)
     disp_pstrans_linvunitor_data)

  (mor_disp

     (pr2

        (disp_pseudo_id D₂)) (linvunitor_pstrans F)

     (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF))
PP2:= pstrans_to_is_pstrans PP: is_pstrans (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)
x, y: total_bicat D₁
f: total_bicat D₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr2
        (let X := pr1 (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF) in
         let X0 := pr1 X in X0))
     (pr2
        (let X :=
           pr1
             (comp_psfunctor
                (id_psfunctor (total_bicat D₂))
                (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)) in
         let X0 := pr1 X in X0)))
  (idpath
     (pr1
        (total_pstrans_data FF
           (disp_pseudo_comp F (id_psfunctor B₂) D₁ D₂
              D₂ FF (disp_pseudo_id D₂))

B₁, B₂: bicat
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
FF: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F
PP:= linvunitor_pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF): pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)
  (comp_psfunctor (id_psfunctor (total_bicat D₂))
     (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF))
PP2:= pstrans_to_is_pstrans PP: is_pstrans (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)
x, y: total_bicat D₁
f: total_bicat D₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
isPredicate is_invertible_2cell
B₁, B₂: bicat
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
FF: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F
PP:= linvunitor_pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF): pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)
  (comp_psfunctor (id_psfunctor (total_bicat D₂))
     (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF))
PP2:= pstrans_to_is_pstrans PP: is_pstrans (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)
x, y: total_bicat D₁
f: total_bicat D₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr1
  (transportf
     (mor_disp
        (pr2
           (let X := pr1 (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)
              in
            let X0 := pr1 X in X0))
        (pr2
           (let X :=
              pr1
                (comp_psfunctor
                   (id_psfunctor (total_bicat D₂))
                   (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)) in
            let X0 := pr1 X in X0)))
     (idpath
        (pr1
           (total_pstrans_data FF
              (disp_pseudo_comp F (id_psfunctor B₂) D₁
                 D₂ D₂ FF (disp_pseudo_id D₂))
              (linvunitor_pstrans F)
              disp_pstrans_linvunitor_data)))
     (pr2 (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)) x y f) =
pr1
  (pr2
     (total_pstrans_data FF
        (disp_pseudo_comp F (id_psfunctor B₂) D₁ D₂ D₂
           FF (disp_pseudo_id D₂))
        (linvunitor_pstrans F)
        disp_pstrans_linvunitor_data) x y f)

      
B₁, B₂: bicat
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
FF: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F
PP:= linvunitor_pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF): pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)
  (comp_psfunctor (id_psfunctor (total_bicat D₂))
     (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF))
PP2:= pstrans_to_is_pstrans PP: is_pstrans (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)
x, y: total_bicat D₁
f: total_bicat D₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
isPredicate is_invertible_2cell
 
B₁, B₂: bicat
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
FF: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F
PP:= linvunitor_pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF): pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)
  (comp_psfunctor (id_psfunctor (total_bicat D₂))
     (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF))
PP2:= pstrans_to_is_pstrans PP: is_pstrans (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)
x, y: total_bicat D₁
f: total_bicat D₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
x0: pr1
  (total_pstrans_data FF
     (disp_pseudo_comp F (id_psfunctor B₂) D₁ D₂
        D₂ FF (disp_pseudo_id D₂))
     (linvunitor_pstrans F)
     disp_pstrans_linvunitor_data) x
· pr2
    (let X :=
       pr1
         (comp_psfunctor
            (id_psfunctor (total_bicat D₂))
            (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)) in
     let X0 := pr1 X in X0) x y f ==>
pr2
  (let X := pr1 (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF) in
   let X0 := pr1 X in X0) x y f
· pr1
    (total_pstrans_data FF
       (disp_pseudo_comp F (id_psfunctor B₂) D₁
          D₂ D₂ FF (disp_pseudo_id D₂))
       (linvunitor_pstrans F)
       disp_pstrans_linvunitor_data) y
isaprop (is_invertible_2cell x0)
 apply isaprop_is_invertible_2cell. 
B₁, B₂: bicat
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
FF: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F
PP:= linvunitor_pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF): pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)
  (comp_psfunctor (id_psfunctor (total_bicat D₂))
     (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF))
PP2:= pstrans_to_is_pstrans PP: is_pstrans (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)
x, y: total_bicat D₁
f: total_bicat D₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr1
  (transportf
     (mor_disp
        (pr2
           (let X := pr1 (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)
              in
            let X0 := pr1 X in X0))
        (pr2
           (let X :=
              pr1
                (comp_psfunctor
                   (id_psfunctor (total_bicat D₂))
                   (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)) in
            let X0 := pr1 X in X0)))
     (idpath
        (pr1
           (total_pstrans_data FF
              (disp_pseudo_comp F (id_psfunctor B₂) D₁
                 D₂ D₂ FF (disp_pseudo_id D₂))
              (linvunitor_pstrans F)
              disp_pstrans_linvunitor_data)))
     (pr2 (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)) x y f) =
pr1
  (pr2
     (total_pstrans_data FF
        (disp_pseudo_comp F (id_psfunctor B₂) D₁ D₂ D₂
           FF (disp_pseudo_id D₂))
        (linvunitor_pstrans F)
        disp_pstrans_linvunitor_data) x y f)

      apply idpath.
  
B₁, B₂: bicat
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
FF: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F
PP:= linvunitor_pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF): pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)
  (comp_psfunctor (id_psfunctor (total_bicat D₂))
     (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF))
PP2:= pstrans_to_is_pstrans PP: is_pstrans (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)
X: pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP =
total_pstrans_data FF
  (disp_pseudo_comp F (id_psfunctor B₂) D₁ D₂ D₂
     FF (disp_pseudo_id D₂))
  (linvunitor_pstrans F)
  disp_pstrans_linvunitor_data
is_pstrans
  (total_pstrans_data FF
     (disp_pseudo_comp F (id_psfunctor B₂) D₁ D₂ D₂ FF
        (disp_pseudo_id D₂)) (linvunitor_pstrans F)
     disp_pstrans_linvunitor_data)
 exact (transportf is_pstrans X PP2).
Qed.

Definition disp_pstrans_linvunitor
  : disp_pstrans
      FF
      (disp_pseudo_comp _ _ _ _ _ FF (disp_pseudo_id D₂))
      (linvunitor_pstrans F)
  := disp_pstrans_linvunitor_data,, disp_pstrans_linvunitor_laws.


B₁, B₂: bicat
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
FF: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F
disp_pstrans_data
  (disp_pseudo_comp (id_psfunctor B₁) F D₁ D₁ D₂
     (disp_pseudo_id D₁) FF) FF (runitor_pstrans F)


B₁, B₂: bicat
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
FF: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F
disp_pstrans_data
  (disp_pseudo_comp (id_psfunctor B₁) F D₁ D₁ D₂
     (disp_pseudo_id D₁) FF) FF (runitor_pstrans F)

  
B₁, B₂: bicat
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
FF: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F
∏ (x : B₁) (xx : D₁ x),
disp_pseudo_comp (id_psfunctor B₁) F D₁ D₁ D₂
  (disp_pseudo_id D₁) FF x xx -->[
runitor_pstrans F x] FF x xx
B₁, B₂: bicat
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
FF: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F
∏ (x y : B₁) (f : B₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧) (xx : D₁ x) (yy : D₁ y)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy),
disp_invertible_2cell
  (psnaturality_of (runitor_pstrans F) f)
  (?αα₁ x xx ;; ♯ FF ff)
  (♯ (disp_pseudo_comp (id_psfunctor B₁) F D₁ D₁ D₂
        (disp_pseudo_id D₁) FF) ff ;; ?αα₁ y yy)

  
B₁, B₂: bicat
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
FF: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F
∏ (x : B₁) (xx : D₁ x),
disp_pseudo_comp (id_psfunctor B₁) F D₁ D₁ D₂
  (disp_pseudo_id D₁) FF x xx -->[
runitor_pstrans F x] FF x xx
 exact (λ x xx, id_disp (FF x xx)).
  
B₁, B₂: bicat
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
FF: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F
∏ (x y : B₁) (f : B₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧) (xx : D₁ x) (yy : D₁ y)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy),
disp_invertible_2cell
  (psnaturality_of (runitor_pstrans F) f)
  ((λ (x0 : B₁) (xx0 : D₁ x0), id_disp (FF x0 xx0)) x
     xx ;; ♯ FF ff)
  (♯ (disp_pseudo_comp (id_psfunctor B₁) F D₁ D₁ D₂
        (disp_pseudo_id D₁) FF) ff ;; (λ (x0 : B₁)
                                       (xx0 : D₁ x0),
                                       id_disp
                                         (FF x0 xx0))
                                        y yy)
 
B₁, B₂: bicat
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
FF: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F
∏ (x y : B₁) (f : B₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧) (xx : D₁ x) (yy : D₁ y)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy),
disp_invertible_2cell
  (make_invertible_2cell
     (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
        (is_invertible_2cell_lunitor (# F f))
        (is_invertible_2cell_rinvunitor (# F f))))
  (id_disp (FF x xx) ;; ♯ FF ff)
  (♯ FF ff ;; id_disp (FF y yy))

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
FF: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F
x, y: B₁
f: B₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
disp_invertible_2cell
  (make_invertible_2cell
     (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
        (is_invertible_2cell_lunitor (# F f))
        (is_invertible_2cell_rinvunitor (# F f))))
  (id_disp (FF x xx) ;; ♯ FF ff)
  (♯ FF ff ;; id_disp (FF y yy))

    apply (vcomp_disp_invertible (disp_invertible_2cell_lunitor _)
                                 (disp_invertible_2cell_rinvunitor _)).
Defined.


B₁, B₂: bicat
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
FF: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F
is_disp_pstrans
  (disp_pseudo_comp (id_psfunctor B₁) F D₁ D₁ D₂
     (disp_pseudo_id D₁) FF) FF (runitor_pstrans F)
  disp_runitor_pstrans_data


B₁, B₂: bicat
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
FF: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F
is_disp_pstrans
  (disp_pseudo_comp (id_psfunctor B₁) F D₁ D₁ D₂
     (disp_pseudo_id D₁) FF) FF (runitor_pstrans F)
  disp_runitor_pstrans_data

  
B₁, B₂: bicat
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
FF: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F
is_pstrans
  (total_pstrans_data
     (disp_pseudo_comp (id_psfunctor B₁) F D₁ D₁ D₂
        (disp_pseudo_id D₁) FF) FF (runitor_pstrans F)
     disp_runitor_pstrans_data)

  
B₁, B₂: bicat
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
FF: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F
PP:= runitor_pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF): pstrans
  (comp_psfunctor (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)
     (id_psfunctor (total_bicat D₁)))
  (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)
is_pstrans
  (total_pstrans_data
     (disp_pseudo_comp (id_psfunctor B₁) F D₁ D₁ D₂
        (disp_pseudo_id D₁) FF) FF (runitor_pstrans F)
     disp_runitor_pstrans_data)

  
B₁, B₂: bicat
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
FF: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F
PP:= runitor_pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF): pstrans
  (comp_psfunctor (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)
     (id_psfunctor (total_bicat D₁)))
  (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)
PP2:= pstrans_to_is_pstrans PP: is_pstrans (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)
is_pstrans
  (total_pstrans_data
     (disp_pseudo_comp (id_psfunctor B₁) F D₁ D₁ D₂
        (disp_pseudo_id D₁) FF) FF (runitor_pstrans F)
     disp_runitor_pstrans_data)

  
B₁, B₂: bicat
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
FF: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F
PP:= runitor_pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF): pstrans
  (comp_psfunctor (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)
     (id_psfunctor (total_bicat D₁)))
  (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)
PP2:= pstrans_to_is_pstrans PP: is_pstrans (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)
pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP =
total_pstrans_data
  (disp_pseudo_comp (id_psfunctor B₁) F D₁ D₁ D₂
     (disp_pseudo_id D₁) FF) FF (runitor_pstrans F)
  disp_runitor_pstrans_data
B₁, B₂: bicat
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
FF: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F
PP:= runitor_pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF): pstrans
  (comp_psfunctor (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)
     (id_psfunctor (total_bicat D₁)))
  (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)
PP2:= pstrans_to_is_pstrans PP: is_pstrans (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)
X: pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP =
total_pstrans_data
  (disp_pseudo_comp (id_psfunctor B₁) F D₁ D₁ D₂
     (disp_pseudo_id D₁) FF) FF
  (runitor_pstrans F) disp_runitor_pstrans_data
is_pstrans
  (total_pstrans_data
     (disp_pseudo_comp (id_psfunctor B₁) F D₁ D₁ D₂
        (disp_pseudo_id D₁) FF) FF (runitor_pstrans F)
     disp_runitor_pstrans_data)

  
B₁, B₂: bicat
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
FF: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F
PP:= runitor_pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF): pstrans
  (comp_psfunctor (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)
     (id_psfunctor (total_bicat D₁)))
  (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)
PP2:= pstrans_to_is_pstrans PP: is_pstrans (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)
pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP =
total_pstrans_data
  (disp_pseudo_comp (id_psfunctor B₁) F D₁ D₁ D₂
     (disp_pseudo_id D₁) FF) FF (runitor_pstrans F)
  disp_runitor_pstrans_data
 
B₁, B₂: bicat
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
FF: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F
PP:= runitor_pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF): pstrans
  (comp_psfunctor (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)
     (id_psfunctor (total_bicat D₁)))
  (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)
PP2:= pstrans_to_is_pstrans PP: is_pstrans (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)
pr1 (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP) =
pr1
  (total_pstrans_data
     (disp_pseudo_comp (id_psfunctor B₁) F D₁ D₁ D₂
        (disp_pseudo_id D₁) FF) FF (runitor_pstrans F)
     disp_runitor_pstrans_data)
B₁, B₂: bicat
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
FF: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F
PP:= runitor_pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF): pstrans
  (comp_psfunctor (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)
     (id_psfunctor (total_bicat D₁)))
  (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)
PP2:= pstrans_to_is_pstrans PP: is_pstrans (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr2
        (let X :=
           pr1
             (comp_psfunctor
                (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)
                (id_psfunctor (total_bicat D₁))) in
         let X0 := pr1 X in X0))
     (pr2
        (let X := pr1 (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF) in
         let X0 := pr1 X in X0))) ?p
  (pr2 (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)) =
pr2
  (total_pstrans_data
     (disp_pseudo_comp (id_psfunctor B₁) F D₁ D₁ D₂
        (disp_pseudo_id D₁) FF) FF (runitor_pstrans F)
     disp_runitor_pstrans_data)

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
FF: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F
PP:= runitor_pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF): pstrans
  (comp_psfunctor (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)
     (id_psfunctor (total_bicat D₁)))
  (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)
PP2:= pstrans_to_is_pstrans PP: is_pstrans (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)
pr1 (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP) =
pr1
  (total_pstrans_data
     (disp_pseudo_comp (id_psfunctor B₁) F D₁ D₁ D₂
        (disp_pseudo_id D₁) FF) FF (runitor_pstrans F)
     disp_runitor_pstrans_data)
 apply idpath.
    
B₁, B₂: bicat
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
FF: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F
PP:= runitor_pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF): pstrans
  (comp_psfunctor (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)
     (id_psfunctor (total_bicat D₁)))
  (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)
PP2:= pstrans_to_is_pstrans PP: is_pstrans (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr2
        (let X :=
           pr1
             (comp_psfunctor
                (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)
                (id_psfunctor (total_bicat D₁))) in
         let X0 := pr1 X in X0))
     (pr2
        (let X := pr1 (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF) in
         let X0 := pr1 X in X0)))
  (idpath
     (pr1
        (total_pstrans_data
           (disp_pseudo_comp (id_psfunctor B₁) F D₁ D₁
              D₂ (disp_pseudo_id D₁) FF) FF
           (runitor_pstrans F)
           disp_runitor_pstrans_data)))
  (pr2 (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)) =
pr2
  (total_pstrans_data
     (disp_pseudo_comp (id_psfunctor B₁) F D₁ D₁ D₂
        (disp_pseudo_id D₁) FF) FF (runitor_pstrans F)
     disp_runitor_pstrans_data)
 
B₁, B₂: bicat
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
FF: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F
PP:= runitor_pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF): pstrans
  (comp_psfunctor (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)
     (id_psfunctor (total_bicat D₁)))
  (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)
PP2:= pstrans_to_is_pstrans PP: is_pstrans (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr2
        (let X :=
           pr1
             (comp_psfunctor
                (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)
                (id_psfunctor (total_bicat D₁))) in
         let X0 := pr1 X in X0))
     (pr2
        (let X := pr1 (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF) in
         let X0 := pr1 X in X0)))
  (idpath
     (pr1
        (total_pstrans_data
           (disp_pseudo_comp (id_psfunctor B₁) F D₁ D₁
              D₂ (disp_pseudo_id D₁) FF) FF
           (runitor_pstrans F)
           disp_runitor_pstrans_data)))
  (pr2 (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)) ~
pr2
  (total_pstrans_data
     (disp_pseudo_comp (id_psfunctor B₁) F D₁ D₁ D₂
        (disp_pseudo_id D₁) FF) FF (runitor_pstrans F)
     disp_runitor_pstrans_data)
 
B₁, B₂: bicat
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
FF: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F
PP:= runitor_pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF): pstrans
  (comp_psfunctor (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)
     (id_psfunctor (total_bicat D₁)))
  (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)
PP2:= pstrans_to_is_pstrans PP: is_pstrans (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)
x: total_bicat D₁
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr2
        (let X :=
           pr1
             (comp_psfunctor
                (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)
                (id_psfunctor (total_bicat D₁))) in
         let X0 := pr1 X in X0))
     (pr2
        (let X := pr1 (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF) in
         let X0 := pr1 X in X0)))
  (idpath
     (pr1
        (total_pstrans_data
           (disp_pseudo_comp (id_psfunctor B₁) F D₁ D₁
              D₂ (disp_pseudo_id D₁) FF) FF
           (runitor_pstrans F)
           disp_runitor_pstrans_data)))
  (pr2 (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)) x =
pr2
  (total_pstrans_data
     (disp_pseudo_comp (id_psfunctor B₁) F D₁ D₁ D₂
        (disp_pseudo_id D₁) FF) FF (runitor_pstrans F)
     disp_runitor_pstrans_data) x

      
B₁, B₂: bicat
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
FF: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F
PP:= runitor_pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF): pstrans
  (comp_psfunctor (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)
     (id_psfunctor (total_bicat D₁)))
  (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)
PP2:= pstrans_to_is_pstrans PP: is_pstrans (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)
x: total_bicat D₁
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr2
        (let X :=
           pr1
             (comp_psfunctor
                (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)
                (id_psfunctor (total_bicat D₁))) in
         let X0 := pr1 X in X0))
     (pr2
        (let X := pr1 (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF) in
         let X0 := pr1 X in X0)))
  (idpath
     (pr1
        (total_pstrans_data
           (disp_pseudo_comp (id_psfunctor B₁) F D₁ D₁
              D₂ (disp_pseudo_id D₁) FF) FF
           (runitor_pstrans F)
           disp_runitor_pstrans_data)))
  (pr2 (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)) x ~
pr2
  (total_pstrans_data
     (disp_pseudo_comp (id_psfunctor B₁) F D₁ D₁ D₂
        (disp_pseudo_id D₁) FF) FF (runitor_pstrans F)
     disp_runitor_pstrans_data) x

        (disp_pseudo_id D₁) FF) FF (runitor_pstrans F)

D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂

  (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)

x, y: total_bicat D₁
f: total_bicat D₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr2
        (let X :=
           pr1
             (comp_psfunctor
                (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)
                (id_psfunctor (total_bicat D₁))) in
         let X0 := pr1 X in X0))

B₁, B₂: bicat
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
FF: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F
PP:= runitor_pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF): pstrans
  (comp_psfunctor (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)
     (id_psfunctor (total_bicat D₁)))
  (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)
PP2:= pstrans_to_is_pstrans PP: is_pstrans (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)
x, y: total_bicat D₁
f: total_bicat D₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
isPredicate is_invertible_2cell
B₁, B₂: bicat
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
FF: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F
PP:= runitor_pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF): pstrans
  (comp_psfunctor (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)
     (id_psfunctor (total_bicat D₁)))
  (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)
PP2:= pstrans_to_is_pstrans PP: is_pstrans (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)
x, y: total_bicat D₁
f: total_bicat D₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr1
  (transportf
     (mor_disp
        (pr2
           (let X :=
              pr1
                (comp_psfunctor
                   (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)
                   (id_psfunctor (total_bicat D₁))) in
            let X0 := pr1 X in X0))
        (pr2
           (let X := pr1 (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)
              in
            let X0 := pr1 X in X0)))
     (idpath
        (pr1
           (total_pstrans_data
              (disp_pseudo_comp (id_psfunctor B₁) F D₁
                 D₁ D₂ (disp_pseudo_id D₁) FF) FF
              (runitor_pstrans F)
              disp_runitor_pstrans_data)))
     (pr2 (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)) x y f) =
pr1
  (pr2
     (total_pstrans_data
        (disp_pseudo_comp (id_psfunctor B₁) F D₁ D₁ D₂
           (disp_pseudo_id D₁) FF) FF
        (runitor_pstrans F) disp_runitor_pstrans_data)
     x y f)

      
B₁, B₂: bicat
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
FF: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F
PP:= runitor_pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF): pstrans
  (comp_psfunctor (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)
     (id_psfunctor (total_bicat D₁)))
  (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)
PP2:= pstrans_to_is_pstrans PP: is_pstrans (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)
x, y: total_bicat D₁
f: total_bicat D₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
isPredicate is_invertible_2cell
 
B₁, B₂: bicat
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
FF: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F
PP:= runitor_pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF): pstrans
  (comp_psfunctor (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)
     (id_psfunctor (total_bicat D₁)))
  (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)
PP2:= pstrans_to_is_pstrans PP: is_pstrans (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)
x, y: total_bicat D₁
f: total_bicat D₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
x0: pr1
  (total_pstrans_data
     (disp_pseudo_comp (id_psfunctor B₁) F D₁ D₁
        D₂ (disp_pseudo_id D₁) FF) FF
     (runitor_pstrans F)
     disp_runitor_pstrans_data) x
· pr2
    (let X := pr1 (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF) in
     let X0 := pr1 X in X0) x y f ==>
pr2
  (let X :=
     pr1
       (comp_psfunctor
          (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)
          (id_psfunctor (total_bicat D₁))) in
   let X0 := pr1 X in X0) x y f
· pr1
    (total_pstrans_data
       (disp_pseudo_comp (id_psfunctor B₁) F D₁
          D₁ D₂ (disp_pseudo_id D₁) FF) FF
       (runitor_pstrans F)
       disp_runitor_pstrans_data) y
isaprop (is_invertible_2cell x0)
 apply isaprop_is_invertible_2cell. 
B₁, B₂: bicat
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
FF: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F
PP:= runitor_pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF): pstrans
  (comp_psfunctor (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)
     (id_psfunctor (total_bicat D₁)))
  (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)
PP2:= pstrans_to_is_pstrans PP: is_pstrans (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)
x, y: total_bicat D₁
f: total_bicat D₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr1
  (transportf
     (mor_disp
        (pr2
           (let X :=
              pr1
                (comp_psfunctor
                   (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)
                   (id_psfunctor (total_bicat D₁))) in
            let X0 := pr1 X in X0))
        (pr2
           (let X := pr1 (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)
              in
            let X0 := pr1 X in X0)))
     (idpath
        (pr1
           (total_pstrans_data
              (disp_pseudo_comp (id_psfunctor B₁) F D₁
                 D₁ D₂ (disp_pseudo_id D₁) FF) FF
              (runitor_pstrans F)
              disp_runitor_pstrans_data)))
     (pr2 (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)) x y f) =
pr1
  (pr2
     (total_pstrans_data
        (disp_pseudo_comp (id_psfunctor B₁) F D₁ D₁ D₂
           (disp_pseudo_id D₁) FF) FF
        (runitor_pstrans F) disp_runitor_pstrans_data)
     x y f)

      apply idpath.
  
B₁, B₂: bicat
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
FF: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F
PP:= runitor_pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF): pstrans
  (comp_psfunctor (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)
     (id_psfunctor (total_bicat D₁)))
  (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)
PP2:= pstrans_to_is_pstrans PP: is_pstrans (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)
X: pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP =
total_pstrans_data
  (disp_pseudo_comp (id_psfunctor B₁) F D₁ D₁ D₂
     (disp_pseudo_id D₁) FF) FF
  (runitor_pstrans F) disp_runitor_pstrans_data
is_pstrans
  (total_pstrans_data
     (disp_pseudo_comp (id_psfunctor B₁) F D₁ D₁ D₂
        (disp_pseudo_id D₁) FF) FF (runitor_pstrans F)
     disp_runitor_pstrans_data)
 exact (transportf is_pstrans X PP2).
Qed.

Definition disp_runitor_pstrans
  : disp_pstrans
      (disp_pseudo_comp _ _ _ _ _ (disp_pseudo_id D₁) FF)
      FF
      (runitor_pstrans F)
  := disp_runitor_pstrans_data,, disp_runitor_pstrans_laws.


B₁, B₂: bicat
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
FF: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F
disp_pstrans_data FF
  (disp_pseudo_comp (id_psfunctor B₁) F D₁ D₁ D₂
     (disp_pseudo_id D₁) FF) (rinvunitor_pstrans F)


B₁, B₂: bicat
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
FF: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F
disp_pstrans_data FF
  (disp_pseudo_comp (id_psfunctor B₁) F D₁ D₁ D₂
     (disp_pseudo_id D₁) FF) (rinvunitor_pstrans F)

  
B₁, B₂: bicat
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
FF: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F
∏ (x : B₁) (xx : D₁ x),
FF x xx -->[
rinvunitor_pstrans F x] disp_pseudo_comp
                          (id_psfunctor B₁) F D₁ D₁ D₂
                          (disp_pseudo_id D₁) FF x xx
B₁, B₂: bicat
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
FF: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F
∏ (x y : B₁) (f : B₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧) (xx : D₁ x) (yy : D₁ y)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy),
disp_invertible_2cell
  (psnaturality_of (rinvunitor_pstrans F) f)
  (?αα₁ x xx ;; ♯ (disp_pseudo_comp (id_psfunctor B₁)
                     F D₁ D₁ D₂ (disp_pseudo_id D₁) FF)
                  ff) (♯ FF ff ;; ?αα₁ y yy)

  
B₁, B₂: bicat
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
FF: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F
∏ (x : B₁) (xx : D₁ x),
FF x xx -->[
rinvunitor_pstrans F x] disp_pseudo_comp
                          (id_psfunctor B₁) F D₁ D₁ D₂
                          (disp_pseudo_id D₁) FF x xx
 exact (λ x xx, id_disp (FF x xx)).
  
B₁, B₂: bicat
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
FF: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F
∏ (x y : B₁) (f : B₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧) (xx : D₁ x) (yy : D₁ y)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy),
disp_invertible_2cell
  (psnaturality_of (rinvunitor_pstrans F) f)
  ((λ (x0 : B₁) (xx0 : D₁ x0), id_disp (FF x0 xx0)) x
     xx ;; ♯ (disp_pseudo_comp (id_psfunctor B₁) F D₁
                D₁ D₂ (disp_pseudo_id D₁) FF) ff)
  (♯ FF ff ;; (λ (x0 : B₁) (xx0 : D₁ x0),
               id_disp (FF x0 xx0)) y yy)
 
B₁, B₂: bicat
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
FF: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F
∏ (x y : B₁) (f : B₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧) (xx : D₁ x) (yy : D₁ y)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy),
disp_invertible_2cell
  (make_invertible_2cell
     (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
        (is_invertible_2cell_lunitor (# F f))
        (is_invertible_2cell_rinvunitor (# F f))))
  (id_disp (FF x xx) ;; ♯ FF ff)
  (♯ FF ff ;; id_disp (FF y yy))

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
FF: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F
x, y: B₁
f: B₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
disp_invertible_2cell
  (make_invertible_2cell
     (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
        (is_invertible_2cell_lunitor (# F f))
        (is_invertible_2cell_rinvunitor (# F f))))
  (id_disp (FF x xx) ;; ♯ FF ff)
  (♯ FF ff ;; id_disp (FF y yy))

    apply (vcomp_disp_invertible (disp_invertible_2cell_lunitor _)
                                 (disp_invertible_2cell_rinvunitor _)).
Defined.


B₁, B₂: bicat
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
FF: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F
is_disp_pstrans FF
  (disp_pseudo_comp (id_psfunctor B₁) F D₁ D₁ D₂
     (disp_pseudo_id D₁) FF) (rinvunitor_pstrans F)
  disp_rinvunitor_pstrans_data


B₁, B₂: bicat
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
FF: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F
is_disp_pstrans FF
  (disp_pseudo_comp (id_psfunctor B₁) F D₁ D₁ D₂
     (disp_pseudo_id D₁) FF) (rinvunitor_pstrans F)
  disp_rinvunitor_pstrans_data

  
B₁, B₂: bicat
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
FF: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F
is_pstrans
  (total_pstrans_data FF
     (disp_pseudo_comp (id_psfunctor B₁) F D₁ D₁ D₂
        (disp_pseudo_id D₁) FF) (rinvunitor_pstrans F)
     disp_rinvunitor_pstrans_data)

  
B₁, B₂: bicat
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
FF: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F
PP:= rinvunitor_pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF): pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)
  (comp_psfunctor (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)
     (id_psfunctor (total_bicat D₁)))
is_pstrans
  (total_pstrans_data FF
     (disp_pseudo_comp (id_psfunctor B₁) F D₁ D₁ D₂
        (disp_pseudo_id D₁) FF) (rinvunitor_pstrans F)
     disp_rinvunitor_pstrans_data)

  
B₁, B₂: bicat
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
FF: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F
PP:= rinvunitor_pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF): pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)
  (comp_psfunctor (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)
     (id_psfunctor (total_bicat D₁)))
PP2:= pstrans_to_is_pstrans PP: is_pstrans (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)
is_pstrans
  (total_pstrans_data FF
     (disp_pseudo_comp (id_psfunctor B₁) F D₁ D₁ D₂
        (disp_pseudo_id D₁) FF) (rinvunitor_pstrans F)
     disp_rinvunitor_pstrans_data)

  
B₁, B₂: bicat
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
FF: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F
PP:= rinvunitor_pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF): pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)
  (comp_psfunctor (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)
     (id_psfunctor (total_bicat D₁)))
PP2:= pstrans_to_is_pstrans PP: is_pstrans (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)
pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP =
total_pstrans_data FF
  (disp_pseudo_comp (id_psfunctor B₁) F D₁ D₁ D₂
     (disp_pseudo_id D₁) FF) (rinvunitor_pstrans F)
  disp_rinvunitor_pstrans_data
B₁, B₂: bicat
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
FF: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F
PP:= rinvunitor_pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF): pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)
  (comp_psfunctor (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)
     (id_psfunctor (total_bicat D₁)))
PP2:= pstrans_to_is_pstrans PP: is_pstrans (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)
X: pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP =
total_pstrans_data FF
  (disp_pseudo_comp (id_psfunctor B₁) F D₁ D₁ D₂
     (disp_pseudo_id D₁) FF)
  (rinvunitor_pstrans F)
  disp_rinvunitor_pstrans_data
is_pstrans
  (total_pstrans_data FF
     (disp_pseudo_comp (id_psfunctor B₁) F D₁ D₁ D₂
        (disp_pseudo_id D₁) FF) (rinvunitor_pstrans F)
     disp_rinvunitor_pstrans_data)

  
B₁, B₂: bicat
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
FF: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F
PP:= rinvunitor_pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF): pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)
  (comp_psfunctor (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)
     (id_psfunctor (total_bicat D₁)))
PP2:= pstrans_to_is_pstrans PP: is_pstrans (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)
pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP =
total_pstrans_data FF
  (disp_pseudo_comp (id_psfunctor B₁) F D₁ D₁ D₂
     (disp_pseudo_id D₁) FF) (rinvunitor_pstrans F)
  disp_rinvunitor_pstrans_data

pr1 (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP) =
pr1
  (total_pstrans_data FF
     (disp_pseudo_comp (id_psfunctor B₁) F D₁ D₁ D₂
        (disp_pseudo_id D₁) FF) (rinvunitor_pstrans F)
     disp_rinvunitor_pstrans_data)

D₁: disp_bicat B₁

     (id_psfunctor (total_bicat D₁)))

transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr2
        (let X := pr1 (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF) in
         let X0 := pr1 X in X0))
     (pr2
        (let X :=
           pr1
             (comp_psfunctor
                (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)
                (id_psfunctor (total_bicat D₁))) in
         let X0 := pr1 X in X0))) ?p
  (pr2 (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)) =
pr2
  (total_pstrans_data FF
     (disp_pseudo_comp (id_psfunctor B₁) F D₁ D₁ D₂
        (disp_pseudo_id D₁) FF) (rinvunitor_pstrans F)
     disp_rinvunitor_pstrans_data)

  (mor_disp

           (rinvunitor_pstrans F)

        (disp_pseudo_id D₁) FF) (rinvunitor_pstrans F)
     disp_rinvunitor_pstrans_data)

D₂: disp_bicat B₂

D₂: disp_bicat B₂

  (comp_psfunctor (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)
     (id_psfunctor (total_bicat D₁)))

x, y: total_bicat D₁
f: total_bicat D₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr2
        (let X := pr1 (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF) in
         let X0 := pr1 X in X0))
     (pr2
        (let X :=
           pr1
             (comp_psfunctor

                (id_psfunctor (total_bicat D₁))) in
         let X0 := pr1 X in X0)))

        (total_pstrans_data FF

              D₂ (disp_pseudo_id D₁) FF)
           (rinvunitor_pstrans F)
