     (disp_pseudo_comp (id_psfunctor B₁) F D₁ D₁ D₂
        (disp_pseudo_id D₁) FF) (rinvunitor_pstrans F)
     disp_rinvunitor_pstrans_data) x y f

      
B₁, B₂: bicat
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
FF: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F
PP:= rinvunitor_pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF): pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)
  (comp_psfunctor (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)
     (id_psfunctor (total_bicat D₁)))
PP2:= pstrans_to_is_pstrans PP: is_pstrans (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)
x, y: total_bicat D₁
f: total_bicat D₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
isPredicate is_invertible_2cell
B₁, B₂: bicat
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
FF: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F
PP:= rinvunitor_pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF): pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)
  (comp_psfunctor (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)
     (id_psfunctor (total_bicat D₁)))
PP2:= pstrans_to_is_pstrans PP: is_pstrans (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)
x, y: total_bicat D₁
f: total_bicat D₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr1
  (transportf
     (mor_disp
        (pr2
           (let X := pr1 (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)
              in
            let X0 := pr1 X in X0))
        (pr2
           (let X :=
              pr1
                (comp_psfunctor
                   (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)
                   (id_psfunctor (total_bicat D₁))) in
            let X0 := pr1 X in X0)))
     (idpath
        (pr1
           (total_pstrans_data FF
              (disp_pseudo_comp (id_psfunctor B₁) F D₁
                 D₁ D₂ (disp_pseudo_id D₁) FF)
              (rinvunitor_pstrans F)
              disp_rinvunitor_pstrans_data)))
     (pr2 (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)) x y f) =
pr1
  (pr2
     (total_pstrans_data FF
        (disp_pseudo_comp (id_psfunctor B₁) F D₁ D₁ D₂
           (disp_pseudo_id D₁) FF)
        (rinvunitor_pstrans F)
        disp_rinvunitor_pstrans_data) x y f)

      
B₁, B₂: bicat
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
FF: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F
PP:= rinvunitor_pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF): pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)
  (comp_psfunctor (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)
     (id_psfunctor (total_bicat D₁)))
PP2:= pstrans_to_is_pstrans PP: is_pstrans (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)
x, y: total_bicat D₁
f: total_bicat D₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
isPredicate is_invertible_2cell
 
B₁, B₂: bicat
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
FF: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F
PP:= rinvunitor_pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF): pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)
  (comp_psfunctor (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)
     (id_psfunctor (total_bicat D₁)))
PP2:= pstrans_to_is_pstrans PP: is_pstrans (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)
x, y: total_bicat D₁
f: total_bicat D₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
x0: pr1
  (total_pstrans_data FF
     (disp_pseudo_comp (id_psfunctor B₁) F D₁ D₁
        D₂ (disp_pseudo_id D₁) FF)
     (rinvunitor_pstrans F)
     disp_rinvunitor_pstrans_data) x
· pr2
    (let X :=
       pr1
         (comp_psfunctor
            (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)
            (id_psfunctor (total_bicat D₁))) in
     let X0 := pr1 X in X0) x y f ==>
pr2
  (let X := pr1 (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF) in
   let X0 := pr1 X in X0) x y f
· pr1
    (total_pstrans_data FF
       (disp_pseudo_comp (id_psfunctor B₁) F D₁
          D₁ D₂ (disp_pseudo_id D₁) FF)
       (rinvunitor_pstrans F)
       disp_rinvunitor_pstrans_data) y
isaprop (is_invertible_2cell x0)
 apply isaprop_is_invertible_2cell. 
B₁, B₂: bicat
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
FF: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F
PP:= rinvunitor_pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF): pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)
  (comp_psfunctor (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)
     (id_psfunctor (total_bicat D₁)))
PP2:= pstrans_to_is_pstrans PP: is_pstrans (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)
x, y: total_bicat D₁
f: total_bicat D₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr1
  (transportf
     (mor_disp
        (pr2
           (let X := pr1 (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)
              in
            let X0 := pr1 X in X0))
        (pr2
           (let X :=
              pr1
                (comp_psfunctor
                   (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)
                   (id_psfunctor (total_bicat D₁))) in
            let X0 := pr1 X in X0)))
     (idpath
        (pr1
           (total_pstrans_data FF
              (disp_pseudo_comp (id_psfunctor B₁) F D₁
                 D₁ D₂ (disp_pseudo_id D₁) FF)
              (rinvunitor_pstrans F)
              disp_rinvunitor_pstrans_data)))
     (pr2 (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)) x y f) =
pr1
  (pr2
     (total_pstrans_data FF
        (disp_pseudo_comp (id_psfunctor B₁) F D₁ D₁ D₂
           (disp_pseudo_id D₁) FF)
        (rinvunitor_pstrans F)
        disp_rinvunitor_pstrans_data) x y f)

      apply idpath.
  
B₁, B₂: bicat
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
FF: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F
PP:= rinvunitor_pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF): pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)
  (comp_psfunctor (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F FF)
     (id_psfunctor (total_bicat D₁)))
PP2:= pstrans_to_is_pstrans PP: is_pstrans (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)
X: pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP =
total_pstrans_data FF
  (disp_pseudo_comp (id_psfunctor B₁) F D₁ D₁ D₂
     (disp_pseudo_id D₁) FF)
  (rinvunitor_pstrans F)
  disp_rinvunitor_pstrans_data
is_pstrans
  (total_pstrans_data FF
     (disp_pseudo_comp (id_psfunctor B₁) F D₁ D₁ D₂
        (disp_pseudo_id D₁) FF) (rinvunitor_pstrans F)
     disp_rinvunitor_pstrans_data)
 exact (transportf is_pstrans X PP2).
Qed.

Definition disp_rinvunitor_pstrans
  : disp_pstrans
      FF
      (disp_pseudo_comp _ _ _ _ _ (disp_pseudo_id D₁) FF)
      (rinvunitor_pstrans F)
  := disp_rinvunitor_pstrans_data,, disp_rinvunitor_pstrans_laws.
End DispTransUnitality.

Section DispTransAssociativiy.
Context {B₁ B₂ B₃ B₄ : bicat}
        {F₁ : psfunctor B₁ B₂}
        {F₂ : psfunctor B₂ B₃}
        {F₃ : psfunctor B₃ B₄}
        {D₁ : disp_bicat B₁} {D₂ : disp_bicat B₂}
        {D₃ : disp_bicat B₃} {D₄ : disp_bicat B₄}
        (FF₁ : disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁)
        (FF₂ : disp_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂)
        (FF₃ : disp_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃).


B₁, B₂, B₃, B₄: bicat
F₁: psfunctor B₁ B₂
F₂: psfunctor B₂ B₃
F₃: psfunctor B₃ B₄
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
D₃: disp_bicat B₃
D₄: disp_bicat B₄
FF₁: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁
FF₂: disp_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂
FF₃: disp_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃
disp_pstrans_data
  (disp_pseudo_comp (comp_psfunctor F₂ F₁) F₃ D₁ D₃ D₄
     (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ F₂ D₁ D₂ D₃ FF₁ FF₂) FF₃)
  (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ (comp_psfunctor F₃ F₂) D₁ D₂ D₄
     FF₁ (disp_pseudo_comp F₂ F₃ D₂ D₃ D₄ FF₂ FF₃))
  (lassociator_pstrans F₁ F₂ F₃)


B₁, B₂, B₃, B₄: bicat
F₁: psfunctor B₁ B₂
F₂: psfunctor B₂ B₃
F₃: psfunctor B₃ B₄
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
D₃: disp_bicat B₃
D₄: disp_bicat B₄
FF₁: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁
FF₂: disp_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂
FF₃: disp_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃
disp_pstrans_data
  (disp_pseudo_comp (comp_psfunctor F₂ F₁) F₃ D₁ D₃ D₄
     (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ F₂ D₁ D₂ D₃ FF₁ FF₂) FF₃)
  (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ (comp_psfunctor F₃ F₂) D₁ D₂ D₄
     FF₁ (disp_pseudo_comp F₂ F₃ D₂ D₃ D₄ FF₂ FF₃))
  (lassociator_pstrans F₁ F₂ F₃)

  
B₁, B₂, B₃, B₄: bicat
F₁: psfunctor B₁ B₂
F₂: psfunctor B₂ B₃
F₃: psfunctor B₃ B₄
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
D₃: disp_bicat B₃
D₄: disp_bicat B₄
FF₁: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁
FF₂: disp_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂
FF₃: disp_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃
∏ (x : B₁) (xx : D₁ x),
disp_pseudo_comp (comp_psfunctor F₂ F₁) F₃ D₁ D₃ D₄
  (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ F₂ D₁ D₂ D₃ FF₁ FF₂) FF₃ x xx -->[
lassociator_pstrans F₁ F₂ F₃ x] disp_pseudo_comp F₁
                                  (comp_psfunctor F₃
                                     F₂) D₁ D₂ D₄ FF₁
                                  (disp_pseudo_comp F₂
                                     F₃ D₂ D₃ D₄ FF₂
                                     FF₃) x xx
B₁, B₂, B₃, B₄: bicat
F₁: psfunctor B₁ B₂
F₂: psfunctor B₂ B₃
F₃: psfunctor B₃ B₄
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
D₃: disp_bicat B₃
D₄: disp_bicat B₄
FF₁: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁
FF₂: disp_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂
FF₃: disp_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃
∏ (x y : B₁) (f : B₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧) (xx : D₁ x) (yy : D₁ y)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy),
disp_invertible_2cell
  (psnaturality_of (lassociator_pstrans F₁ F₂ F₃) f)
  (?αα₁ x xx ;; ♯ (disp_pseudo_comp F₁
                     (comp_psfunctor F₃ F₂) D₁ D₂ D₄
                     FF₁
                     (disp_pseudo_comp F₂ F₃ D₂ D₃ D₄
                        FF₂ FF₃)) ff)
  (♯ (disp_pseudo_comp (comp_psfunctor F₂ F₁) F₃ D₁ D₃
        D₄ (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ F₂ D₁ D₂ D₃ FF₁ FF₂)
        FF₃) ff ;; ?αα₁ y yy)

  
B₁, B₂, B₃, B₄: bicat
F₁: psfunctor B₁ B₂
F₂: psfunctor B₂ B₃
F₃: psfunctor B₃ B₄
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
D₃: disp_bicat B₃
D₄: disp_bicat B₄
FF₁: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁
FF₂: disp_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂
FF₃: disp_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃
∏ (x : B₁) (xx : D₁ x),
disp_pseudo_comp (comp_psfunctor F₂ F₁) F₃ D₁ D₃ D₄
  (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ F₂ D₁ D₂ D₃ FF₁ FF₂) FF₃ x xx -->[
lassociator_pstrans F₁ F₂ F₃ x] disp_pseudo_comp F₁
                                  (comp_psfunctor F₃
                                     F₂) D₁ D₂ D₄ FF₁
                                  (disp_pseudo_comp F₂
                                     F₃ D₂ D₃ D₄ FF₂
                                     FF₃) x xx
 exact (λ x xx, id_disp (_ x xx)).
  
B₁, B₂, B₃, B₄: bicat
F₁: psfunctor B₁ B₂
F₂: psfunctor B₂ B₃
F₃: psfunctor B₃ B₄
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
D₃: disp_bicat B₃
D₄: disp_bicat B₄
FF₁: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁
FF₂: disp_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂
FF₃: disp_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃
∏ (x y : B₁) (f : B₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧) (xx : D₁ x) (yy : D₁ y)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy),
disp_invertible_2cell
  (psnaturality_of (lassociator_pstrans F₁ F₂ F₃) f)
  ((λ (x0 : B₁) (xx0 : D₁ x0),
    id_disp
      (disp_pseudo_comp (comp_psfunctor F₂ F₁) F₃ D₁
         D₃ D₄
         (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ F₂ D₁ D₂ D₃ FF₁ FF₂) FF₃
         x0 xx0)) x xx ;; ♯ (disp_pseudo_comp F₁
                               (comp_psfunctor F₃ F₂)
                               D₁ D₂ D₄ FF₁
                               (disp_pseudo_comp F₂ F₃
                                  D₂ D₃ D₄ FF₂ FF₃))
                            ff)
  (♯ (disp_pseudo_comp (comp_psfunctor F₂ F₁) F₃ D₁ D₃
        D₄ (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ F₂ D₁ D₂ D₃ FF₁ FF₂)
        FF₃) ff ;; (λ (x0 : B₁) (xx0 : D₁ x0),
                    id_disp
                      (disp_pseudo_comp
                         (comp_psfunctor F₂ F₁) F₃ D₁
                         D₃ D₄
                         (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ F₂ D₁ D₂
                            D₃ FF₁ FF₂) FF₃ x0 xx0)) y
                     yy)
 
B₁, B₂, B₃, B₄: bicat
F₁: psfunctor B₁ B₂
F₂: psfunctor B₂ B₃
F₃: psfunctor B₃ B₄
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
D₃: disp_bicat B₃
D₄: disp_bicat B₄
FF₁: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁
FF₂: disp_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂
FF₃: disp_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃
∏ (x y : B₁) (f : B₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧) (xx : D₁ x) (yy : D₁ y)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy),
disp_invertible_2cell
  (make_invertible_2cell
     (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
        (is_invertible_2cell_lunitor
           (# F₃ (# F₂ (# F₁ f))))
        (is_invertible_2cell_rinvunitor
           (# F₃ (# F₂ (# F₁ f))))))
  (id_disp (FF₃ (F₂ (F₁ x)) (FF₂ (F₁ x) (FF₁ x xx))) ;; 
   ♯ FF₃ (♯ FF₂ (♯ FF₁ ff)))
  (♯ FF₃ (♯ FF₂ (♯ FF₁ ff)) ;; id_disp
                                 (FF₃ (F₂ (F₁ y))
                                    (FF₂ (F₁ y)
                                       (FF₁ y yy))))

    
B₁, B₂, B₃, B₄: bicat
F₁: psfunctor B₁ B₂
F₂: psfunctor B₂ B₃
F₃: psfunctor B₃ B₄
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
D₃: disp_bicat B₃
D₄: disp_bicat B₄
FF₁: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁
FF₂: disp_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂
FF₃: disp_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃
x, y: B₁
f: B₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
disp_invertible_2cell
  (make_invertible_2cell
     (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
        (is_invertible_2cell_lunitor
           (# F₃ (# F₂ (# F₁ f))))
        (is_invertible_2cell_rinvunitor
           (# F₃ (# F₂ (# F₁ f))))))
  (id_disp (FF₃ (F₂ (F₁ x)) (FF₂ (F₁ x) (FF₁ x xx))) ;; 
   ♯ FF₃ (♯ FF₂ (♯ FF₁ ff)))
  (♯ FF₃ (♯ FF₂ (♯ FF₁ ff)) ;; id_disp
                                 (FF₃ (F₂ (F₁ y))
                                    (FF₂ (F₁ y)
                                       (FF₁ y yy))))

    apply (vcomp_disp_invertible (disp_invertible_2cell_lunitor _)
                                 (disp_invertible_2cell_rinvunitor _)).
Defined.


B₁, B₂, B₃, B₄: bicat
F₁: psfunctor B₁ B₂
F₂: psfunctor B₂ B₃
F₃: psfunctor B₃ B₄
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
D₃: disp_bicat B₃
D₄: disp_bicat B₄
FF₁: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁
FF₂: disp_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂
FF₃: disp_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃
is_disp_pstrans
  (disp_pseudo_comp (comp_psfunctor F₂ F₁) F₃ D₁ D₃ D₄
     (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ F₂ D₁ D₂ D₃ FF₁ FF₂) FF₃)
  (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ (comp_psfunctor F₃ F₂) D₁ D₂ D₄
     FF₁ (disp_pseudo_comp F₂ F₃ D₂ D₃ D₄ FF₂ FF₃))
  (lassociator_pstrans F₁ F₂ F₃)
  disp_lassociator_pstrans_data


B₁, B₂, B₃, B₄: bicat
F₁: psfunctor B₁ B₂
F₂: psfunctor B₂ B₃
F₃: psfunctor B₃ B₄
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
D₃: disp_bicat B₃
D₄: disp_bicat B₄
FF₁: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁
FF₂: disp_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂
FF₃: disp_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃
is_disp_pstrans
  (disp_pseudo_comp (comp_psfunctor F₂ F₁) F₃ D₁ D₃ D₄
     (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ F₂ D₁ D₂ D₃ FF₁ FF₂) FF₃)
  (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ (comp_psfunctor F₃ F₂) D₁ D₂ D₄
     FF₁ (disp_pseudo_comp F₂ F₃ D₂ D₃ D₄ FF₂ FF₃))
  (lassociator_pstrans F₁ F₂ F₃)
  disp_lassociator_pstrans_data

  
B₁, B₂, B₃, B₄: bicat
F₁: psfunctor B₁ B₂
F₂: psfunctor B₂ B₃
F₃: psfunctor B₃ B₄
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
D₃: disp_bicat B₃
D₄: disp_bicat B₄
FF₁: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁
FF₂: disp_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂
FF₃: disp_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃
is_pstrans
  (total_pstrans_data
     (disp_pseudo_comp (comp_psfunctor F₂ F₁) F₃ D₁ D₃
        D₄ (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ F₂ D₁ D₂ D₃ FF₁ FF₂)
        FF₃)
     (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ (comp_psfunctor F₃ F₂) D₁ D₂
        D₄ FF₁
        (disp_pseudo_comp F₂ F₃ D₂ D₃ D₄ FF₂ FF₃))
     (lassociator_pstrans F₁ F₂ F₃)
     disp_lassociator_pstrans_data)

  
B₁, B₂, B₃, B₄: bicat
F₁: psfunctor B₁ B₂
F₂: psfunctor B₂ B₃
F₃: psfunctor B₃ B₄
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
D₃: disp_bicat B₃
D₄: disp_bicat B₄
FF₁: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁
FF₂: disp_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂
FF₃: disp_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃
PP:= lassociator_pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)
  (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂)
  (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃): pstrans
  (comp_psfunctor (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃)
     (comp_psfunctor
        (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂)
        (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)))
  (comp_psfunctor
     (comp_psfunctor
        (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃)
        (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂))
     (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁))
is_pstrans
  (total_pstrans_data
     (disp_pseudo_comp (comp_psfunctor F₂ F₁) F₃ D₁ D₃
        D₄ (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ F₂ D₁ D₂ D₃ FF₁ FF₂)
        FF₃)
     (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ (comp_psfunctor F₃ F₂) D₁ D₂
        D₄ FF₁
        (disp_pseudo_comp F₂ F₃ D₂ D₃ D₄ FF₂ FF₃))
     (lassociator_pstrans F₁ F₂ F₃)
     disp_lassociator_pstrans_data)

  
B₁, B₂, B₃, B₄: bicat
F₁: psfunctor B₁ B₂
F₂: psfunctor B₂ B₃
F₃: psfunctor B₃ B₄
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
D₃: disp_bicat B₃
D₄: disp_bicat B₄
FF₁: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁
FF₂: disp_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂
FF₃: disp_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃
PP:= lassociator_pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)
  (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂)
  (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃): pstrans
  (comp_psfunctor (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃)
     (comp_psfunctor
        (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂)
        (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)))
  (comp_psfunctor
     (comp_psfunctor
        (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃)
        (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂))
     (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁))
PP2:= pstrans_to_is_pstrans PP: is_pstrans (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)
is_pstrans
  (total_pstrans_data
     (disp_pseudo_comp (comp_psfunctor F₂ F₁) F₃ D₁ D₃
        D₄ (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ F₂ D₁ D₂ D₃ FF₁ FF₂)
        FF₃)
     (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ (comp_psfunctor F₃ F₂) D₁ D₂
        D₄ FF₁
        (disp_pseudo_comp F₂ F₃ D₂ D₃ D₄ FF₂ FF₃))
     (lassociator_pstrans F₁ F₂ F₃)
     disp_lassociator_pstrans_data)

  
B₁, B₂, B₃, B₄: bicat
F₁: psfunctor B₁ B₂
F₂: psfunctor B₂ B₃
F₃: psfunctor B₃ B₄
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
D₃: disp_bicat B₃
D₄: disp_bicat B₄
FF₁: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁
FF₂: disp_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂
FF₃: disp_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃
PP:= lassociator_pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)
  (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂)
  (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃): pstrans
  (comp_psfunctor (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃)
     (comp_psfunctor
        (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂)
        (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)))
  (comp_psfunctor
     (comp_psfunctor
        (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃)
        (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂))
     (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁))
PP2:= pstrans_to_is_pstrans PP: is_pstrans (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)
pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP =
total_pstrans_data
  (disp_pseudo_comp (comp_psfunctor F₂ F₁) F₃ D₁ D₃ D₄
     (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ F₂ D₁ D₂ D₃ FF₁ FF₂) FF₃)
  (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ (comp_psfunctor F₃ F₂) D₁ D₂ D₄
     FF₁ (disp_pseudo_comp F₂ F₃ D₂ D₃ D₄ FF₂ FF₃))
  (lassociator_pstrans F₁ F₂ F₃)
  disp_lassociator_pstrans_data
B₁, B₂, B₃, B₄: bicat
F₁: psfunctor B₁ B₂
F₂: psfunctor B₂ B₃
F₃: psfunctor B₃ B₄
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
D₃: disp_bicat B₃
D₄: disp_bicat B₄
FF₁: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁
FF₂: disp_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂
FF₃: disp_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃
PP:= lassociator_pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)
  (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂)
  (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃): pstrans
  (comp_psfunctor (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃)
     (comp_psfunctor
        (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂)
        (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)))
  (comp_psfunctor
     (comp_psfunctor
        (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃)
        (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂))
     (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁))
PP2:= pstrans_to_is_pstrans PP: is_pstrans (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)
X: pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP =
total_pstrans_data
  (disp_pseudo_comp (comp_psfunctor F₂ F₁) F₃ D₁
     D₃ D₄
     (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ F₂ D₁ D₂ D₃ FF₁ FF₂) FF₃)
  (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ (comp_psfunctor F₃ F₂) D₁
     D₂ D₄ FF₁
     (disp_pseudo_comp F₂ F₃ D₂ D₃ D₄ FF₂ FF₃))
  (lassociator_pstrans F₁ F₂ F₃)
  disp_lassociator_pstrans_data
is_pstrans
  (total_pstrans_data
     (disp_pseudo_comp (comp_psfunctor F₂ F₁) F₃ D₁ D₃
        D₄ (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ F₂ D₁ D₂ D₃ FF₁ FF₂)
        FF₃)
     (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ (comp_psfunctor F₃ F₂) D₁ D₂
        D₄ FF₁
        (disp_pseudo_comp F₂ F₃ D₂ D₃ D₄ FF₂ FF₃))
     (lassociator_pstrans F₁ F₂ F₃)
     disp_lassociator_pstrans_data)

  
B₁, B₂, B₃, B₄: bicat
F₁: psfunctor B₁ B₂
F₂: psfunctor B₂ B₃
F₃: psfunctor B₃ B₄
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
D₃: disp_bicat B₃
D₄: disp_bicat B₄
FF₁: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁
FF₂: disp_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂
FF₃: disp_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃
PP:= lassociator_pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)
  (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂)
  (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃): pstrans
  (comp_psfunctor (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃)
     (comp_psfunctor
        (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂)
        (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)))
  (comp_psfunctor
     (comp_psfunctor
        (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃)
        (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂))
     (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁))
PP2:= pstrans_to_is_pstrans PP: is_pstrans (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)
pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP =
total_pstrans_data
  (disp_pseudo_comp (comp_psfunctor F₂ F₁) F₃ D₁ D₃ D₄
     (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ F₂ D₁ D₂ D₃ FF₁ FF₂) FF₃)
  (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ (comp_psfunctor F₃ F₂) D₁ D₂ D₄
     FF₁ (disp_pseudo_comp F₂ F₃ D₂ D₃ D₄ FF₂ FF₃))
  (lassociator_pstrans F₁ F₂ F₃)
  disp_lassociator_pstrans_data
 
B₁, B₂, B₃, B₄: bicat
F₁: psfunctor B₁ B₂
F₂: psfunctor B₂ B₃
F₃: psfunctor B₃ B₄
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
D₃: disp_bicat B₃
D₄: disp_bicat B₄
FF₁: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁
FF₂: disp_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂
FF₃: disp_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃
PP:= lassociator_pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)
  (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂)
  (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃): pstrans
  (comp_psfunctor (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃)
     (comp_psfunctor
        (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂)
        (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)))
  (comp_psfunctor
     (comp_psfunctor
        (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃)
        (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂))
     (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁))
PP2:= pstrans_to_is_pstrans PP: is_pstrans (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)
pr1 (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP) =
pr1
  (total_pstrans_data
     (disp_pseudo_comp (comp_psfunctor F₂ F₁) F₃ D₁ D₃
        D₄ (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ F₂ D₁ D₂ D₃ FF₁ FF₂)
        FF₃)
     (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ (comp_psfunctor F₃ F₂) D₁ D₂
        D₄ FF₁
        (disp_pseudo_comp F₂ F₃ D₂ D₃ D₄ FF₂ FF₃))
     (lassociator_pstrans F₁ F₂ F₃)
     disp_lassociator_pstrans_data)
B₁, B₂, B₃, B₄: bicat
F₁: psfunctor B₁ B₂
F₂: psfunctor B₂ B₃
F₃: psfunctor B₃ B₄
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
D₃: disp_bicat B₃
D₄: disp_bicat B₄
FF₁: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁
FF₂: disp_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂
FF₃: disp_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃
PP:= lassociator_pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)
  (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂)
  (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃): pstrans
  (comp_psfunctor (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃)
     (comp_psfunctor
        (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂)
        (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)))
  (comp_psfunctor
     (comp_psfunctor
        (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃)
        (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂))
     (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁))
PP2:= pstrans_to_is_pstrans PP: is_pstrans (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr2
        (let X :=
           pr1
             (comp_psfunctor
                (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃)
                (comp_psfunctor
                   (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂)
                   (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁))) in
         let X0 := pr1 X in X0))
     (pr2
        (let X :=
           pr1
             (comp_psfunctor
                (comp_psfunctor
                   (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃)
                   (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂))
                (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)) in
         let X0 := pr1 X in X0))) ?p
  (pr2 (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)) =
pr2
  (total_pstrans_data
     (disp_pseudo_comp (comp_psfunctor F₂ F₁) F₃ D₁ D₃
        D₄ (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ F₂ D₁ D₂ D₃ FF₁ FF₂)
        FF₃)
     (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ (comp_psfunctor F₃ F₂) D₁ D₂
        D₄ FF₁
        (disp_pseudo_comp F₂ F₃ D₂ D₃ D₄ FF₂ FF₃))
     (lassociator_pstrans F₁ F₂ F₃)
     disp_lassociator_pstrans_data)

    
B₁, B₂, B₃, B₄: bicat
F₁: psfunctor B₁ B₂
F₂: psfunctor B₂ B₃
F₃: psfunctor B₃ B₄
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
D₃: disp_bicat B₃
D₄: disp_bicat B₄
FF₁: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁
FF₂: disp_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂
FF₃: disp_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃
PP:= lassociator_pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)
  (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂)
  (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃): pstrans
  (comp_psfunctor (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃)
     (comp_psfunctor
        (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂)
        (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)))
  (comp_psfunctor
     (comp_psfunctor
        (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃)
        (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂))
     (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁))
PP2:= pstrans_to_is_pstrans PP: is_pstrans (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)
pr1 (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP) =
pr1
  (total_pstrans_data
     (disp_pseudo_comp (comp_psfunctor F₂ F₁) F₃ D₁ D₃
        D₄ (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ F₂ D₁ D₂ D₃ FF₁ FF₂)
        FF₃)
     (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ (comp_psfunctor F₃ F₂) D₁ D₂
        D₄ FF₁
        (disp_pseudo_comp F₂ F₃ D₂ D₃ D₄ FF₂ FF₃))
     (lassociator_pstrans F₁ F₂ F₃)
     disp_lassociator_pstrans_data)
 apply idpath.
    
B₁, B₂, B₃, B₄: bicat
F₁: psfunctor B₁ B₂
F₂: psfunctor B₂ B₃
F₃: psfunctor B₃ B₄
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
D₃: disp_bicat B₃
D₄: disp_bicat B₄
FF₁: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁
FF₂: disp_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂
FF₃: disp_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃
PP:= lassociator_pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)
  (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂)
  (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃): pstrans
  (comp_psfunctor (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃)
     (comp_psfunctor
        (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂)
        (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)))
  (comp_psfunctor
     (comp_psfunctor
        (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃)
        (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂))
     (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁))
PP2:= pstrans_to_is_pstrans PP: is_pstrans (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr2
        (let X :=
           pr1
             (comp_psfunctor
                (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃)
                (comp_psfunctor
                   (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂)
                   (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁))) in
         let X0 := pr1 X in X0))
     (pr2
        (let X :=
           pr1
             (comp_psfunctor
                (comp_psfunctor
                   (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃)
                   (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂))
                (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)) in
         let X0 := pr1 X in X0)))
  (idpath
     (pr1
        (total_pstrans_data
           (disp_pseudo_comp (comp_psfunctor F₂ F₁) F₃
              D₁ D₃ D₄
              (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ F₂ D₁ D₂ D₃ FF₁ FF₂)
              FF₃)
           (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ (comp_psfunctor F₃ F₂)
              D₁ D₂ D₄ FF₁
              (disp_pseudo_comp F₂ F₃ D₂ D₃ D₄ FF₂ FF₃))
           (lassociator_pstrans F₁ F₂ F₃)
           disp_lassociator_pstrans_data)))
  (pr2 (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)) =
pr2
  (total_pstrans_data
     (disp_pseudo_comp (comp_psfunctor F₂ F₁) F₃ D₁ D₃
        D₄ (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ F₂ D₁ D₂ D₃ FF₁ FF₂)
        FF₃)
     (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ (comp_psfunctor F₃ F₂) D₁ D₂
        D₄ FF₁
        (disp_pseudo_comp F₂ F₃ D₂ D₃ D₄ FF₂ FF₃))
     (lassociator_pstrans F₁ F₂ F₃)
     disp_lassociator_pstrans_data)
 
B₁, B₂, B₃, B₄: bicat
F₁: psfunctor B₁ B₂
F₂: psfunctor B₂ B₃
F₃: psfunctor B₃ B₄
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
D₃: disp_bicat B₃
D₄: disp_bicat B₄
FF₁: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁
FF₂: disp_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂
FF₃: disp_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃
PP:= lassociator_pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)
  (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂)
  (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃): pstrans
  (comp_psfunctor (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃)
     (comp_psfunctor
        (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂)
        (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)))
  (comp_psfunctor
     (comp_psfunctor
        (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃)
        (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂))
     (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁))
PP2:= pstrans_to_is_pstrans PP: is_pstrans (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr2
        (let X :=
           pr1
             (comp_psfunctor
                (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃)
                (comp_psfunctor
                   (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂)
                   (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁))) in
         let X0 := pr1 X in X0))
     (pr2
        (let X :=
           pr1
             (comp_psfunctor
                (comp_psfunctor
                   (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃)
                   (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂))
                (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)) in
         let X0 := pr1 X in X0)))
  (idpath
     (pr1
        (total_pstrans_data
           (disp_pseudo_comp (comp_psfunctor F₂ F₁) F₃
              D₁ D₃ D₄
              (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ F₂ D₁ D₂ D₃ FF₁ FF₂)
              FF₃)
           (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ (comp_psfunctor F₃ F₂)
              D₁ D₂ D₄ FF₁
              (disp_pseudo_comp F₂ F₃ D₂ D₃ D₄ FF₂ FF₃))
           (lassociator_pstrans F₁ F₂ F₃)
           disp_lassociator_pstrans_data)))
  (pr2 (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)) ~
pr2
  (total_pstrans_data
     (disp_pseudo_comp (comp_psfunctor F₂ F₁) F₃ D₁ D₃
        D₄ (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ F₂ D₁ D₂ D₃ FF₁ FF₂)
        FF₃)
     (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ (comp_psfunctor F₃ F₂) D₁ D₂
        D₄ FF₁
        (disp_pseudo_comp F₂ F₃ D₂ D₃ D₄ FF₂ FF₃))
     (lassociator_pstrans F₁ F₂ F₃)
     disp_lassociator_pstrans_data)
 
B₁, B₂, B₃, B₄: bicat
F₁: psfunctor B₁ B₂
F₂: psfunctor B₂ B₃
F₃: psfunctor B₃ B₄
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
D₃: disp_bicat B₃
D₄: disp_bicat B₄
FF₁: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁
FF₂: disp_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂
FF₃: disp_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃
PP:= lassociator_pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)
  (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂)
  (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃): pstrans
  (comp_psfunctor (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃)
     (comp_psfunctor
        (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂)
        (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)))
  (comp_psfunctor
     (comp_psfunctor
        (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃)
        (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂))
     (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁))
PP2:= pstrans_to_is_pstrans PP: is_pstrans (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)
x: total_bicat D₁
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr2
        (let X :=
           pr1
             (comp_psfunctor
                (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃)
                (comp_psfunctor
                   (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂)
                   (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁))) in
         let X0 := pr1 X in X0))
     (pr2
        (let X :=
           pr1
             (comp_psfunctor
                (comp_psfunctor
                   (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃)
                   (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂))
                (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)) in
         let X0 := pr1 X in X0)))
  (idpath
     (pr1
        (total_pstrans_data
           (disp_pseudo_comp (comp_psfunctor F₂ F₁) F₃
              D₁ D₃ D₄
              (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ F₂ D₁ D₂ D₃ FF₁ FF₂)
              FF₃)
           (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ (comp_psfunctor F₃ F₂)
              D₁ D₂ D₄ FF₁
              (disp_pseudo_comp F₂ F₃ D₂ D₃ D₄ FF₂ FF₃))
           (lassociator_pstrans F₁ F₂ F₃)
           disp_lassociator_pstrans_data)))
  (pr2 (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)) x =
pr2
  (total_pstrans_data
     (disp_pseudo_comp (comp_psfunctor F₂ F₁) F₃ D₁ D₃
        D₄ (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ F₂ D₁ D₂ D₃ FF₁ FF₂)
        FF₃)
     (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ (comp_psfunctor F₃ F₂) D₁ D₂
        D₄ FF₁
        (disp_pseudo_comp F₂ F₃ D₂ D₃ D₄ FF₂ FF₃))
     (lassociator_pstrans F₁ F₂ F₃)
     disp_lassociator_pstrans_data) x

      
B₁, B₂, B₃, B₄: bicat
F₁: psfunctor B₁ B₂
F₂: psfunctor B₂ B₃
F₃: psfunctor B₃ B₄
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
D₃: disp_bicat B₃
D₄: disp_bicat B₄
FF₁: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁
FF₂: disp_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂
FF₃: disp_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃
PP:= lassociator_pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)
  (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂)
  (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃): pstrans
  (comp_psfunctor (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃)
     (comp_psfunctor
        (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂)
        (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)))
  (comp_psfunctor
     (comp_psfunctor
        (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃)
        (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂))
     (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁))
PP2:= pstrans_to_is_pstrans PP: is_pstrans (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)
x: total_bicat D₁
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr2
        (let X :=
           pr1
             (comp_psfunctor
                (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃)
                (comp_psfunctor
                   (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂)
                   (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁))) in
         let X0 := pr1 X in X0))
     (pr2
        (let X :=
           pr1
             (comp_psfunctor
                (comp_psfunctor
                   (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃)
                   (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂))
                (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)) in
         let X0 := pr1 X in X0)))
  (idpath
     (pr1
        (total_pstrans_data
           (disp_pseudo_comp (comp_psfunctor F₂ F₁) F₃
              D₁ D₃ D₄
              (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ F₂ D₁ D₂ D₃ FF₁ FF₂)
              FF₃)
           (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ (comp_psfunctor F₃ F₂)
              D₁ D₂ D₄ FF₁
              (disp_pseudo_comp F₂ F₃ D₂ D₃ D₄ FF₂ FF₃))
           (lassociator_pstrans F₁ F₂ F₃)
           disp_lassociator_pstrans_data)))
  (pr2 (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)) x ~
pr2
  (total_pstrans_data
     (disp_pseudo_comp (comp_psfunctor F₂ F₁) F₃ D₁ D₃
        D₄ (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ F₂ D₁ D₂ D₃ FF₁ FF₂)
        FF₃)
     (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ (comp_psfunctor F₃ F₂) D₁ D₂
        D₄ FF₁
        (disp_pseudo_comp F₂ F₃ D₂ D₃ D₄ FF₂ FF₃))
     (lassociator_pstrans F₁ F₂ F₃)
     disp_lassociator_pstrans_data) x
 
B₁, B₂, B₃, B₄: bicat
F₁: psfunctor B₁ B₂
F₂: psfunctor B₂ B₃
F₃: psfunctor B₃ B₄
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
D₃: disp_bicat B₃
D₄: disp_bicat B₄
FF₁: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁
FF₂: disp_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂
FF₃: disp_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃
PP:= lassociator_pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)
  (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂)
  (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃): pstrans
  (comp_psfunctor (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃)
     (comp_psfunctor
        (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂)
        (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)))
  (comp_psfunctor
     (comp_psfunctor
        (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃)
        (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂))
     (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁))
PP2:= pstrans_to_is_pstrans PP: is_pstrans (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)
x, y: total_bicat D₁
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr2
        (let X :=
           pr1
             (comp_psfunctor
                (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃)
                (comp_psfunctor
                   (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂)
                   (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁))) in
         let X0 := pr1 X in X0))
     (pr2
        (let X :=
           pr1
             (comp_psfunctor
                (comp_psfunctor
                   (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃)
                   (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂))
                (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)) in
         let X0 := pr1 X in X0)))
  (idpath
     (pr1
        (total_pstrans_data
           (disp_pseudo_comp (comp_psfunctor F₂ F₁) F₃
              D₁ D₃ D₄
              (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ F₂ D₁ D₂ D₃ FF₁ FF₂)
              FF₃)
           (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ (comp_psfunctor F₃ F₂)
              D₁ D₂ D₄ FF₁
              (disp_pseudo_comp F₂ F₃ D₂ D₃ D₄ FF₂ FF₃))
           (lassociator_pstrans F₁ F₂ F₃)
           disp_lassociator_pstrans_data)))
  (pr2 (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)) x y =
pr2
  (total_pstrans_data
     (disp_pseudo_comp (comp_psfunctor F₂ F₁) F₃ D₁ D₃
        D₄ (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ F₂ D₁ D₂ D₃ FF₁ FF₂)
        FF₃)
     (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ (comp_psfunctor F₃ F₂) D₁ D₂
        D₄ FF₁
        (disp_pseudo_comp F₂ F₃ D₂ D₃ D₄ FF₂ FF₃))
     (lassociator_pstrans F₁ F₂ F₃)
     disp_lassociator_pstrans_data) x y

      
B₁, B₂, B₃, B₄: bicat
F₁: psfunctor B₁ B₂
F₂: psfunctor B₂ B₃
F₃: psfunctor B₃ B₄
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
D₃: disp_bicat B₃
D₄: disp_bicat B₄
FF₁: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁
FF₂: disp_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂
FF₃: disp_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃
PP:= lassociator_pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)
  (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂)
  (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃): pstrans
  (comp_psfunctor (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃)
     (comp_psfunctor
        (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂)
        (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)))
  (comp_psfunctor
     (comp_psfunctor
        (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃)
        (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂))
     (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁))
PP2:= pstrans_to_is_pstrans PP: is_pstrans (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)
x, y: total_bicat D₁
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr2
        (let X :=
           pr1
             (comp_psfunctor
                (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃)
                (comp_psfunctor
                   (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂)
                   (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁))) in
         let X0 := pr1 X in X0))
     (pr2
        (let X :=
           pr1
             (comp_psfunctor
                (comp_psfunctor
                   (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃)
                   (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂))
                (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)) in
         let X0 := pr1 X in X0)))
  (idpath
     (pr1
        (total_pstrans_data
           (disp_pseudo_comp (comp_psfunctor F₂ F₁) F₃
              D₁ D₃ D₄
              (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ F₂ D₁ D₂ D₃ FF₁ FF₂)
              FF₃)
           (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ (comp_psfunctor F₃ F₂)
              D₁ D₂ D₄ FF₁
              (disp_pseudo_comp F₂ F₃ D₂ D₃ D₄ FF₂ FF₃))
           (lassociator_pstrans F₁ F₂ F₃)
           disp_lassociator_pstrans_data)))
  (pr2 (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)) x y ~
pr2
  (total_pstrans_data
     (disp_pseudo_comp (comp_psfunctor F₂ F₁) F₃ D₁ D₃
        D₄ (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ F₂ D₁ D₂ D₃ FF₁ FF₂)
        FF₃)
     (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ (comp_psfunctor F₃ F₂) D₁ D₂
        D₄ FF₁
        (disp_pseudo_comp F₂ F₃ D₂ D₃ D₄ FF₂ FF₃))
     (lassociator_pstrans F₁ F₂ F₃)
     disp_lassociator_pstrans_data) x y
 
B₁, B₂, B₃, B₄: bicat
F₁: psfunctor B₁ B₂
F₂: psfunctor B₂ B₃
F₃: psfunctor B₃ B₄
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
D₃: disp_bicat B₃
D₄: disp_bicat B₄
FF₁: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁
FF₂: disp_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂
FF₃: disp_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃
PP:= lassociator_pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)
  (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂)
  (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃): pstrans
  (comp_psfunctor (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃)
     (comp_psfunctor
        (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂)
        (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)))
  (comp_psfunctor
     (comp_psfunctor
        (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃)
        (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂))
     (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁))
PP2:= pstrans_to_is_pstrans PP: is_pstrans (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)
x, y: total_bicat D₁
f: total_bicat D₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr2
        (let X :=
           pr1
             (comp_psfunctor
                (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃)
                (comp_psfunctor
                   (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂)
                   (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁))) in
         let X0 := pr1 X in X0))
     (pr2
        (let X :=
           pr1
             (comp_psfunctor
                (comp_psfunctor
                   (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃)
                   (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂))
                (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)) in
         let X0 := pr1 X in X0)))
  (idpath
     (pr1
        (total_pstrans_data
           (disp_pseudo_comp (comp_psfunctor F₂ F₁) F₃
              D₁ D₃ D₄
              (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ F₂ D₁ D₂ D₃ FF₁ FF₂)
              FF₃)
           (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ (comp_psfunctor F₃ F₂)
              D₁ D₂ D₄ FF₁
              (disp_pseudo_comp F₂ F₃ D₂ D₃ D₄ FF₂ FF₃))
           (lassociator_pstrans F₁ F₂ F₃)
           disp_lassociator_pstrans_data)))
  (pr2 (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)) x y f =
pr2
  (total_pstrans_data
     (disp_pseudo_comp (comp_psfunctor F₂ F₁) F₃ D₁ D₃
        D₄ (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ F₂ D₁ D₂ D₃ FF₁ FF₂)
        FF₃)
     (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ (comp_psfunctor F₃ F₂) D₁ D₂
        D₄ FF₁
        (disp_pseudo_comp F₂ F₃ D₂ D₃ D₄ FF₂ FF₃))
     (lassociator_pstrans F₁ F₂ F₃)
     disp_lassociator_pstrans_data) x y f

      
B₁, B₂, B₃, B₄: bicat
F₁: psfunctor B₁ B₂
F₂: psfunctor B₂ B₃
F₃: psfunctor B₃ B₄
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
D₃: disp_bicat B₃
D₄: disp_bicat B₄
FF₁: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁
FF₂: disp_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂
FF₃: disp_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃
PP:= lassociator_pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)
  (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂)
  (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃): pstrans
  (comp_psfunctor (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃)
     (comp_psfunctor
        (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂)
        (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)))
  (comp_psfunctor
     (comp_psfunctor
        (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃)
        (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂))
     (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁))
PP2:= pstrans_to_is_pstrans PP: is_pstrans (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)
x, y: total_bicat D₁
f: total_bicat D₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
isPredicate is_invertible_2cell
B₁, B₂, B₃, B₄: bicat
F₁: psfunctor B₁ B₂
F₂: psfunctor B₂ B₃
F₃: psfunctor B₃ B₄
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
D₃: disp_bicat B₃
D₄: disp_bicat B₄
FF₁: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁
FF₂: disp_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂
FF₃: disp_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃
PP:= lassociator_pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)
  (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂)
  (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃): pstrans
  (comp_psfunctor (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃)
     (comp_psfunctor
        (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂)
        (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)))
  (comp_psfunctor
     (comp_psfunctor
        (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃)
        (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂))
     (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁))
PP2:= pstrans_to_is_pstrans PP: is_pstrans (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)
x, y: total_bicat D₁
f: total_bicat D₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr1
  (transportf
     (mor_disp
        (pr2
           (let X :=
              pr1
                (comp_psfunctor
                   (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃)
                   (comp_psfunctor
                      (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂)
                      (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)))
              in
            let X0 := pr1 X in X0))
        (pr2
           (let X :=
              pr1
                (comp_psfunctor
                   (comp_psfunctor
                      (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃)
                      (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂))
                   (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)) in
            let X0 := pr1 X in X0)))
     (idpath
        (pr1
           (total_pstrans_data
              (disp_pseudo_comp (comp_psfunctor F₂ F₁)
                 F₃ D₁ D₃ D₄
                 (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ F₂ D₁ D₂ D₃ FF₁
                    FF₂) FF₃)
              (disp_pseudo_comp F₁
                 (comp_psfunctor F₃ F₂) D₁ D₂ D₄ FF₁
                 (disp_pseudo_comp F₂ F₃ D₂ D₃ D₄ FF₂
                    FF₃))
              (lassociator_pstrans F₁ F₂ F₃)
              disp_lassociator_pstrans_data)))
     (pr2 (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)) x y f) =
pr1
  (pr2
     (total_pstrans_data
        (disp_pseudo_comp (comp_psfunctor F₂ F₁) F₃ D₁
           D₃ D₄
           (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ F₂ D₁ D₂ D₃ FF₁ FF₂)
           FF₃)
        (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ (comp_psfunctor F₃ F₂) D₁
           D₂ D₄ FF₁
           (disp_pseudo_comp F₂ F₃ D₂ D₃ D₄ FF₂ FF₃))
        (lassociator_pstrans F₁ F₂ F₃)
        disp_lassociator_pstrans_data) x y f)

      
B₁, B₂, B₃, B₄: bicat
F₁: psfunctor B₁ B₂
F₂: psfunctor B₂ B₃
F₃: psfunctor B₃ B₄
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
D₃: disp_bicat B₃
D₄: disp_bicat B₄
FF₁: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁
FF₂: disp_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂
FF₃: disp_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃
PP:= lassociator_pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)
  (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂)
  (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃): pstrans
  (comp_psfunctor (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃)
     (comp_psfunctor
        (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂)
        (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)))
  (comp_psfunctor
     (comp_psfunctor
        (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃)
        (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂))
     (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁))
PP2:= pstrans_to_is_pstrans PP: is_pstrans (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)
x, y: total_bicat D₁
f: total_bicat D₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
isPredicate is_invertible_2cell
 
B₁, B₂, B₃, B₄: bicat
F₁: psfunctor B₁ B₂
F₂: psfunctor B₂ B₃
F₃: psfunctor B₃ B₄
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
D₃: disp_bicat B₃
D₄: disp_bicat B₄
FF₁: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁
FF₂: disp_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂
FF₃: disp_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃
PP:= lassociator_pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)
  (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂)
  (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃): pstrans
  (comp_psfunctor (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃)
     (comp_psfunctor
        (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂)
        (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)))
  (comp_psfunctor
     (comp_psfunctor
        (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃)
        (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂))
     (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁))
PP2:= pstrans_to_is_pstrans PP: is_pstrans (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)
x, y: total_bicat D₁
f: total_bicat D₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
x0: pr1
  (total_pstrans_data
     (disp_pseudo_comp (comp_psfunctor F₂ F₁) F₃
        D₁ D₃ D₄
        (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ F₂ D₁ D₂ D₃ FF₁ FF₂)
        FF₃)
     (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ (comp_psfunctor F₃ F₂)
        D₁ D₂ D₄ FF₁
        (disp_pseudo_comp F₂ F₃ D₂ D₃ D₄ FF₂ FF₃))
     (lassociator_pstrans F₁ F₂ F₃)
     disp_lassociator_pstrans_data) x
· pr2
    (let X :=
       pr1
         (comp_psfunctor
            (comp_psfunctor
               (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃)
               (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂))
            (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)) in
     let X0 := pr1 X in X0) x y f ==>
pr2
  (let X :=
     pr1
       (comp_psfunctor
          (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃)
          (comp_psfunctor
             (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂)
             (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁))) in
   let X0 := pr1 X in X0) x y f
· pr1
    (total_pstrans_data
       (disp_pseudo_comp (comp_psfunctor F₂ F₁)
          F₃ D₁ D₃ D₄
          (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ F₂ D₁ D₂ D₃ FF₁
             FF₂) FF₃)
       (disp_pseudo_comp F₁
          (comp_psfunctor F₃ F₂) D₁ D₂ D₄ FF₁
          (disp_pseudo_comp F₂ F₃ D₂ D₃ D₄ FF₂
             FF₃)) (lassociator_pstrans F₁ F₂ F₃)
       disp_lassociator_pstrans_data) y
isaprop (is_invertible_2cell x0)
 apply isaprop_is_invertible_2cell. 
B₁, B₂, B₃, B₄: bicat
F₁: psfunctor B₁ B₂
F₂: psfunctor B₂ B₃
F₃: psfunctor B₃ B₄
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
D₃: disp_bicat B₃
D₄: disp_bicat B₄
FF₁: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁
FF₂: disp_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂
FF₃: disp_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃
PP:= lassociator_pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)
  (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂)
  (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃): pstrans
  (comp_psfunctor (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃)
     (comp_psfunctor
        (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂)
        (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)))
  (comp_psfunctor
     (comp_psfunctor
        (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃)
        (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂))
     (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁))
PP2:= pstrans_to_is_pstrans PP: is_pstrans (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)
x, y: total_bicat D₁
f: total_bicat D₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr1
  (transportf
     (mor_disp
        (pr2
           (let X :=
              pr1
                (comp_psfunctor
                   (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃)
                   (comp_psfunctor
                      (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂)
                      (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)))
              in
            let X0 := pr1 X in X0))
        (pr2
           (let X :=
              pr1
                (comp_psfunctor
                   (comp_psfunctor
                      (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃)
                      (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂))
                   (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)) in
            let X0 := pr1 X in X0)))
     (idpath
        (pr1
           (total_pstrans_data
              (disp_pseudo_comp (comp_psfunctor F₂ F₁)
                 F₃ D₁ D₃ D₄
                 (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ F₂ D₁ D₂ D₃ FF₁
                    FF₂) FF₃)
              (disp_pseudo_comp F₁
                 (comp_psfunctor F₃ F₂) D₁ D₂ D₄ FF₁
                 (disp_pseudo_comp F₂ F₃ D₂ D₃ D₄ FF₂
                    FF₃))
              (lassociator_pstrans F₁ F₂ F₃)
              disp_lassociator_pstrans_data)))
     (pr2 (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)) x y f) =
pr1
  (pr2
     (total_pstrans_data
        (disp_pseudo_comp (comp_psfunctor F₂ F₁) F₃ D₁
           D₃ D₄
           (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ F₂ D₁ D₂ D₃ FF₁ FF₂)
           FF₃)
        (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ (comp_psfunctor F₃ F₂) D₁
           D₂ D₄ FF₁
           (disp_pseudo_comp F₂ F₃ D₂ D₃ D₄ FF₂ FF₃))
        (lassociator_pstrans F₁ F₂ F₃)
        disp_lassociator_pstrans_data) x y f)

      apply idpath.
  
B₁, B₂, B₃, B₄: bicat
F₁: psfunctor B₁ B₂
F₂: psfunctor B₂ B₃
F₃: psfunctor B₃ B₄
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
D₃: disp_bicat B₃
D₄: disp_bicat B₄
FF₁: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁
FF₂: disp_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂
FF₃: disp_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃
PP:= lassociator_pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)
  (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂)
  (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃): pstrans
  (comp_psfunctor (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃)
     (comp_psfunctor
        (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂)
        (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)))
  (comp_psfunctor
     (comp_psfunctor
        (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃)
        (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂))
     (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁))
PP2:= pstrans_to_is_pstrans PP: is_pstrans (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)
X: pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP =
total_pstrans_data
  (disp_pseudo_comp (comp_psfunctor F₂ F₁) F₃ D₁
     D₃ D₄
     (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ F₂ D₁ D₂ D₃ FF₁ FF₂) FF₃)
  (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ (comp_psfunctor F₃ F₂) D₁
     D₂ D₄ FF₁
     (disp_pseudo_comp F₂ F₃ D₂ D₃ D₄ FF₂ FF₃))
  (lassociator_pstrans F₁ F₂ F₃)
  disp_lassociator_pstrans_data
is_pstrans
  (total_pstrans_data
     (disp_pseudo_comp (comp_psfunctor F₂ F₁) F₃ D₁ D₃
        D₄ (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ F₂ D₁ D₂ D₃ FF₁ FF₂)
        FF₃)
     (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ (comp_psfunctor F₃ F₂) D₁ D₂
        D₄ FF₁
        (disp_pseudo_comp F₂ F₃ D₂ D₃ D₄ FF₂ FF₃))
     (lassociator_pstrans F₁ F₂ F₃)
     disp_lassociator_pstrans_data)
 exact (transportf is_pstrans X PP2).
Qed.

Definition disp_lassociator_pstrans
  : disp_pstrans
      (disp_pseudo_comp
         _ _ _ _ _
         (disp_pseudo_comp
            _ _ _ _ _
            FF₁
            FF₂)
         FF₃
      )
      (disp_pseudo_comp
         _ _ _ _ _
         FF₁
         (disp_pseudo_comp
            _ _ _ _ _
            FF₂
            FF₃)
      )
      (lassociator_pstrans F₁ F₂ F₃)
  := disp_lassociator_pstrans_data,, disp_lassociator_pstrans_laws.


B₁, B₂, B₃, B₄: bicat
F₁: psfunctor B₁ B₂
F₂: psfunctor B₂ B₃
F₃: psfunctor B₃ B₄
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
D₃: disp_bicat B₃
D₄: disp_bicat B₄
FF₁: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁
FF₂: disp_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂
FF₃: disp_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃
disp_pstrans_data
  (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ (comp_psfunctor F₃ F₂) D₁ D₂ D₄
     FF₁ (disp_pseudo_comp F₂ F₃ D₂ D₃ D₄ FF₂ FF₃))
  (disp_pseudo_comp (comp_psfunctor F₂ F₁) F₃ D₁ D₃ D₄
     (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ F₂ D₁ D₂ D₃ FF₁ FF₂) FF₃)
  (rassociator_pstrans F₁ F₂ F₃)


B₁, B₂, B₃, B₄: bicat
F₁: psfunctor B₁ B₂
F₂: psfunctor B₂ B₃
F₃: psfunctor B₃ B₄
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
D₃: disp_bicat B₃
D₄: disp_bicat B₄
FF₁: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁
FF₂: disp_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂
FF₃: disp_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃
disp_pstrans_data
  (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ (comp_psfunctor F₃ F₂) D₁ D₂ D₄
     FF₁ (disp_pseudo_comp F₂ F₃ D₂ D₃ D₄ FF₂ FF₃))
  (disp_pseudo_comp (comp_psfunctor F₂ F₁) F₃ D₁ D₃ D₄
     (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ F₂ D₁ D₂ D₃ FF₁ FF₂) FF₃)
  (rassociator_pstrans F₁ F₂ F₃)

  
B₁, B₂, B₃, B₄: bicat
F₁: psfunctor B₁ B₂
F₂: psfunctor B₂ B₃
F₃: psfunctor B₃ B₄
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
D₃: disp_bicat B₃
D₄: disp_bicat B₄
FF₁: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁
FF₂: disp_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂
FF₃: disp_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃
∏ (x : B₁) (xx : D₁ x),
disp_pseudo_comp F₁ (comp_psfunctor F₃ F₂) D₁ D₂ D₄
  FF₁ (disp_pseudo_comp F₂ F₃ D₂ D₃ D₄ FF₂ FF₃) x xx -->[
rassociator_pstrans F₁ F₂ F₃ x] disp_pseudo_comp
                                  (comp_psfunctor F₂
                                     F₁) F₃ D₁ D₃ D₄
                                  (disp_pseudo_comp F₁
                                     F₂ D₁ D₂ D₃ FF₁
                                     FF₂) FF₃ x xx
B₁, B₂, B₃, B₄: bicat
F₁: psfunctor B₁ B₂
F₂: psfunctor B₂ B₃
F₃: psfunctor B₃ B₄
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
D₃: disp_bicat B₃
D₄: disp_bicat B₄
FF₁: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁
FF₂: disp_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂
FF₃: disp_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃
∏ (x y : B₁) (f : B₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧) (xx : D₁ x) (yy : D₁ y)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy),
disp_invertible_2cell
  (psnaturality_of (rassociator_pstrans F₁ F₂ F₃) f)
  (?αα₁ x xx ;; ♯ (disp_pseudo_comp
                     (comp_psfunctor F₂ F₁) F₃ D₁ D₃
                     D₄
                     (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ F₂ D₁ D₂ D₃
                        FF₁ FF₂) FF₃) ff)
  (♯ (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ (comp_psfunctor F₃ F₂) D₁ D₂
        D₄ FF₁
        (disp_pseudo_comp F₂ F₃ D₂ D₃ D₄ FF₂ FF₃)) ff ;; 
   ?αα₁ y yy)

  
B₁, B₂, B₃, B₄: bicat
F₁: psfunctor B₁ B₂
F₂: psfunctor B₂ B₃
F₃: psfunctor B₃ B₄
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
D₃: disp_bicat B₃
D₄: disp_bicat B₄
FF₁: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁
FF₂: disp_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂
FF₃: disp_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃
∏ (x : B₁) (xx : D₁ x),
disp_pseudo_comp F₁ (comp_psfunctor F₃ F₂) D₁ D₂ D₄
  FF₁ (disp_pseudo_comp F₂ F₃ D₂ D₃ D₄ FF₂ FF₃) x xx -->[
rassociator_pstrans F₁ F₂ F₃ x] disp_pseudo_comp
                                  (comp_psfunctor F₂
                                     F₁) F₃ D₁ D₃ D₄
                                  (disp_pseudo_comp F₁
                                     F₂ D₁ D₂ D₃ FF₁
                                     FF₂) FF₃ x xx
 exact (λ x xx, id_disp (_ x xx)).
  
B₁, B₂, B₃, B₄: bicat
F₁: psfunctor B₁ B₂
F₂: psfunctor B₂ B₃
F₃: psfunctor B₃ B₄
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
D₃: disp_bicat B₃
D₄: disp_bicat B₄
FF₁: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁
FF₂: disp_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂
FF₃: disp_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃
∏ (x y : B₁) (f : B₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧) (xx : D₁ x) (yy : D₁ y)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy),
disp_invertible_2cell
  (psnaturality_of (rassociator_pstrans F₁ F₂ F₃) f)
  ((λ (x0 : B₁) (xx0 : D₁ x0),
    id_disp
      (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ (comp_psfunctor F₃ F₂) D₁
         D₂ D₄ FF₁
         (disp_pseudo_comp F₂ F₃ D₂ D₃ D₄ FF₂ FF₃) x0
         xx0)) x xx ;; ♯ (disp_pseudo_comp
                            (comp_psfunctor F₂ F₁) F₃
                            D₁ D₃ D₄
                            (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ F₂ D₁
                               D₂ D₃ FF₁ FF₂) FF₃) ff)
  (♯ (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ (comp_psfunctor F₃ F₂) D₁ D₂
        D₄ FF₁
        (disp_pseudo_comp F₂ F₃ D₂ D₃ D₄ FF₂ FF₃)) ff ;; 
   (λ (x0 : B₁) (xx0 : D₁ x0),
    id_disp
      (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ (comp_psfunctor F₃ F₂) D₁
         D₂ D₄ FF₁
         (disp_pseudo_comp F₂ F₃ D₂ D₃ D₄ FF₂ FF₃) x0
         xx0)) y yy)
 
B₁, B₂, B₃, B₄: bicat
F₁: psfunctor B₁ B₂
F₂: psfunctor B₂ B₃
F₃: psfunctor B₃ B₄
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
D₃: disp_bicat B₃
D₄: disp_bicat B₄
FF₁: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁
FF₂: disp_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂
FF₃: disp_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃
∏ (x y : B₁) (f : B₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧) (xx : D₁ x) (yy : D₁ y)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy),
disp_invertible_2cell
  (make_invertible_2cell
     (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
        (is_invertible_2cell_lunitor
           (# F₃ (# F₂ (# F₁ f))))
        (is_invertible_2cell_rinvunitor
           (# F₃ (# F₂ (# F₁ f))))))
  (id_disp (FF₃ (F₂ (F₁ x)) (FF₂ (F₁ x) (FF₁ x xx))) ;; 
   ♯ FF₃ (♯ FF₂ (♯ FF₁ ff)))
  (♯ FF₃ (♯ FF₂ (♯ FF₁ ff)) ;; id_disp
                                 (FF₃ (F₂ (F₁ y))
                                    (FF₂ (F₁ y)
                                       (FF₁ y yy))))

    
B₁, B₂, B₃, B₄: bicat
F₁: psfunctor B₁ B₂
F₂: psfunctor B₂ B₃
F₃: psfunctor B₃ B₄
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
D₃: disp_bicat B₃
D₄: disp_bicat B₄
FF₁: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁
FF₂: disp_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂
FF₃: disp_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃
x, y: B₁
f: B₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
disp_invertible_2cell
  (make_invertible_2cell
     (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
        (is_invertible_2cell_lunitor
           (# F₃ (# F₂ (# F₁ f))))
        (is_invertible_2cell_rinvunitor
           (# F₃ (# F₂ (# F₁ f))))))
  (id_disp (FF₃ (F₂ (F₁ x)) (FF₂ (F₁ x) (FF₁ x xx))) ;; 
   ♯ FF₃ (♯ FF₂ (♯ FF₁ ff)))
  (♯ FF₃ (♯ FF₂ (♯ FF₁ ff)) ;; id_disp
                                 (FF₃ (F₂ (F₁ y))
                                    (FF₂ (F₁ y)
                                       (FF₁ y yy))))

    apply (vcomp_disp_invertible (disp_invertible_2cell_lunitor _)
                                 (disp_invertible_2cell_rinvunitor _)).
Defined.


B₁, B₂, B₃, B₄: bicat
F₁: psfunctor B₁ B₂
F₂: psfunctor B₂ B₃
F₃: psfunctor B₃ B₄
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
D₃: disp_bicat B₃
D₄: disp_bicat B₄
FF₁: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁
FF₂: disp_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂
FF₃: disp_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃
is_disp_pstrans
  (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ (comp_psfunctor F₃ F₂) D₁ D₂ D₄
     FF₁ (disp_pseudo_comp F₂ F₃ D₂ D₃ D₄ FF₂ FF₃))
  (disp_pseudo_comp (comp_psfunctor F₂ F₁) F₃ D₁ D₃ D₄
     (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ F₂ D₁ D₂ D₃ FF₁ FF₂) FF₃)
  (rassociator_pstrans F₁ F₂ F₃)
  disp_pstrans_rassociator_data


B₁, B₂, B₃, B₄: bicat
F₁: psfunctor B₁ B₂
F₂: psfunctor B₂ B₃
F₃: psfunctor B₃ B₄
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
D₃: disp_bicat B₃
D₄: disp_bicat B₄
FF₁: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁
FF₂: disp_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂
FF₃: disp_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃
is_disp_pstrans
  (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ (comp_psfunctor F₃ F₂) D₁ D₂ D₄
     FF₁ (disp_pseudo_comp F₂ F₃ D₂ D₃ D₄ FF₂ FF₃))
  (disp_pseudo_comp (comp_psfunctor F₂ F₁) F₃ D₁ D₃ D₄
     (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ F₂ D₁ D₂ D₃ FF₁ FF₂) FF₃)
  (rassociator_pstrans F₁ F₂ F₃)
  disp_pstrans_rassociator_data

  
B₁, B₂, B₃, B₄: bicat
F₁: psfunctor B₁ B₂
F₂: psfunctor B₂ B₃
F₃: psfunctor B₃ B₄
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
D₃: disp_bicat B₃
D₄: disp_bicat B₄
FF₁: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁
FF₂: disp_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂
FF₃: disp_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃
is_pstrans
  (total_pstrans_data
     (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ (comp_psfunctor F₃ F₂) D₁ D₂
        D₄ FF₁
        (disp_pseudo_comp F₂ F₃ D₂ D₃ D₄ FF₂ FF₃))
     (disp_pseudo_comp (comp_psfunctor F₂ F₁) F₃ D₁ D₃
        D₄ (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ F₂ D₁ D₂ D₃ FF₁ FF₂)
        FF₃) (rassociator_pstrans F₁ F₂ F₃)
     disp_pstrans_rassociator_data)

  
B₁, B₂, B₃, B₄: bicat
F₁: psfunctor B₁ B₂
F₂: psfunctor B₂ B₃
F₃: psfunctor B₃ B₄
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
D₃: disp_bicat B₃
D₄: disp_bicat B₄
FF₁: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁
FF₂: disp_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂
FF₃: disp_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃
PP:= rassociator_pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)
  (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂)
  (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃): pstrans
  (comp_psfunctor
     (comp_psfunctor
        (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃)
        (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂))
     (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁))
  (comp_psfunctor (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃)
     (comp_psfunctor
        (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂)
        (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)))
is_pstrans
  (total_pstrans_data
     (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ (comp_psfunctor F₃ F₂) D₁ D₂
        D₄ FF₁
        (disp_pseudo_comp F₂ F₃ D₂ D₃ D₄ FF₂ FF₃))
     (disp_pseudo_comp (comp_psfunctor F₂ F₁) F₃ D₁ D₃
        D₄ (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ F₂ D₁ D₂ D₃ FF₁ FF₂)
        FF₃) (rassociator_pstrans F₁ F₂ F₃)
     disp_pstrans_rassociator_data)

  
B₁, B₂, B₃, B₄: bicat
F₁: psfunctor B₁ B₂
F₂: psfunctor B₂ B₃
F₃: psfunctor B₃ B₄
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
D₃: disp_bicat B₃
D₄: disp_bicat B₄
FF₁: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁
FF₂: disp_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂
FF₃: disp_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃
PP:= rassociator_pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)
  (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂)
  (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃): pstrans
  (comp_psfunctor
     (comp_psfunctor
        (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃)
        (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂))
     (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁))
  (comp_psfunctor (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃)
     (comp_psfunctor
        (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂)
        (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)))
PP2:= pstrans_to_is_pstrans PP: is_pstrans (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)
is_pstrans
  (total_pstrans_data
     (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ (comp_psfunctor F₃ F₂) D₁ D₂
        D₄ FF₁
        (disp_pseudo_comp F₂ F₃ D₂ D₃ D₄ FF₂ FF₃))
     (disp_pseudo_comp (comp_psfunctor F₂ F₁) F₃ D₁ D₃
        D₄ (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ F₂ D₁ D₂ D₃ FF₁ FF₂)
        FF₃) (rassociator_pstrans F₁ F₂ F₃)
     disp_pstrans_rassociator_data)

  
B₁, B₂, B₃, B₄: bicat
F₁: psfunctor B₁ B₂
F₂: psfunctor B₂ B₃
F₃: psfunctor B₃ B₄
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
D₃: disp_bicat B₃
D₄: disp_bicat B₄
FF₁: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁
FF₂: disp_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂
FF₃: disp_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃
PP:= rassociator_pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)
  (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂)
  (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃): pstrans
  (comp_psfunctor
     (comp_psfunctor
        (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃)
        (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂))
     (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁))
  (comp_psfunctor (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃)
     (comp_psfunctor
        (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂)
        (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)))
PP2:= pstrans_to_is_pstrans PP: is_pstrans (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)
pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP =
total_pstrans_data
  (disp_pseudo_comp (comp_psfunctor F₂ F₁) F₃ D₁ D₃ D₄
     (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ F₂ D₁ D₂ D₃ FF₁ FF₂) FF₃)
  (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ (comp_psfunctor F₃ F₂) D₁ D₂ D₄
     FF₁ (disp_pseudo_comp F₂ F₃ D₂ D₃ D₄ FF₂ FF₃))
  (lassociator_pstrans F₁ F₂ F₃)
  disp_lassociator_pstrans_data
B₁, B₂, B₃, B₄: bicat
F₁: psfunctor B₁ B₂
F₂: psfunctor B₂ B₃
F₃: psfunctor B₃ B₄
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
D₃: disp_bicat B₃
D₄: disp_bicat B₄
FF₁: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁
FF₂: disp_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂
FF₃: disp_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃
PP:= rassociator_pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)
  (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂)
  (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃): pstrans
  (comp_psfunctor
     (comp_psfunctor
        (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃)
        (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂))
     (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁))
  (comp_psfunctor (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃)
     (comp_psfunctor
        (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂)
        (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)))
PP2:= pstrans_to_is_pstrans PP: is_pstrans (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)
X: pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP =
total_pstrans_data
  (disp_pseudo_comp (comp_psfunctor F₂ F₁) F₃ D₁
     D₃ D₄
     (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ F₂ D₁ D₂ D₃ FF₁ FF₂) FF₃)
  (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ (comp_psfunctor F₃ F₂) D₁
     D₂ D₄ FF₁
     (disp_pseudo_comp F₂ F₃ D₂ D₃ D₄ FF₂ FF₃))
  (lassociator_pstrans F₁ F₂ F₃)
  disp_lassociator_pstrans_data
is_pstrans
  (total_pstrans_data
     (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ (comp_psfunctor F₃ F₂) D₁ D₂
        D₄ FF₁
        (disp_pseudo_comp F₂ F₃ D₂ D₃ D₄ FF₂ FF₃))
     (disp_pseudo_comp (comp_psfunctor F₂ F₁) F₃ D₁ D₃
        D₄ (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ F₂ D₁ D₂ D₃ FF₁ FF₂)
        FF₃) (rassociator_pstrans F₁ F₂ F₃)
     disp_pstrans_rassociator_data)

  
B₁, B₂, B₃, B₄: bicat
F₁: psfunctor B₁ B₂
F₂: psfunctor B₂ B₃
F₃: psfunctor B₃ B₄
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
D₃: disp_bicat B₃
D₄: disp_bicat B₄
FF₁: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁
FF₂: disp_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂
FF₃: disp_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃
PP:= rassociator_pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)
  (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂)
  (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃): pstrans
  (comp_psfunctor
     (comp_psfunctor
        (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃)
        (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂))
     (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁))
  (comp_psfunctor (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃)
     (comp_psfunctor
        (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂)
        (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)))
PP2:= pstrans_to_is_pstrans PP: is_pstrans (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)
pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP =
total_pstrans_data
  (disp_pseudo_comp (comp_psfunctor F₂ F₁) F₃ D₁ D₃ D₄
     (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ F₂ D₁ D₂ D₃ FF₁ FF₂) FF₃)
  (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ (comp_psfunctor F₃ F₂) D₁ D₂ D₄
     FF₁ (disp_pseudo_comp F₂ F₃ D₂ D₃ D₄ FF₂ FF₃))
  (lassociator_pstrans F₁ F₂ F₃)
  disp_lassociator_pstrans_data
 
B₁, B₂, B₃, B₄: bicat
F₁: psfunctor B₁ B₂
F₂: psfunctor B₂ B₃
F₃: psfunctor B₃ B₄
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
D₃: disp_bicat B₃
D₄: disp_bicat B₄
FF₁: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁
FF₂: disp_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂
FF₃: disp_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃
PP:= rassociator_pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)
  (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂)
  (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃): pstrans
  (comp_psfunctor
     (comp_psfunctor
        (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃)
        (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂))
     (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁))
  (comp_psfunctor (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃)
     (comp_psfunctor
        (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂)
        (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)))
PP2:= pstrans_to_is_pstrans PP: is_pstrans (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)
pr1 (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP) =
pr1
  (total_pstrans_data
     (disp_pseudo_comp (comp_psfunctor F₂ F₁) F₃ D₁ D₃
        D₄ (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ F₂ D₁ D₂ D₃ FF₁ FF₂)
        FF₃)
     (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ (comp_psfunctor F₃ F₂) D₁ D₂
        D₄ FF₁
        (disp_pseudo_comp F₂ F₃ D₂ D₃ D₄ FF₂ FF₃))
     (lassociator_pstrans F₁ F₂ F₃)
     disp_lassociator_pstrans_data)
B₁, B₂, B₃, B₄: bicat
F₁: psfunctor B₁ B₂
F₂: psfunctor B₂ B₃
F₃: psfunctor B₃ B₄
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
D₃: disp_bicat B₃
D₄: disp_bicat B₄
FF₁: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁
FF₂: disp_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂
FF₃: disp_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃
PP:= rassociator_pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)
  (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂)
  (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃): pstrans
  (comp_psfunctor
     (comp_psfunctor
        (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃)
        (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂))
     (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁))
  (comp_psfunctor (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃)
     (comp_psfunctor
        (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂)
        (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)))
PP2:= pstrans_to_is_pstrans PP: is_pstrans (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr2
        (let X :=
           pr1
             (comp_psfunctor
                (comp_psfunctor
                   (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃)
                   (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂))
                (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)) in
         let X0 := pr1 X in X0))
     (pr2
        (let X :=
           pr1
             (comp_psfunctor
                (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃)
                (comp_psfunctor
                   (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂)
                   (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁))) in
         let X0 := pr1 X in X0))) ?p
  (pr2 (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)) =
pr2
  (total_pstrans_data
     (disp_pseudo_comp (comp_psfunctor F₂ F₁) F₃ D₁ D₃
        D₄ (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ F₂ D₁ D₂ D₃ FF₁ FF₂)
        FF₃)
     (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ (comp_psfunctor F₃ F₂) D₁ D₂
        D₄ FF₁
        (disp_pseudo_comp F₂ F₃ D₂ D₃ D₄ FF₂ FF₃))
     (lassociator_pstrans F₁ F₂ F₃)
     disp_lassociator_pstrans_data)

    
B₁, B₂, B₃, B₄: bicat
F₁: psfunctor B₁ B₂
F₂: psfunctor B₂ B₃
F₃: psfunctor B₃ B₄
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
D₃: disp_bicat B₃
D₄: disp_bicat B₄
FF₁: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁
FF₂: disp_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂
FF₃: disp_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃
PP:= rassociator_pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)
  (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂)
  (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃): pstrans
  (comp_psfunctor
     (comp_psfunctor
        (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃)
        (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂))
     (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁))
  (comp_psfunctor (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃)
     (comp_psfunctor
        (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂)
        (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)))
PP2:= pstrans_to_is_pstrans PP: is_pstrans (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)
pr1 (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP) =
pr1
  (total_pstrans_data
     (disp_pseudo_comp (comp_psfunctor F₂ F₁) F₃ D₁ D₃
        D₄ (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ F₂ D₁ D₂ D₃ FF₁ FF₂)
        FF₃)
     (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ (comp_psfunctor F₃ F₂) D₁ D₂
        D₄ FF₁
        (disp_pseudo_comp F₂ F₃ D₂ D₃ D₄ FF₂ FF₃))
     (lassociator_pstrans F₁ F₂ F₃)
     disp_lassociator_pstrans_data)
 apply idpath.
    
B₁, B₂, B₃, B₄: bicat
F₁: psfunctor B₁ B₂
F₂: psfunctor B₂ B₃
F₃: psfunctor B₃ B₄
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
D₃: disp_bicat B₃
D₄: disp_bicat B₄
FF₁: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁
FF₂: disp_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂
FF₃: disp_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃
PP:= rassociator_pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)
  (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂)
  (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃): pstrans
  (comp_psfunctor
     (comp_psfunctor
        (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃)
        (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂))
     (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁))
  (comp_psfunctor (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃)
     (comp_psfunctor
        (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂)
        (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)))
PP2:= pstrans_to_is_pstrans PP: is_pstrans (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr2
        (let X :=
           pr1
             (comp_psfunctor
                (comp_psfunctor
                   (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃)
                   (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂))
                (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)) in
         let X0 := pr1 X in X0))
     (pr2
        (let X :=
           pr1
             (comp_psfunctor
                (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃)
                (comp_psfunctor
                   (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂)
                   (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁))) in
         let X0 := pr1 X in X0)))
  (idpath
     (pr1
        (total_pstrans_data
           (disp_pseudo_comp (comp_psfunctor F₂ F₁) F₃
              D₁ D₃ D₄
              (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ F₂ D₁ D₂ D₃ FF₁ FF₂)
              FF₃)
           (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ (comp_psfunctor F₃ F₂)
              D₁ D₂ D₄ FF₁
              (disp_pseudo_comp F₂ F₃ D₂ D₃ D₄ FF₂ FF₃))
           (lassociator_pstrans F₁ F₂ F₃)
           disp_lassociator_pstrans_data)))
  (pr2 (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)) =
pr2
  (total_pstrans_data
     (disp_pseudo_comp (comp_psfunctor F₂ F₁) F₃ D₁ D₃
        D₄ (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ F₂ D₁ D₂ D₃ FF₁ FF₂)
        FF₃)
     (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ (comp_psfunctor F₃ F₂) D₁ D₂
        D₄ FF₁
        (disp_pseudo_comp F₂ F₃ D₂ D₃ D₄ FF₂ FF₃))
     (lassociator_pstrans F₁ F₂ F₃)
     disp_lassociator_pstrans_data)
 
B₁, B₂, B₃, B₄: bicat
F₁: psfunctor B₁ B₂
F₂: psfunctor B₂ B₃
F₃: psfunctor B₃ B₄
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
D₃: disp_bicat B₃
D₄: disp_bicat B₄
FF₁: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁
FF₂: disp_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂
FF₃: disp_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃
PP:= rassociator_pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)
  (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂)
  (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃): pstrans
  (comp_psfunctor
     (comp_psfunctor
        (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃)
        (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂))
     (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁))
  (comp_psfunctor (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃)
     (comp_psfunctor
        (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂)
        (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)))
PP2:= pstrans_to_is_pstrans PP: is_pstrans (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr2
        (let X :=
           pr1
             (comp_psfunctor
                (comp_psfunctor
                   (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃)
                   (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂))
                (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)) in
         let X0 := pr1 X in X0))
     (pr2
        (let X :=
           pr1
             (comp_psfunctor
                (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃)
                (comp_psfunctor
                   (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂)
                   (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁))) in
         let X0 := pr1 X in X0)))
  (idpath
     (pr1
        (total_pstrans_data
           (disp_pseudo_comp (comp_psfunctor F₂ F₁) F₃
              D₁ D₃ D₄
              (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ F₂ D₁ D₂ D₃ FF₁ FF₂)
              FF₃)
           (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ (comp_psfunctor F₃ F₂)
              D₁ D₂ D₄ FF₁
              (disp_pseudo_comp F₂ F₃ D₂ D₃ D₄ FF₂ FF₃))
           (lassociator_pstrans F₁ F₂ F₃)
           disp_lassociator_pstrans_data)))
  (pr2 (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)) ~
pr2
  (total_pstrans_data
     (disp_pseudo_comp (comp_psfunctor F₂ F₁) F₃ D₁ D₃
        D₄ (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ F₂ D₁ D₂ D₃ FF₁ FF₂)
        FF₃)
     (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ (comp_psfunctor F₃ F₂) D₁ D₂
        D₄ FF₁
        (disp_pseudo_comp F₂ F₃ D₂ D₃ D₄ FF₂ FF₃))
     (lassociator_pstrans F₁ F₂ F₃)
     disp_lassociator_pstrans_data)
 
B₁, B₂, B₃, B₄: bicat
F₁: psfunctor B₁ B₂
F₂: psfunctor B₂ B₃
F₃: psfunctor B₃ B₄
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
D₃: disp_bicat B₃
D₄: disp_bicat B₄
FF₁: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁
FF₂: disp_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂
FF₃: disp_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃
PP:= rassociator_pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)
  (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂)
  (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃): pstrans
  (comp_psfunctor
     (comp_psfunctor
        (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃)
        (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂))
     (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁))
  (comp_psfunctor (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃)
     (comp_psfunctor
        (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂)
        (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)))
PP2:= pstrans_to_is_pstrans PP: is_pstrans (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)
x: total_bicat D₁
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr2
        (let X :=
           pr1
             (comp_psfunctor
                (comp_psfunctor
                   (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃)
                   (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂))
                (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)) in
         let X0 := pr1 X in X0))
     (pr2
        (let X :=
           pr1
             (comp_psfunctor
                (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃)
                (comp_psfunctor
                   (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂)
                   (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁))) in
         let X0 := pr1 X in X0)))
  (idpath
     (pr1
        (total_pstrans_data
           (disp_pseudo_comp (comp_psfunctor F₂ F₁) F₃
              D₁ D₃ D₄
              (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ F₂ D₁ D₂ D₃ FF₁ FF₂)
              FF₃)
           (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ (comp_psfunctor F₃ F₂)
              D₁ D₂ D₄ FF₁
              (disp_pseudo_comp F₂ F₃ D₂ D₃ D₄ FF₂ FF₃))
           (lassociator_pstrans F₁ F₂ F₃)
           disp_lassociator_pstrans_data)))
  (pr2 (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)) x =
pr2
  (total_pstrans_data
     (disp_pseudo_comp (comp_psfunctor F₂ F₁) F₃ D₁ D₃
        D₄ (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ F₂ D₁ D₂ D₃ FF₁ FF₂)
        FF₃)
     (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ (comp_psfunctor F₃ F₂) D₁ D₂
        D₄ FF₁
        (disp_pseudo_comp F₂ F₃ D₂ D₃ D₄ FF₂ FF₃))
     (lassociator_pstrans F₁ F₂ F₃)
     disp_lassociator_pstrans_data) x

      
B₁, B₂, B₃, B₄: bicat
F₁: psfunctor B₁ B₂
F₂: psfunctor B₂ B₃
F₃: psfunctor B₃ B₄

D₂: disp_bicat B₂
D₃: disp_bicat B₃

FF₂: disp_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂
FF₃: disp_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃

  (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂)
  (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃): pstrans

     (comp_psfunctor
        (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃)
        (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂))

     (comp_psfunctor
        (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂)
        (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)))

x: total_bicat D₁
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr2
        (let X :=
           pr1
             (comp_psfunctor
                (comp_psfunctor
                   (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃)
                   (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂))
                (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)) in
         let X0 := pr1 X in X0))
     (pr2

           pr1

                (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃)
                (comp_psfunctor
                   (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂)
                   (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁))) in
         let X0 := pr1 X in X0)))
  (idpath
     (pr1
        (total_pstrans_data
           (disp_pseudo_comp (comp_psfunctor F₂ F₁) F₃
              D₁ D₃ D₄
              (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ F₂ D₁ D₂ D₃ FF₁ FF₂)
              FF₃)

              D₁ D₂ D₄ FF₁
              (disp_pseudo_comp F₂ F₃ D₂ D₃ D₄ FF₂ FF₃))
           (lassociator_pstrans F₁ F₂ F₃)
           disp_lassociator_pstrans_data)))
  (pr2 (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)) x ~
pr2
  (total_pstrans_data
     (disp_pseudo_comp (comp_psfunctor F₂ F₁) F₃ D₁ D₃
        D₄ (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ F₂ D₁ D₂ D₃ FF₁ FF₂)
        FF₃)
     (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ (comp_psfunctor F₃ F₂) D₁ D₂
        D₄ FF₁
        (disp_pseudo_comp F₂ F₃ D₂ D₃ D₄ FF₂ FF₃))
     (lassociator_pstrans F₁ F₂ F₃)
     disp_lassociator_pstrans_data) x

F₁: psfunctor B₁ B₂
F₂: psfunctor B₂ B₃
F₃: psfunctor B₃ B₄

D₃: disp_bicat B₃

  (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂)

        (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃)

        (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)))

x, y: total_bicat D₁
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr2

           pr1
             (comp_psfunctor

                   (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃)
                   (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂))
                (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)) in
         let X0 := pr1 X in X0))
     (pr2
        (let X :=
           pr1

                (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃)
                (comp_psfunctor
                   (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂)
                   (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁))) in
         let X0 := pr1 X in X0)))
  (idpath
     (pr1

              D₁ D₃ D₄
              (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ F₂ D₁ D₂ D₃ FF₁ FF₂)
              FF₃)
           (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ (comp_psfunctor F₃ F₂)
              D₁ D₂ D₄ FF₁

           (lassociator_pstrans F₁ F₂ F₃)
           disp_lassociator_pstrans_data)))
  (pr2 (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)) x y =

     (disp_pseudo_comp (comp_psfunctor F₂ F₁) F₃ D₁ D₃
        D₄ (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ F₂ D₁ D₂ D₃ FF₁ FF₂)
        FF₃)

        D₄ FF₁

     (lassociator_pstrans F₁ F₂ F₃)
     disp_lassociator_pstrans_data) x y

F₁: psfunctor B₁ B₂

  (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂)
  (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃): pstrans
  (comp_psfunctor
     (comp_psfunctor
        (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃)

        (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂)
