x, y: total_bicat D₁
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr2
        (let X :=
           pr1
             (comp_psfunctor
                (comp_psfunctor
                   (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃)
                   (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂))
                (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)) in
         let X0 := pr1 X in X0))
     (pr2
        (let X :=
           pr1
             (comp_psfunctor
                (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃)
                (comp_psfunctor
                   (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂)
                   (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁))) in
         let X0 := pr1 X in X0)))
  (idpath
     (pr1
        (total_pstrans_data
           (disp_pseudo_comp (comp_psfunctor F₂ F₁) F₃
              D₁ D₃ D₄
              (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ F₂ D₁ D₂ D₃ FF₁ FF₂)
              FF₃)
           (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ (comp_psfunctor F₃ F₂)
              D₁ D₂ D₄ FF₁
              (disp_pseudo_comp F₂ F₃ D₂ D₃ D₄ FF₂ FF₃))
           (lassociator_pstrans F₁ F₂ F₃)
           disp_lassociator_pstrans_data)))
  (pr2 (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)) x y ~
pr2
  (total_pstrans_data
     (disp_pseudo_comp (comp_psfunctor F₂ F₁) F₃ D₁ D₃
        D₄ (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ F₂ D₁ D₂ D₃ FF₁ FF₂)
        FF₃)
     (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ (comp_psfunctor F₃ F₂) D₁ D₂
        D₄ FF₁
        (disp_pseudo_comp F₂ F₃ D₂ D₃ D₄ FF₂ FF₃))
     (lassociator_pstrans F₁ F₂ F₃)
     disp_lassociator_pstrans_data) x y
 
B₁, B₂, B₃, B₄: bicat
F₁: psfunctor B₁ B₂
F₂: psfunctor B₂ B₃
F₃: psfunctor B₃ B₄
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
D₃: disp_bicat B₃
D₄: disp_bicat B₄
FF₁: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁
FF₂: disp_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂
FF₃: disp_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃
PP:= rassociator_pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)
  (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂)
  (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃): pstrans
  (comp_psfunctor
     (comp_psfunctor
        (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃)
        (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂))
     (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁))
  (comp_psfunctor (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃)
     (comp_psfunctor
        (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂)
        (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)))
PP2:= pstrans_to_is_pstrans PP: is_pstrans (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)
x, y: total_bicat D₁
f: total_bicat D₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr2
        (let X :=
           pr1
             (comp_psfunctor
                (comp_psfunctor
                   (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃)
                   (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂))
                (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)) in
         let X0 := pr1 X in X0))
     (pr2
        (let X :=
           pr1
             (comp_psfunctor
                (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃)
                (comp_psfunctor
                   (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂)
                   (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁))) in
         let X0 := pr1 X in X0)))
  (idpath
     (pr1
        (total_pstrans_data
           (disp_pseudo_comp (comp_psfunctor F₂ F₁) F₃
              D₁ D₃ D₄
              (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ F₂ D₁ D₂ D₃ FF₁ FF₂)
              FF₃)
           (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ (comp_psfunctor F₃ F₂)
              D₁ D₂ D₄ FF₁
              (disp_pseudo_comp F₂ F₃ D₂ D₃ D₄ FF₂ FF₃))
           (lassociator_pstrans F₁ F₂ F₃)
           disp_lassociator_pstrans_data)))
  (pr2 (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)) x y f =
pr2
  (total_pstrans_data
     (disp_pseudo_comp (comp_psfunctor F₂ F₁) F₃ D₁ D₃
        D₄ (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ F₂ D₁ D₂ D₃ FF₁ FF₂)
        FF₃)
     (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ (comp_psfunctor F₃ F₂) D₁ D₂
        D₄ FF₁
        (disp_pseudo_comp F₂ F₃ D₂ D₃ D₄ FF₂ FF₃))
     (lassociator_pstrans F₁ F₂ F₃)
     disp_lassociator_pstrans_data) x y f

      
B₁, B₂, B₃, B₄: bicat
F₁: psfunctor B₁ B₂
F₂: psfunctor B₂ B₃
F₃: psfunctor B₃ B₄
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
D₃: disp_bicat B₃
D₄: disp_bicat B₄
FF₁: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁
FF₂: disp_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂
FF₃: disp_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃
PP:= rassociator_pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)
  (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂)
  (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃): pstrans
  (comp_psfunctor
     (comp_psfunctor
        (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃)
        (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂))
     (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁))
  (comp_psfunctor (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃)
     (comp_psfunctor
        (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂)
        (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)))
PP2:= pstrans_to_is_pstrans PP: is_pstrans (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)
x, y: total_bicat D₁
f: total_bicat D₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
isPredicate is_invertible_2cell
B₁, B₂, B₃, B₄: bicat
F₁: psfunctor B₁ B₂
F₂: psfunctor B₂ B₃
F₃: psfunctor B₃ B₄
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
D₃: disp_bicat B₃
D₄: disp_bicat B₄
FF₁: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁
FF₂: disp_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂
FF₃: disp_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃
PP:= rassociator_pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)
  (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂)
  (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃): pstrans
  (comp_psfunctor
     (comp_psfunctor
        (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃)
        (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂))
     (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁))
  (comp_psfunctor (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃)
     (comp_psfunctor
        (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂)
        (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)))
PP2:= pstrans_to_is_pstrans PP: is_pstrans (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)
x, y: total_bicat D₁
f: total_bicat D₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr1
  (transportf
     (mor_disp
        (pr2
           (let X :=
              pr1
                (comp_psfunctor
                   (comp_psfunctor
                      (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃)
                      (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂))
                   (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)) in
            let X0 := pr1 X in X0))
        (pr2
           (let X :=
              pr1
                (comp_psfunctor
                   (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃)
                   (comp_psfunctor
                      (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂)
                      (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)))
              in
            let X0 := pr1 X in X0)))
     (idpath
        (pr1
           (total_pstrans_data
              (disp_pseudo_comp (comp_psfunctor F₂ F₁)
                 F₃ D₁ D₃ D₄
                 (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ F₂ D₁ D₂ D₃ FF₁
                    FF₂) FF₃)
              (disp_pseudo_comp F₁
                 (comp_psfunctor F₃ F₂) D₁ D₂ D₄ FF₁
                 (disp_pseudo_comp F₂ F₃ D₂ D₃ D₄ FF₂
                    FF₃))
              (lassociator_pstrans F₁ F₂ F₃)
              disp_lassociator_pstrans_data)))
     (pr2 (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)) x y f) =
pr1
  (pr2
     (total_pstrans_data
        (disp_pseudo_comp (comp_psfunctor F₂ F₁) F₃ D₁
           D₃ D₄
           (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ F₂ D₁ D₂ D₃ FF₁ FF₂)
           FF₃)
        (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ (comp_psfunctor F₃ F₂) D₁
           D₂ D₄ FF₁
           (disp_pseudo_comp F₂ F₃ D₂ D₃ D₄ FF₂ FF₃))
        (lassociator_pstrans F₁ F₂ F₃)
        disp_lassociator_pstrans_data) x y f)

      
B₁, B₂, B₃, B₄: bicat
F₁: psfunctor B₁ B₂
F₂: psfunctor B₂ B₃
F₃: psfunctor B₃ B₄
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
D₃: disp_bicat B₃
D₄: disp_bicat B₄
FF₁: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁
FF₂: disp_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂
FF₃: disp_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃
PP:= rassociator_pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)
  (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂)
  (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃): pstrans
  (comp_psfunctor
     (comp_psfunctor
        (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃)
        (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂))
     (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁))
  (comp_psfunctor (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃)
     (comp_psfunctor
        (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂)
        (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)))

x, y: total_bicat D₁
f: total_bicat D₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
isPredicate is_invertible_2cell
 
B₁, B₂, B₃, B₄: bicat
F₁: psfunctor B₁ B₂
F₂: psfunctor B₂ B₃
F₃: psfunctor B₃ B₄
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
D₃: disp_bicat B₃
D₄: disp_bicat B₄
FF₁: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁
FF₂: disp_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂
FF₃: disp_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃
PP:= rassociator_pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)
  (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂)
  (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃): pstrans
  (comp_psfunctor
     (comp_psfunctor
        (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃)
        (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂))
     (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁))
  (comp_psfunctor (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃)
     (comp_psfunctor
        (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂)
        (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)))
PP2:= pstrans_to_is_pstrans PP: is_pstrans (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)
x, y: total_bicat D₁
f: total_bicat D₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
x0: pr1
  (total_pstrans_data
     (disp_pseudo_comp (comp_psfunctor F₂ F₁) F₃
        D₁ D₃ D₄
        (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ F₂ D₁ D₂ D₃ FF₁ FF₂)
        FF₃)
     (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ (comp_psfunctor F₃ F₂)
        D₁ D₂ D₄ FF₁
        (disp_pseudo_comp F₂ F₃ D₂ D₃ D₄ FF₂ FF₃))
     (lassociator_pstrans F₁ F₂ F₃)
     disp_lassociator_pstrans_data) x
· pr2
    (let X :=
       pr1
         (comp_psfunctor
            (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃)
            (comp_psfunctor
               (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂)
               (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)))
       in
     let X0 := pr1 X in X0) x y f ==>
pr2
  (let X :=
     pr1
       (comp_psfunctor
          (comp_psfunctor
             (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃)
             (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂))
          (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)) in
   let X0 := pr1 X in X0) x y f
· pr1
    (total_pstrans_data
       (disp_pseudo_comp (comp_psfunctor F₂ F₁)
          F₃ D₁ D₃ D₄
          (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ F₂ D₁ D₂ D₃ FF₁
             FF₂) FF₃)
       (disp_pseudo_comp F₁
          (comp_psfunctor F₃ F₂) D₁ D₂ D₄ FF₁
          (disp_pseudo_comp F₂ F₃ D₂ D₃ D₄ FF₂
             FF₃)) (lassociator_pstrans F₁ F₂ F₃)
       disp_lassociator_pstrans_data) y
isaprop (is_invertible_2cell x0)
 apply isaprop_is_invertible_2cell. 
B₁, B₂, B₃, B₄: bicat
F₁: psfunctor B₁ B₂
F₂: psfunctor B₂ B₃
F₃: psfunctor B₃ B₄
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
D₃: disp_bicat B₃
D₄: disp_bicat B₄
FF₁: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁
FF₂: disp_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂
FF₃: disp_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃
PP:= rassociator_pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)
  (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂)
  (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃): pstrans
  (comp_psfunctor
     (comp_psfunctor
        (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃)
        (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂))
     (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁))
  (comp_psfunctor (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃)
     (comp_psfunctor
        (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂)
        (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)))
PP2:= pstrans_to_is_pstrans PP: is_pstrans (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)
x, y: total_bicat D₁
f: total_bicat D₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr1
  (transportf
     (mor_disp
        (pr2
           (let X :=
              pr1
                (comp_psfunctor
                   (comp_psfunctor
                      (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃)
                      (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂))
                   (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)) in
            let X0 := pr1 X in X0))
        (pr2
           (let X :=
              pr1
                (comp_psfunctor
                   (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃)
                   (comp_psfunctor
                      (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂)
                      (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)))
              in
            let X0 := pr1 X in X0)))
     (idpath
        (pr1
           (total_pstrans_data
              (disp_pseudo_comp (comp_psfunctor F₂ F₁)
                 F₃ D₁ D₃ D₄
                 (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ F₂ D₁ D₂ D₃ FF₁
                    FF₂) FF₃)
              (disp_pseudo_comp F₁
                 (comp_psfunctor F₃ F₂) D₁ D₂ D₄ FF₁
                 (disp_pseudo_comp F₂ F₃ D₂ D₃ D₄ FF₂
                    FF₃))
              (lassociator_pstrans F₁ F₂ F₃)
              disp_lassociator_pstrans_data)))
     (pr2 (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)) x y f) =
pr1
  (pr2
     (total_pstrans_data
        (disp_pseudo_comp (comp_psfunctor F₂ F₁) F₃ D₁
           D₃ D₄
           (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ F₂ D₁ D₂ D₃ FF₁ FF₂)
           FF₃)
        (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ (comp_psfunctor F₃ F₂) D₁
           D₂ D₄ FF₁
           (disp_pseudo_comp F₂ F₃ D₂ D₃ D₄ FF₂ FF₃))
        (lassociator_pstrans F₁ F₂ F₃)
        disp_lassociator_pstrans_data) x y f)

      apply idpath.
  
B₁, B₂, B₃, B₄: bicat
F₁: psfunctor B₁ B₂
F₂: psfunctor B₂ B₃
F₃: psfunctor B₃ B₄
D₁: disp_bicat B₁
D₂: disp_bicat B₂
D₃: disp_bicat B₃
D₄: disp_bicat B₄
FF₁: disp_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁
FF₂: disp_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂
FF₃: disp_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃
PP:= rassociator_pstrans (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)
  (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂)
  (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃): pstrans
  (comp_psfunctor
     (comp_psfunctor
        (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃)
        (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂))
     (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁))
  (comp_psfunctor (total_psfunctor D₃ D₄ F₃ FF₃)
     (comp_psfunctor
        (total_psfunctor D₂ D₃ F₂ FF₂)
        (total_psfunctor D₁ D₂ F₁ FF₁)))
PP2:= pstrans_to_is_pstrans PP: is_pstrans (pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP)
X: pstrans_to_pstrans_data PP =
total_pstrans_data
  (disp_pseudo_comp (comp_psfunctor F₂ F₁) F₃ D₁
     D₃ D₄
     (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ F₂ D₁ D₂ D₃ FF₁ FF₂) FF₃)
  (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ (comp_psfunctor F₃ F₂) D₁
     D₂ D₄ FF₁
     (disp_pseudo_comp F₂ F₃ D₂ D₃ D₄ FF₂ FF₃))
  (lassociator_pstrans F₁ F₂ F₃)
  disp_lassociator_pstrans_data
is_pstrans
  (total_pstrans_data
     (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ (comp_psfunctor F₃ F₂) D₁ D₂
        D₄ FF₁
        (disp_pseudo_comp F₂ F₃ D₂ D₃ D₄ FF₂ FF₃))
     (disp_pseudo_comp (comp_psfunctor F₂ F₁) F₃ D₁ D₃
        D₄ (disp_pseudo_comp F₁ F₂ D₁ D₂ D₃ FF₁ FF₂)
        FF₃) (rassociator_pstrans F₁ F₂ F₃)
     disp_pstrans_rassociator_data)
 exact (transportf is_pstrans X PP2).
Qed.

Definition disp_pstrans_rassociator
  : disp_pstrans
      (disp_pseudo_comp
         _ _ _ _ _
         FF₁
         (disp_pseudo_comp
            _ _ _ _ _
            FF₂
            FF₃)
      )
      (disp_pseudo_comp
         _ _ _ _ _
         (disp_pseudo_comp
            _ _ _ _ _
            FF₁
            FF₂)
         FF₃
      )
      (rassociator_pstrans F₁ F₂ F₃)
  := disp_pstrans_rassociator_data,, disp_pstrans_rassociator_laws.
End DispTransAssociativiy.
